# Comparing CHC and THC
```{r}
# Custom logging function
log_message <- function(...) {
  cat(sprintf("[%s] %s\n", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), paste(...)))
}

# Custom theme for plots
custom_theme <- function() {
  theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, color = "black", angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
      axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.00001, "cm"),
      axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.00001, "mm"),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      panel.spacing = unit(0.001, "mm"),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2, "mm"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 2)),
      axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 2)),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
      legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
      legend.box.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)
    )
}

# Function to create dot plots
create_dot_plot <- function(object, features, group.by, title, dot.scale = 10, cell.types = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(cell.types)) {
    cells <- WhichCells(object, expression = WellCellType %in% cell.types)
    object <- subset(object, cells = cells)
  }
  if (length(features) == 0) {
    log_message("No features available for dot plot")
    return(NULL)
  }
  DotPlot(
    object,
    features = features,
    group.by = group.by,
    dot.scale = dot.scale
  ) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Avg\nExpression") +
    custom_theme() +
    labs(title = title, x = "Genes", y = "Cell Type") +
    coord_flip() +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 2)
}

# Function to save results to CSV
save_results_to_csv <- function(data, filename, description) {
  output_dir <- "results"
  if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
    dir.create(output_dir)
    log_message("Created 'results' directory")
  }
  filepath <- file.path(output_dir, filename)
  write.csv(data, filepath, row.names = FALSE)
  log_message(sprintf("%s saved to %s", description, filepath))
}

# Function to safely convert gene symbols to Entrez IDs
safe_bitr <- function(genes, fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID") {
  if (length(genes) == 0) {
    log_message("No genes provided for conversion")
    return(data.frame(SYMBOL = character(0), ENTREZID = character(0)))
  }
  result <- tryCatch({
    bitr(genes, fromType = fromType, toType = toType, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db)
  }, error = function(e) {
    log_message("Error in gene ID conversion:", e$message)
    return(data.frame(SYMBOL = character(0), ENTREZID = character(0)))
  })
  return(result)
}

# Function to run GSEA
run_gsea <- function(gene_list, ontology, title_prefix) {
  if (length(gene_list) < 100) {
    log_message(sprintf("Not enough genes for GSEA %s (need >= 100, have %d)", ontology, length(gene_list)))
    return(NULL)
  }
  gsea_result <- tryCatch({
    gseGO(
      geneList = gene_list,
      OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
      ont = ontology,
      keyType = "ENTREZID",
      minGSSize = 15,
      maxGSSize = 500,
      pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
      pAdjustMethod = "BH",
      verbose = FALSE
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    log_message(sprintf("Error in GSEA %s: %s", ontology, e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  if (!is.null(gsea_result) && nrow(gsea_result@result) > 0) {
    log_message(sprintf("Found %d significant GO terms in GSEA %s", nrow(gsea_result@result), ontology))
    p_dot <- dotplot(gsea_result, showCategory = min(15, nrow(gsea_result@result)),
                     title = sprintf("%s: GO %s (CHC vs THC)", title_prefix, ontology)) +
      scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Adj. P-value") +
      custom_theme()
    print(p_dot)
    if (nrow(gsea_result@result) >= 10) {
      top_results <- gsea_result@result[1:min(6, nrow(gsea_result@result)), ]
      for (i in 1:min(3, nrow(top_results))) {
        p_enrich <- gseaplot2(gsea_result, geneSetID = top_results$ID[i],
                              title = paste("GSEA:", top_results$Description[i]),
                              pvalue_table = TRUE)
        print(p_enrich)
      }
      p_ridge <- ridgeplot(gsea_result, showCategory = 20) +
        scale_fill_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Adj. P-value") +
        labs(title = sprintf("GSEA Ridge Plot: GO %s Terms", ontology)) +
        custom_theme()
      print(p_ridge)
    }
    return(gsea_result)
  } else {
    log_message(sprintf("No significant GO terms found in GSEA %s", ontology))
    return(NULL)
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 1: Cell Subsetting and Average Expression
# ========================================

# Check if WellCellType exists
if (!"WellCellType" %in% colnames(merged_data_all_7@meta.data)) {
  stop("WellCellType column not found in metadata.")
}

# Subset cells
CHC_cells <- WhichCells(merged_data_all_7, expression = WellCellType == "CHC")
THC_cells <- WhichCells(merged_data_all_7, expression = WellCellType == "THC")
log_message("CHC cells found:", length(CHC_cells))
log_message("THC cells found:", length(THC_cells))

if (length(CHC_cells) == 0 || length(THC_cells) == 0) {
  stop("No cells found for one or both cell types.")
}

# Create subsets
CHC_subset <- subset(merged_data_all_7, cells = CHC_cells)
THC_subset <- subset(merged_data_all_7, cells = THC_cells)

# Calculate average expression
CHC_avg <- AverageExpression(CHC_subset, layer = "data")$RNA
THC_avg <- AverageExpression(THC_subset, layer = "data")$RNA
log_message("CHC_avg dimensions:", dim(CHC_avg))
log_message("THC_avg dimensions:", dim(THC_avg))

# Convert to data frames and merge
avg_expr_df <- merge(
  data.frame(gene = rownames(CHC_avg), CHC = CHC_avg[, 1], stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  data.frame(gene = rownames(THC_avg), THC = THC_avg[, 1], stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
  by = "gene"
)
avg_expr_df <- avg_expr_df[complete.cases(avg_expr_df), ]
avg_expr_df <- avg_expr_df %>%
  mutate(
    log_CHC = log1p(CHC),
    log_THC = log1p(THC),
    avg_log2FC = log2((CHC + 0.01) / (THC + 0.01)),
    abs_log2FC = abs(avg_log2FC),
    expr_diff = abs(CHC - THC)
  )
log_message("Final data frame dimensions:", dim(avg_expr_df))

# Calculate correlation
correlation <- cor(avg_expr_df$CHC, avg_expr_df$THC, method = "pearson")
log_message("Correlation between CHC and THC:", round(correlation, 3))

# ===============================================
# PART 2: Gene Expression Similarity Visualization
# ===============================================

genes_to_annotate <- c("RUNX1", "THBS1", "SPI1", "GRN", "PF4", "LGALS3")
genes_present <- genes_to_annotate[genes_to_annotate %in% avg_expr_df$gene]
if (length(genes_present) < length(genes_to_annotate)) {
  log_message("Warning: Genes not found:", paste(setdiff(genes_to_annotate, genes_present), collapse = ", "))
}
avg_expr_df$label <- ifelse(avg_expr_df$gene %in% genes_present, avg_expr_df$gene, NA)

p1 <- ggplot(avg_expr_df, aes(x = log_CHC, y = log_THC)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "gray") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_point(data = subset(avg_expr_df, !is.na(label)), color = "red", size = 2) +
  geom_text_repel(data = subset(avg_expr_df, !is.na(label)), aes(label = label),
                  size = 4, box.padding = 0.5, max.overlaps = Inf) +
  custom_theme() +
  labs(title = "Gene Expression Similarity: CHC vs THC",
       x = "log1p Avg Expression in CHC", y = "log1p Avg Expression in THC") +
  coord_fixed()
print(p1)

# ========================================
# PART 3: Counting Co-expressed Genes
# ========================================

high_threshold <- 1
low_threshold <- 0.1
high_in_both <- avg_expr_df %>% filter(CHC > high_threshold, THC > high_threshold)
low_in_both <- avg_expr_df %>% filter(CHC < low_threshold, THC < low_threshold)
similar_expr <- avg_expr_df %>% filter(abs(CHC - THC) < 0.1)
log_message("Genes high in both:", nrow(high_in_both))
log_message("Genes low in both:", nrow(low_in_both))
log_message("Genes with similar expression:", nrow(similar_expr))

# ========================================
# PART 4: GO Enrichment Analysis
# ========================================

high_entrez <- safe_bitr(high_in_both$gene)
low_entrez <- safe_bitr(low_in_both$gene)
log_message("High genes converted:", nrow(high_entrez), "out of", nrow(high_in_both))
log_message("Low genes converted:", nrow(low_entrez), "out of", nrow(low_in_both))

if (nrow(high_entrez) > 5) {
  go_high <- enrichGO(
    gene = high_entrez$ENTREZID, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db, ont = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, qvalueCutoff = 0.1, readable = TRUE
  )
  if (nrow(go_high@result) > 0) {
    print(barplot(go_high, showCategory = 15, title = "GO Terms: High in CHC & THC"))
    print(dotplot(go_high, showCategory = 15) +
            custom_theme() +
            ggtitle("GO: Highly Expressed in CHC & THC"))
  } else {
    log_message("No significant GO terms found for highly expressed genes")
  }
} else {
  log_message("Not enough genes for GO enrichment of highly expressed genes")
}

if (nrow(low_entrez) > 5) {
  go_low <- enrichGO(
    gene = low_entrez$ENTREZID, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db, ont = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, qvalueCutoff = 0.1, readable = TRUE
  )
  if (nrow(go_low@result) > 0) {
    print(barplot(go_low, showCategory = 15, title = "GO Terms: Low in CHC & THC"))
    print(dotplot(go_low, showCategory = 15) +
            custom_theme() +
            ggtitle("GO: Lowly Expressed in CHC & THC"))
  } else {
    log_message("No significant GO terms found for lowly expressed genes")
  }
} else {
  log_message("Not enough genes for GO enrichment of lowly expressed genes")
}

# ========================================
# PART 5: Cell Type Specific Analysis
# ========================================

chc_specific <- avg_expr_df %>% filter(CHC > 1, THC < 0.1)
thc_specific <- avg_expr_df %>% filter(THC > 1, CHC < 0.1)
log_message("CHC-specific genes:", nrow(chc_specific))
log_message("THC-specific genes:", nrow(thc_specific))

chc_entrez <- safe_bitr(chc_specific$gene)
thc_entrez <- safe_bitr(thc_specific$gene)
log_message("CHC genes converted:", nrow(chc_entrez))
log_message("THC genes converted:", nrow(thc_entrez))

if (nrow(chc_entrez) > 5) {
  go_chc <- enrichGO(
    gene = chc_entrez$ENTREZID, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db, ont = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, readable = TRUE
  )
  if (nrow(go_chc@result) > 0) {
    df_go_chc <- head(go_chc@result, 10)
    df_go_chc$Description <- str_wrap(df_go_chc$Description, width = 30)
    p_chc <- ggplot(df_go_chc, aes(x = reorder(Description, Count), y = Count, size = Count, color = p.adjust)) +
      geom_point() +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Adj. P-value") +
      custom_theme() +
      labs(title = "GO Terms - CHC Specific", x = NULL, y = "Gene Count") +
      theme(aspect.ratio = 2)
    print(p_chc)
  } else {
    log_message("No significant GO terms found for CHC-specific genes")
  }
} else {
  log_message("Not enough CHC-specific genes for GO enrichment")
}
# Use this as example model for Dot Plot aspect ratio and wrapped y-axis text
if (nrow(thc_entrez) > 5) {
  go_thc <- enrichGO(
    gene = thc_entrez$ENTREZID, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db, ont = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, readable = TRUE
  )
  if (nrow(go_thc@result) > 0) {
    df_go_thc <- head(go_thc@result, 10)
    df_go_thc$Description <- str_wrap(df_go_thc$Description, width = 30)
    p_thc <- ggplot(df_go_thc, aes(x = reorder(Description, Count), y = Count, size = Count, color = p.adjust)) +
      geom_point() +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Adj. P-value") +
      custom_theme() +
      labs(title = "GO Terms - THC Specific", x = NULL, y = "Gene Count") +
      theme(aspect.ratio = 2)
    print(p_thc)
  } else {
    log_message("No significant GO terms found for THC-specific genes")
  }
} else {
  log_message("Not enough THC-specific genes for GO enrichment")
}

# ========================================
# PART 6: Dot Plot Visualization of Top Genes [Less Ideal than FindMarker Version]
# ========================================

top_genes_chc <- avg_expr_df %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC > 0.5, CHC > 0.5) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs_log2FC)) %>%
  head(10) %>%
  pull(gene)
top_genes_thc <- avg_expr_df %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC < -0.5, THC > 0.5) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs_log2FC)) %>%
  head(10) %>%
  pull(gene)
top_genes <- unique(c(top_genes_chc, top_genes_thc))
log_message("Top CHC genes:", length(top_genes_chc))
log_message("Top THC genes:", length(top_genes_thc))
log_message("Total unique top genes:", length(top_genes))

if (length(top_genes_chc) > 0) {
  log_message("CHC-enriched genes:", paste(top_genes_chc, collapse = ", "))
}
if (length(top_genes_thc) > 0) {
  log_message("THC-enriched genes:", paste(top_genes_thc, collapse = ", "))
}

genes_in_object <- top_genes[top_genes %in% rownames(merged_data_all_7)]
if (length(genes_in_object) > 0) {
  log_message("Creating dot plot with", length(genes_in_object), "genes")
  p_dot_all <- create_dot_plot(merged_data_all_7, genes_in_object, "WellCellType",
                              "Top CHC/THC Genes (avg_log2FC) - All Cell Types")
  if (!is.null(p_dot_all)) print(p_dot_all)

  target_cell_types <- c("CHC", "THC", "CD45Immune", "EpcamTumor")
  available_cell_types <- intersect(target_cell_types, unique(merged_data_all_7$WellCellType))
  log_message("Available target cell types:", paste(available_cell_types, collapse = ", "))
  if (length(available_cell_types) >= 2) {
    p_dot_target <- create_dot_plot(merged_data_all_7, genes_in_object, "WellCellType",
                                   "Top CHC/THC DGE Genes (avg_log2FC) - Across Cell Types",
                                   cell.types = available_cell_types)
    if (!is.null(p_dot_target)) print(p_dot_target)
  } else {
    log_message("Not enough target cell types found for comparison plot")
  }
} else {
  log_message("Warning: None of the top genes found in the Seurat object")
}

# ========================================
# PART 7: Seurat FindMarkers Analysis
# ========================================

if ("RNA" %in% names(merged_data_all_7@assays) && length(Layers(merged_data_all_7[["RNA"]])) > 1) {
  log_message("Multiple layers detected. Joining layers...")
  merged_data_all_7[["RNA"]] <- JoinLayers(merged_data_all_7[["RNA"]])
  log_message("Layers joined successfully.")
}

Idents(merged_data_all_7) <- "WellCellType"
log_message("Available cell types:", paste(levels(Idents(merged_data_all_7)), collapse = ", "))
log_message("Running FindMarkers: CHC vs THC...")
chc_vs_thc_markers <- FindMarkers(
  merged_data_all_7, ident.1 = "CHC", ident.2 = "THC", test.use = "wilcox",
  logfc.threshold = 0.25, min.pct = 0.1, verbose = TRUE
) %>%
  mutate(gene = rownames(.)) %>%
  select(gene, everything()) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_log2FC))

log_message("Total DEGs found:", nrow(chc_vs_thc_markers))
log_message("Upregulated in CHC (p_adj < 0.05):", sum(chc_vs_thc_markers$avg_log2FC > 0 & chc_vs_thc_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05))
log_message("Upregulated in THC (p_adj < 0.05):", sum(chc_vs_thc_markers$avg_log2FC < 0 & chc_vs_thc_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05))

top_chc_markers <- chc_vs_thc_markers %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC > 0, p_val_adj < 0.05) %>%
  head(10)
top_thc_markers <- chc_vs_thc_markers %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC < 0, p_val_adj < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(avg_log2FC) %>%
  head(10)
log_message("\nTop 10 CHC-enriched genes:")
print(top_chc_markers[, c("gene", "avg_log2FC", "pct.1", "pct.2", "p_val_adj")])
log_message("\nTop 10 THC-enriched genes:")
print(top_thc_markers[, c("gene", "avg_log2FC", "pct.1", "pct.2", "p_val_adj")])

# ========================================
# PART 8: Visualization of FindMarkers Results
# ========================================

p_volcano <- ggplot(chc_vs_thc_markers, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, color = "gray") +
  geom_point(data = subset(chc_vs_thc_markers, p_val_adj < 0.05 & abs(avg_log2FC) > 0.5),
             aes(color = ifelse(avg_log2FC > 0, "CHC", "THC")), size = 1.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("CHC" = "red", "THC" = "blue"), name = "Enriched in") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
  custom_theme() +
  labs(title = "Volcano Plot: CHC vs THC",
       x = "Average Log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(Adjusted P-value)")
print(p_volcano)

top_genes_to_label <- rbind(
  chc_vs_thc_markers %>% filter(avg_log2FC > 0, p_val_adj < 0.05) %>% head(5),
  chc_vs_thc_markers %>% filter(avg_log2FC < 0, p_val_adj < 0.05) %>% arrange(avg_log2FC) %>% head(5)
)
p_volcano_labeled <- p_volcano +
  geom_text_repel(data = top_genes_to_label, aes(label = gene),
                  size = 3, box.padding = 0.3, max.overlaps = 20) +
  labs(title = "Volcano Plot: CHC vs THC (Top Genes Labeled)")
print(p_volcano_labeled)

top_degs <- c(top_chc_markers$gene, top_thc_markers$gene)
log_message("Creating dot plots with", length(top_degs), "top DEGs")
if (length(top_degs) > 0) {
  p_dot_chc_thc <- create_dot_plot(merged_data_all_7, top_degs, "WellCellType",
                                   "Top DEGs: CHC vs THC", cell.types = c("CHC", "THC"))
  if (!is.null(p_dot_chc_thc)) print(p_dot_chc_thc + theme(aspect.ratio = 2))

  p_dot_all_types <- create_dot_plot(merged_data_all_7, top_degs, "WellCellType",
                                    "Top CHC/THC DEGs - All Cell Types")
  if (!is.null(p_dot_all_types)) print(p_dot_all_types + theme(aspect.ratio = 2))

  if (length(available_cell_types) >= 2) {
    p_dot_selected <- create_dot_plot(merged_data_all_7, top_degs, "WellCellType",
                                     "CHC/THC DEGs - Key Cell Types", cell.types = available_cell_types)
    if (!is.null(p_dot_selected)) print(p_dot_selected + theme(aspect.ratio = 2))
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 9: Specific Gene List Visualization
# ========================================

specific_genes <- c("RUNX1", "THBS1", "SPI1", "GRN", "PF4", "LGALS3")
available_specific_genes <- specific_genes[specific_genes %in% rownames(merged_data_all_7)]
log_message("\n=== SPECIFIC GENE LIST ANALYSIS ===")
log_message("Available genes:", paste(available_specific_genes, collapse = ", "))
if (length(available_specific_genes) < length(specific_genes)) {
  log_message("Missing genes:", paste(setdiff(specific_genes, available_specific_genes), collapse = ", "))
}

if (length(available_specific_genes) > 0) {
  p_specific_all <- create_dot_plot(merged_data_all_7, available_specific_genes, "WellCellType",
                                   "Specific Genes of Interest - All Cell Types")
  if (!is.null(p_specific_all)) print(p_specific_all + theme(aspect.ratio = 3))

  if (length(available_cell_types) >= 2) {
    p_specific_target <- create_dot_plot(merged_data_all_7, available_specific_genes, "WellCellType",
                                        "Specific Genes: Hybrid vs Parental Cell Types",
                                        cell.types = available_cell_types)
    if (!is.null(p_specific_target)) print(p_specific_target)
  }

  specific_expr <- avg_expr_df %>% filter(gene %in% available_specific_genes)
  if (nrow(specific_expr) > 0) {
    log_message("\n=== SPECIFIC GENES EXPRESSION SUMMARY ===")
    for (i in 1:nrow(specific_expr)) {
      log_message(sprintf("%s: CHC=%.3f, THC=%.3f, log2FC=%.3f",
                         specific_expr$gene[i], specific_expr$CHC[i],
                         specific_expr$THC[i], specific_expr$avg_log2FC[i]))
    }
  }
} else {
  log_message("None of the specific genes found in the dataset")
}

# ========================================
# PART 10: Enhanced GSEA GO Analysis with Term Clustering
# ========================================

# Load required libraries
if (!require(GOSemSim)) {
  BiocManager::install("GOSemSim")
  library(GOSemSim)
}
if (!require(cluster)) {
  install.packages("cluster")
  library(cluster)
}
if (!require(ggridges)) {
  install.packages("ggridges")
  library(ggridges)
}

# Function to wrap long text for better display
wrap_text <- function(text, width = 40) {
  sapply(text, function(x) {
    if (nchar(x) <= width) return(x)
    # Split at word boundaries when possible
    words <- strsplit(x, " ")[[1]]
    lines <- character()
    current_line <- ""

    for (word in words) {
      if (nchar(paste(current_line, word)) <= width) {
        current_line <- if (current_line == "") word else paste(current_line, word)
      } else {
        if (current_line != "") lines <- c(lines, current_line)
        current_line <- word
      }
    }
    if (current_line != "") lines <- c(lines, current_line)
    paste(lines, collapse = "\n")
  }, USE.NAMES = FALSE)
}

# Function to cluster GO terms based on semantic similarity
cluster_go_terms <- function(go_result, ontology, similarity_cutoff = 0.7, max_clusters = 15) {
  if (nrow(go_result@result) < 2) {
    log_message("Too few terms for clustering")
    return(go_result)
  }

  tryCatch({
    # Load GO semantic similarity data
    log_message("Loading GO semantic data...")
    hsGO <- godata('org.Hs.eg.db', ont = ontology)

    # Get GO IDs and validate them
    go_ids <- go_result@result$ID
    log_message(sprintf("Starting with %d GO terms", length(go_ids)))

    # Remove any invalid GO IDs
    valid_go_ids <- go_ids[go_ids %in% keys(hsGO, keytype = "GOID")]
    if (length(valid_go_ids) < length(go_ids)) {
      log_message(sprintf("Removed %d invalid GO IDs, %d remain",
                         length(go_ids) - length(valid_go_ids), length(valid_go_ids)))
      go_ids <- valid_go_ids
    }

    if (length(go_ids) < 2) {
      log_message("Too few valid GO terms for clustering after validation")
      return(simplify(go_result, cutoff = similarity_cutoff, by = "p.adjust",
                     select_fun = min, measure = "Wang"))
    }

    # For large numbers of terms, sample a subset for initial clustering
    if (length(go_ids) > 200) {
      # Sort by p-value and take top terms
      sorted_results <- go_result@result[order(go_result@result$p.adjust), ]
      go_ids <- sorted_results$ID[1:200]
      go_ids <- go_ids[go_ids %in% valid_go_ids]
      log_message(sprintf("Using top %d terms for clustering due to size", length(go_ids)))
    }

    # Calculate semantic similarity matrix
    log_message(sprintf("Calculating semantic similarity for %d GO terms...", length(go_ids)))
    sim_matrix <- mgoSim(go_ids, go_ids, semData = hsGO, measure = "Wang", combine = "BMA")

    # Check if similarity matrix is valid
    if (any(is.na(sim_matrix)) || any(is.infinite(sim_matrix))) {
      log_message("Invalid similarity matrix detected, cleaning...")
      sim_matrix[is.na(sim_matrix)] <- 0
      sim_matrix[is.infinite(sim_matrix)] <- 0
    }

    # Ensure matrix is symmetric and has valid diagonal
    diag(sim_matrix) <- 1
    sim_matrix <- (sim_matrix + t(sim_matrix)) / 2

    # Convert similarity to distance, ensuring valid range
    dist_matrix <- as.dist(pmax(0, pmin(1, 1 - sim_matrix)))

    # Check if distance matrix has valid values for clustering
    if (length(dist_matrix) == 0 || all(dist_matrix == 0)) {
      log_message("Invalid distance matrix for clustering, using simplification instead")
      return(simplify(go_result, cutoff = similarity_cutoff, by = "p.adjust",
                     select_fun = min, measure = "Wang"))
    }

    # Perform hierarchical clustering
    log_message("Performing hierarchical clustering...")
    hc <- hclust(dist_matrix, method = "average")

    # Cut tree to get clusters
    clusters <- cutree(hc, h = 1 - similarity_cutoff)

    # Create cluster information
    cluster_info <- data.frame(
      GO_ID = go_ids,
      Description = go_result@result$Description[match(go_ids, go_result@result$ID)],
      Cluster = clusters,
      p.adjust = go_result@result$p.adjust[match(go_ids, go_result@result$ID)],
      NES = go_result@result$NES[match(go_ids, go_result@result$ID)],
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    # Select representative terms from each cluster
    cluster_reps <- c()
    for (cluster_id in unique(clusters)) {
      cluster_terms <- cluster_info[cluster_info$Cluster == cluster_id, ]
      if (nrow(cluster_terms) > 0) {
        rep_term <- cluster_terms[which.min(cluster_terms$p.adjust), "GO_ID"]
        cluster_reps <- c(cluster_reps, rep_term)
      }
    }

    log_message(sprintf("Clustered %d terms into %d clusters, selected %d representatives",
                       length(go_ids), length(unique(clusters)), length(cluster_reps)))

    # Filter results to representative terms
    filtered_result <- go_result
    filtered_result@result <- go_result@result[go_result@result$ID %in% cluster_reps, ]

    # Add cluster information
    if (nrow(filtered_result@result) > 0) {
      filtered_result@result$Cluster_Size <- sapply(filtered_result@result$ID, function(id) {
        cluster_id <- cluster_info[cluster_info$GO_ID == id, "Cluster"]
        if (length(cluster_id) > 0) {
          sum(cluster_info$Cluster == cluster_id[1])
        } else {
          1
        }
      })
    }

    return(list(
      clustered_result = filtered_result,
      cluster_info = cluster_info,
      similarity_matrix = sim_matrix
    ))

  }, error = function(e) {
    log_message(sprintf("Error in GO term clustering: %s", e$message))
    log_message("Falling back to original simplification method")
    return(simplify(go_result, cutoff = similarity_cutoff, by = "p.adjust",
                   select_fun = min, measure = "Wang"))
  })
}


# Enhanced visualization function with better text handling
create_enhanced_dotplot <- function(go_result, title, max_terms = 25, text_width = 35) {
  if (is.null(go_result) || nrow(go_result@result) == 0) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Get both positive and negative NES terms
  all_data <- go_result@result
  pos_terms <- all_data[all_data$NES > 0, ]
  neg_terms <- all_data[all_data$NES < 0, ]

  # Take top terms from each direction
  n_pos <- min(ceiling(max_terms/2), nrow(pos_terms))
  n_neg <- min(ceiling(max_terms/2), nrow(neg_terms))

  plot_data <- rbind(
    if(n_pos > 0) pos_terms[1:n_pos, ] else NULL,
    if(n_neg > 0) neg_terms[1:n_neg, ] else NULL
  )

  if (nrow(plot_data) == 0) return(NULL)

  plot_data$Description_wrapped <- wrap_text(plot_data$Description, text_width)

  # Add cluster size information if available
  if ("Cluster_Size" %in% colnames(plot_data)) {
    plot_data$Description_wrapped <- paste0(plot_data$Description_wrapped,
                                           " (n=", plot_data$Cluster_Size, ")")
  }

  # Add direction information
  plot_data$Direction <- ifelse(plot_data$NES > 0, "CHC Enriched", "THC Enriched")

  # Create dotplot with enhanced formatting
  p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = NES, y = reorder(Description_wrapped, NES))) +
    geom_point(aes(size = setSize, color = Direction), alpha = 0.8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("CHC Enriched" = "pink2", "THC Enriched" = "red3"),
                       name = "Enrichment Direction") +
    scale_size_continuous(name = "Gene Set Size", range = c(3, 8)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5, color = "grey50") +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
      y = "GO Terms (Clustered Representatives)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 1),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
      aspect.ratio = 2,
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey80", size = 0.3),
      panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "grey90", size = 0.1),
      plot.margin = margin(10, 60, 10, 120, "pt")  # Extra space for y-axis labels
    )

  return(p)
}

# Modified run_gsea function with enhanced clustering and visualization
run_gsea <- function(gene_list, ontology, title_prefix) {
  if (length(gene_list) < 100) {
    log_message(sprintf("Not enough genes for GSEA %s (need >= 100, have %d)", ontology, length(gene_list)))
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Run GSEA
  gsea_result <- tryCatch({
    gseGO(
      geneList = gene_list,
      OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
      ont = ontology,
      keyType = "ENTREZID",
      minGSSize = 15,
      maxGSSize = 500,
      pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
      pAdjustMethod = "BH",
      verbose = FALSE
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    log_message(sprintf("Error in GSEA %s: %s", ontology, e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })

  if (!is.null(gsea_result) && nrow(gsea_result@result) > 0) {
    log_message(sprintf("Found %d significant GO terms in GSEA %s before clustering",
                       nrow(gsea_result@result), ontology))

    # Apply semantic similarity-based clustering
    clustered_result <- cluster_go_terms(gsea_result, ontology,
                                        similarity_cutoff = 0.7, max_clusters = 15)

    # Handle different return types from clustering function
    if (is.list(clustered_result) && "clustered_result" %in% names(clustered_result)) {
      gsea_clustered <- clustered_result$clustered_result
      cluster_info <- clustered_result$cluster_info
      log_message(sprintf("After clustering, %d representative GO terms remain in GSEA %s",
                         nrow(gsea_clustered@result), ontology))
    } else {
      # Fallback to simplified result
      gsea_clustered <- clustered_result
      cluster_info <- NULL
      log_message(sprintf("Using simplified results: %d GO terms remain in GSEA %s",
                         nrow(gsea_clustered@result), ontology))
    }

    # Create enhanced dotplot
    p_dot <- create_enhanced_dotplot(
      gsea_clustered,
      sprintf("%s: Clustered GO %s Terms (CHC vs THC)", title_prefix, ontology),
      max_terms = 25,  # Increased from 15
      text_width = 40
    )

    if (!is.null(p_dot)) {
      print(p_dot)
    }

    # Create enrichment plots for top terms
    if (nrow(gsea_clustered@result) >= 3) {
      top_results <- gsea_clustered@result[1:min(3, nrow(gsea_clustered@result)), ]

      for (i in 1:nrow(top_results)) {
        # Wrap title text for enrichment plots too
        wrapped_title <- wrap_text(top_results$Description[i], 60)

        p_enrich <- gseaplot2(gsea_result, geneSetID = top_results$ID[i],
                             title = paste("GSEA:", wrapped_title),
                             pvalue_table = TRUE) +
          theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12))
        print(p_enrich)
      }
    }

    # Ridge plot using original clusterProfiler ridgeplot function
    if (nrow(gsea_clustered@result) >= 5) {
      # Create a temporary object with wrapped descriptions for ridge plot
      ridge_result <- gsea_clustered
      ridge_result@result$Description <- wrap_text(ridge_result@result$Description, 45)

      p_ridge <- ridgeplot(ridge_result, showCategory = min(20, nrow(ridge_result@result))) +
        scale_fill_gradient(low = "blue3", high = "red3", name = "NES") +
        labs(title = sprintf("GSEA Ridge Plot: Clustered GO %s Terms", ontology)) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(
          plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
          plot.margin = margin(10, 20, 10, 150, "pt")
        )

      print(p_ridge)
    }

    # Return comprehensive results
    return(list(
      original = gsea_result,
      clustered = gsea_clustered,
      cluster_info = cluster_info
    ))

  } else {
    log_message(sprintf("No significant GO terms found in GSEA %s", ontology))
    return(NULL)
  }
}

# ========================================
# MAIN GSEA EXECUTION
# ========================================

log_message("\n=== ENHANCED GSEA GO ANALYSIS ===")
if (nrow(avg_expr_df) > 0) {
  gene_list <- setNames(avg_expr_df$avg_log2FC, avg_expr_df$gene) %>% sort(decreasing = TRUE)
  log_message("Gene list prepared with", length(gene_list), "genes")
  log_message("Range of log2FC:", round(min(gene_list), 3), "to", round(max(gene_list), 3))

  converted_genes <- safe_bitr(names(gene_list))
  if (nrow(converted_genes) > 0) {
    gsea_df <- merge(converted_genes, data.frame(SYMBOL = names(gene_list), log2FC = gene_list),
                     by = "SYMBOL") %>%
      arrange(desc(log2FC))
    gsea_gene_list <- setNames(gsea_df$log2FC, gsea_df$ENTREZID)
    log_message("Successfully converted", length(gsea_gene_list), "genes for GSEA")

    # Run enhanced GSEA analysis
    gsea_bp <- run_gsea(gsea_gene_list, "BP", "GSEA")
    gsea_mf <- run_gsea(gsea_gene_list, "MF", "GSEA")

    # Save results with cluster information
    if (!is.null(gsea_bp) && !is.null(gsea_bp$original) && nrow(gsea_bp$original@result) > 0) {
      # Save original results
      save_results_to_csv(gsea_bp$original@result %>%
                          mutate(Enriched_in = ifelse(NES > 0, "CHC", "THC")),
                          "gsea_go_bp_results_original.csv", "GSEA GO BP original results")

      # Save clustered results
      clustered_results <- gsea_bp$clustered@result %>%
        mutate(Enriched_in = ifelse(NES > 0, "CHC", "THC"))
      save_results_to_csv(clustered_results,
                          "gsea_go_bp_results_clustered.csv", "GSEA GO BP clustered results")

      # Save cluster mapping if available
      if (!is.null(gsea_bp$cluster_info)) {
        save_results_to_csv(gsea_bp$cluster_info,
                            "gsea_go_bp_cluster_mapping.csv", "GSEA GO BP cluster mapping")
      }
    }

    if (!is.null(gsea_mf) && !is.null(gsea_mf$original) && nrow(gsea_mf$original@result) > 0) {
      # Save original results
      save_results_to_csv(gsea_mf$original@result %>%
                          mutate(Enriched_in = ifelse(NES > 0, "CHC", "THC")),
                          "gsea_go_mf_results_original.csv", "GSEA GO MF original results")

      # Save clustered results
      clustered_results <- gsea_mf$clustered@result %>%
        mutate(Enriched_in = ifelse(NES > 0, "CHC", "THC"))
      save_results_to_csv(clustered_results,
                          "gsea_go_mf_results_clustered.csv", "GSEA GO MF clustered results")

      # Save cluster mapping if available
      if (!is.null(gsea_mf$cluster_info)) {
        save_results_to_csv(gsea_mf$cluster_info,
                            "gsea_go_mf_cluster_mapping.csv", "GSEA GO MF cluster mapping")
      }
    }

    # Enhanced summary with clustering information
    if (exists("go_chc") && nrow(go_chc@result) > 0) {
      log_message("Standard GO (CHC-specific):", paste(head(go_chc@result$Description, 3), collapse = ", "))
    }
    if (exists("go_thc") && nrow(go_thc@result) > 0) {
      log_message("Standard GO (THC-specific):", paste(head(go_thc@result$Description, 3), collapse = ", "))
    }
    if (!is.null(gsea_bp) && nrow(gsea_bp$clustered@result) > 0) {
      log_message("GSEA GO BP (clustered representatives):",
                 paste(head(gsea_bp$clustered@result$Description, 3), collapse = ", "))
    }
    if (!is.null(gsea_mf) && nrow(gsea_mf$clustered@result) > 0) {
      log_message("GSEA GO MF (clustered representatives):",
                 paste(head(gsea_mf$clustered@result$Description, 3), collapse = ", "))
    }

  } else {
    log_message("No genes could be converted to Entrez IDs for GSEA")
  }
} else {
  log_message("Average expression data not available for GSEA")
}

# ========================================
# PART 11: Comparison with Original Average Expression Method
# ========================================

log_message("\n=== COMPARING FINDMARKERS vs AVERAGE EXPRESSION METHODS ===")
if (exists("avg_expr_df")) {
  comparison_df <- avg_expr_df %>%
    mutate(
      original_chc_enriched = avg_log2FC > 0.5 & CHC > 0.5,
      original_thc_enriched = avg_log2FC < -0.5 & THC > 0.5,
      original_significant = original_chc_enriched | original_thc_enriched
    ) %>%
    select(gene, avg_log2FC, CHC, THC, original_significant, original_chc_enriched, original_thc_enriched) %>%
    inner_join(chc_vs_thc_markers %>% select(gene, avg_log2FC, p_val_adj, pct.1, pct.2),
               by = "gene", suffix = c("_original", "_findmarkers")) %>%
    mutate(
      findmarkers_significant = p_val_adj < 0.05,
      findmarkers_chc_enriched = avg_log2FC_findmarkers > 0 & p_val_adj < 0.05,
      findmarkers_thc_enriched = avg_log2FC_findmarkers < 0 & p_val_adj < 0.05
    )

  fc_correlation <- cor(comparison_df$avg_log2FC_original, comparison_df$avg_log2FC_findmarkers, use = "complete.obs")
  log_message("Genes in comparison:", nrow(comparison_df))
  log_message("Correlation between fold changes:", round(fc_correlation, 3))

  both_significant <- sum(comparison_df$original_significant & comparison_df$findmarkers_significant)
  only_original <- sum(comparison_df$original_significant & !comparison_df$findmarkers_significant)
  only_findmarkers <- sum(!comparison_df$original_significant & comparison_df$findmarkers_significant)
  log_message("Original method - significant genes:", sum(comparison_df$original_significant))
  log_message("FindMarkers method - significant genes:", sum(comparison_df$findmarkers_significant))
  log_message("Genes significant in both methods:", both_significant)
  log_message("Genes only significant in original method:", only_original)
  log_message("Genes only significant in FindMarkers:", only_findmarkers)

  p_correlation <- ggplot(comparison_df, aes(x = avg_log2FC_original, y = avg_log2FC_findmarkers)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, color = "gray") +
    geom_point(data = subset(comparison_df, original_significant | findmarkers_significant),
               aes(color = case_when(
                 original_significant & findmarkers_significant ~ "Both Methods",
                 original_significant & !findmarkers_significant ~ "Original Only",
                 !original_significant & findmarkers_significant ~ "FindMarkers Only"
               )), size = 1.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Both Methods" = "purple", "Original Only" = "orange", "FindMarkers Only" = "green"),
                       name = "Significant in") +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    custom_theme() +
    labs(title = sprintf("Fold Change Comparison (r = %.3f)", fc_correlation),
         x = "Log2FC - Original Method", y = "Log2FC - FindMarkers Method") +
    coord_fixed()
  print(p_correlation)

  overlap_data <- data.frame(
    Category = c("Original Only", "Both Methods", "FindMarkers Only"),
    Count = c(only_original, both_significant, only_findmarkers)
  )
  p_overlap <- ggplot(overlap_data, aes(x = Category, y = Count, fill = Category)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Original Only" = "orange", "Both Methods" = "purple", "FindMarkers Only" = "green")) +
    custom_theme() +
    labs(title = "Significant Gene Overlap Between Methods", x = "Method Comparison", y = "Number of Genes") +
    geom_text(aes(label = Count), vjust = -0.3, size = 4) +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
  print(p_overlap)

  discordant_genes <- comparison_df %>%
    filter((original_significant & !findmarkers_significant) | (!original_significant & findmarkers_significant)) %>%
    mutate(discordant_type = case_when(
      original_significant & !findmarkers_significant ~ "Original_only",
      !original_significant & findmarkers_significant ~ "FindMarkers_only"
    )) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs(avg_log2FC_findmarkers)))
  if (nrow(discordant_genes) > 0) {
    log_message("\nTop 10 discordant genes:")
    print(head(discordant_genes[, c("gene", "avg_log2FC_original", "avg_log2FC_findmarkers", "p_val_adj", "discordant_type")], 10))
    save_results_to_csv(discordant_genes, "method_comparison_discordant_genes.csv", "Discordant genes")
  }

  p_expr_comparison <- ggplot(comparison_df, aes(x = (CHC + THC)/2, y = -log10(p_val_adj))) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, aes(color = original_significant)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "gray", "TRUE" = "red"), name = "Original\nSignificant") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
    custom_theme() +
    labs(title = "Expression Level vs Statistical Significance",
         x = "Average Expression Level (Original Method)", y = "-log10(Adjusted P-value) from FindMarkers")
  print(p_expr_comparison)

  save_results_to_csv(comparison_df, "method_comparison_full_results.csv", "Method comparison full results")
}

# ========================================
# PART 12: Save Results
# ========================================

save_results_to_csv(chc_vs_thc_markers, "CHC_vs_THC_FindMarkers_all_genes.csv", "Full DEG results")
save_results_to_csv(chc_vs_thc_markers %>% filter(p_val_adj < 0.05), "CHC_vs_THC_significant_DEGs.csv", "Significant DEGs")
save_results_to_csv(top_chc_markers, "top_CHC_enriched_genes.csv", "Top CHC markers")
save_results_to_csv(top_thc_markers, "top_THC_enriched_genes.csv", "Top THC markers")
writeLines(top_chc_genes, file.path("results", "top_CHC_gene_list.txt"))
writeLines(top_thc_genes, file.path("results", "top_THC_gene_list.txt"))

if (nrow(chc_specific) > 0) {
  chc_dge <- chc_specific %>%
    mutate(
      fold_change_linear = 2^abs_log2FC,
      chc_enrichment_score = CHC / (THC + 0.01),
      significance = case_when(
        CHC > 2 & abs_log2FC > 2 ~ "Very High",
        CHC > 1 & abs_log2FC > 1 ~ "High",
        CHC > 0.5 ~ "Moderate",
        TRUE ~ "Low"
      )
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(CHC))
  save_results_to_csv(chc_dge, "dge_chc_specific_genes.csv", "CHC-specific genes")
}

if (nrow(thc_specific) > 0) {
  thc_dge <- thc_specific %>%
    mutate(
      fold_change_linear = 2^abs_log2FC,
      thc_enrichment_score = THC / (CHC + 0.01),
      significance = case_when(
        THC > 2 & abs_log2FC > 2 ~ "Very High",
        THC > 1 & abs_log2FC > 1 ~ "High",
        THC > 0.5 ~ "Moderate",
        TRUE ~ "Low"
      )
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(THC))
  save_results_to_csv(thc_dge, "dge_thc_specific_genes.csv", "THC-specific genes")
}

if (length(top_genes) > 0) {
  top_genes_detailed <- avg_expr_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% top_genes) %>%
    mutate(
      rank_by_abs_log2FC = rank(-abs_log2FC),
      enriched_in = ifelse(avg_log2FC > 0, "CHC", "THC"),
      in_specific_list = gene %in% specific_genes
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs_log2FC))
  save_results_to_csv(top_genes_detailed, "dge_top_genes_for_visualization.csv", "Top genes for visualization")
}

if (length(specific_genes) > 0) {
  specific_genes_data <- avg_expr_df %>%
    filter(gene %in% specific_genes) %>%
    mutate(gene_category = "Specific_Interest", available_in_dataset = TRUE)

  missing_genes <- setdiff(specific_genes, specific_genes_data$gene)
  if (length(missing_genes) > 0) {
    missing_df <- data.frame(
      gene = missing_genes,
      gene_category = "Specific_Interest",
      available_in_dataset = FALSE,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    # Ensure missing_df has the same columns as specific_genes_data
    missing_df <- missing_df %>%
      mutate(
        CHC = NA, THC = NA, avg_log2FC = NA, abs_log2FC = NA, expr_diff = NA,
        log_CHC = NA, log_THC = NA
      )
    specific_genes_complete <- bind_rows(specific_genes_data, missing_df)
  } else {
    specific_genes_complete <- specific_genes_data
  }

  specific_genes_complete <- specific_genes_complete %>%
    arrange(available_in_dataset, desc(abs_log2FC), na.last = TRUE)
  save_results_to_csv(specific_genes_complete, "specific_genes_analysis.csv", "Specific genes analysis")
  log_message("Specific genes analysis saved with", sum(specific_genes_complete$available_in_dataset, na.rm = TRUE),
              "available genes out of", length(specific_genes))
}

summary_report <- data.frame(
  Analysis_Component = c("Total_Genes_Analyzed", "CHC_THC_Correlation", "Genes_High_Both",
                         "Genes_Low_Both", "CHC_Specific_Genes", "THC_Specific_Genes",
                         "Top_Genes_Selected", "GSEA_Pathways_Found", "Specific_Genes_Available"),
  Value = c(
    nrow(avg_expr_df), round(correlation, 3), nrow(high_in_both), nrow(low_in_both),
    nrow(chc_specific), nrow(thc_specific), length(top_genes),
    if (exists("gsea_bp") && !is.null(gsea_bp)) nrow(gsea_bp@result) else 0,
    length(available_specific_genes)
  ),
  Description = c(
    "Total number of genes in comparative analysis",
    "Pearson correlation between CHC and THC average expression",
    "Genes with high expression in both cell types",
    "Genes with low expression in both cell types",
    "Genes specifically enriched in CHC cells",
    "Genes specifically enriched in THC cells",
    "Top genes selected for visualization",
    "Significant GSEA GO pathways identified",
    "Specific genes of interest found in dataset"
  )
)
save_results_to_csv(summary_report, "analysis_summary_report.csv", "Analysis summary report")

# ========================================
# PART 13: Print File Summary
# ========================================

log_message("\n=== FILES CREATED IN 'results/' DIRECTORY ===")
result_files <- list.files("results", pattern = "*.csv", full.names = FALSE)
if (length(result_files) > 0) {
  for (i in seq_along(result_files)) {
    file_size <- file.info(file.path("results", result_files[i]))$size
    log_message(sprintf("%d. %s (%.1f KB)", i, result_files[i], file_size/1024))
  }
} else {
  log_message("No CSV files found in results directory")
}

log_message("\n=== ANALYSIS SUMMARY ===")
log_message("Total genes analyzed:", nrow(avg_expr_df))
log_message("CHC vs THC correlation:", round(correlation, 3))
log_message("High in both cell types:", nrow(high_in_both))
log_message("Low in both cell types:", nrow(low_in_both))
log_message("CHC-specific genes:", nrow(chc_specific))
log_message("THC-specific genes:", nrow(thc_specific))
log_message("Top genes for visualization:", length(top_genes))
log_message("\n=== ANALYSIS COMPLETE ===")
```

```{r}
merged_data_all_7 <- readRDS("/Users/queitsch/Documents/AdeyLab/1_Hybrid_Fusion/SmartSeq_CRC177_DeepSeq/merged_seurat_hmm_with_0725_combined_modules.rds")
```

# CHC Refined vs All
```{r}
# Custom logging function
log_message <- function(...) {
  cat(sprintf("[%s] %s\n", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), paste(...)))
}

# Custom theme for plots
custom_theme <- function() {
  theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, color = "black", angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
      axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.00001, "cm"),
      axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.00001, "mm"),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      panel.spacing = unit(0.001, "mm"),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2, "mm"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 2)),
      axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 2)),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
      legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
      legend.box.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)
    )
}
# Define updated custom colors with CHC subgroups
custom_colors_refined <- c(
  "THC" = "red3",
  "CHC1" = rgb(236/255, 164/255, 0/255),
  "CHC2" = rgb(40/255, 0/255, 3/255),
  "CHC3" = rgb(30/255, 145/255, 214/255),
  "EpcamTumor" = "gray45",
  "CD45Immune" = "cadetblue3"
)
# Function to create dot plots
create_dot_plot <- function(object, features, group.by, title, dot.scale = 10, cell.types = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(cell.types)) {
    cells <- WhichCells(object, expression = RefinedCellType %in% cell.types)
    object <- subset(object, cells = cells)
  }
  if (length(features) == 0) {
    log_message("No features available for dot plot")
    return(NULL)
  }
  DotPlot(
    object,
    features = features,
    group.by = group.by,
    dot.scale = dot.scale
  ) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Avg\nExpression") +
    custom_theme() +
    labs(title = title, x = "Genes", y = "Cell Type") +
    coord_flip() +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 2)
}

# Function to save results to CSV
save_results_to_csv <- function(data, filename, description) {
  output_dir <- "results"
  if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
    dir.create(output_dir)
    log_message("Created 'results' directory")
  }
  filepath <- file.path(output_dir, filename)
  write.csv(data, filepath, row.names = FALSE)
  log_message(sprintf("%s saved to %s", description, filepath))
}

# Function to safely convert gene symbols to Entrez IDs
safe_bitr <- function(genes, fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID") {
  if (length(genes) == 0) {
    log_message("No genes provided for conversion")
    return(data.frame(SYMBOL = character(0), ENTREZID = character(0)))
  }
  result <- tryCatch({
    bitr(genes, fromType = fromType, toType = toType, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db)
  }, error = function(e) {
    log_message("Error in gene ID conversion:", e$message)
    return(data.frame(SYMBOL = character(0), ENTREZID = character(0)))
  })
  return(result)
}

# Function to run GSEA
run_gsea <- function(gene_list, ontology, title_prefix) {
  if (length(gene_list) < 100) {
    log_message(sprintf("Not enough genes for GSEA %s (need >= 100, have %d)", ontology, length(gene_list)))
    return(NULL)
  }
  gsea_result <- tryCatch({
    gseGO(
      geneList = gene_list,
      OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
      ont = ontology,
      keyType = "ENTREZID",
      minGSSize = 15,
      maxGSSize = 500,
      pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
      pAdjustMethod = "BH",
      verbose = FALSE
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    log_message(sprintf("Error in GSEA %s: %s", ontology, e$message))
    return(NULL)
  })
  if (!is.null(gsea_result) && nrow(gsea_result@result) > 0) {
    log_message(sprintf("Found %d significant GO terms in GSEA %s", nrow(gsea_result@result), ontology))
    p_dot <- dotplot(gsea_result, showCategory = min(15, nrow(gsea_result@result)),
                     title = sprintf("%s: GO %s", title_prefix, ontology)) +
      scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Adj. P-value") +
      custom_theme()
    print(p_dot)
    if (nrow(gsea_result@result) >= 10) {
      top_results <- gsea_result@result[1:min(6, nrow(gsea_result@result)), ]
      for (i in 1:min(3, nrow(top_results))) {
        p_enrich <- gseaplot2(gsea_result, geneSetID = top_results$ID[i],
                              title = paste("GSEA:", top_results$Description[i]),
                              pvalue_table = TRUE)
        print(p_enrich)
      }
      p_ridge <- ridgeplot(gsea_result, showCategory = 20) +
        scale_fill_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Adj. P-value") +
        labs(title = sprintf("%s: GO %s Ridge Plot", title_prefix, ontology)) +
        custom_theme()
      print(p_ridge)
    }
    return(gsea_result)
  } else {
    log_message(sprintf("No significant GO terms found in GSEA %s", ontology))
    return(NULL)
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 1: Cell Subsetting and Average Expression
# ========================================

# Check if RefinedCellType exists
if (!"RefinedCellType" %in% colnames(merged_data_all_7@meta.data)) {
  stop("RefinedCellType column not found in metadata.")
}

# Define cell types
cell_types <- c("CHC1", "CHC2", "CHC3", "THC", "CD45Immune", "EpcamTumor")
available_cell_types <- intersect(cell_types, unique(merged_data_all_7$RefinedCellType))
log_message("Available cell types:", paste(available_cell_types, collapse = ", "))

# Subset cells
cell_subsets <- lapply(available_cell_types, function(ct) {
  cells <- WhichCells(merged_data_all_7, expression = RefinedCellType == ct)
  log_message(sprintf("%s cells found: %d", ct, length(cells)))
  if (length(cells) == 0) {
    log_message(sprintf("Warning: No cells found for %s", ct))
    return(NULL)
  }
  subset(merged_data_all_7, cells = cells)
})
names(cell_subsets) <- available_cell_types

# Remove NULL subsets
cell_subsets <- cell_subsets[!sapply(cell_subsets, is.null)]

# Check if we have enough cell types
if (length(cell_subsets) < 2) {
  stop("Not enough cell types found for analysis.")
}

# FIXED: Calculate average expression for each cell type using AggregateExpression (Seurat v5)
avg_expressions <- lapply(names(cell_subsets), function(ct) {
  # Ensure the subset has the correct Idents set to RefinedCellType
  Idents(cell_subsets[[ct]]) <- "RefinedCellType"

  # Fixed AggregateExpression call for Seurat v5
  avg <- AggregateExpression(
    cell_subsets[[ct]],
    assays = "RNA",
    group.by = "RefinedCellType",
    return.seurat = FALSE
  )$RNA

  log_message(sprintf("%s_avg dimensions: %s", ct, paste(dim(avg), collapse = " x ")))
  log_message(sprintf("%s_avg column names: %s", ct, paste(colnames(avg), collapse = ", ")))

  # Fix: Use the first (and likely only) column instead of assuming column name
  result <- data.frame(gene = rownames(avg), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  result[[ct]] <- avg[, 1]  # Use first column instead of avg[, ct]
  return(result)
})

# Merge average expression data
avg_expr_df <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "gene", all = TRUE), avg_expressions)
avg_expr_df <- avg_expr_df[complete.cases(avg_expr_df), ]
log_message("Merged expression data frame dimensions:", paste(dim(avg_expr_df), collapse = " x "))

# Calculate log2FC and other metrics for CHC subgroups vs others
comparisons <- list(
  CHC1_vs_CHC2 = c("CHC1", "CHC2"),
  CHC1_vs_CHC3 = c("CHC1", "CHC3"),
  CHC2_vs_CHC3 = c("CHC2", "CHC3"),
  CHC1_vs_THC = c("CHC1", "THC"),
  CHC2_vs_THC = c("CHC2", "THC"),
  CHC3_vs_THC = c("CHC3", "THC"),
  CHC1_vs_CD45Immune = c("CHC1", "CD45Immune"),
  CHC2_vs_CD45Immune = c("CHC2", "CD45Immune"),
  CHC3_vs_CD45Immune = c("CHC3", "CD45Immune"),
  CHC1_vs_EpcamTumor = c("CHC1", "EpcamTumor"),
  CHC2_vs_EpcamTumor = c("CHC2", "EpcamTumor"),
  CHC3_vs_EpcamTumor = c("CHC3", "EpcamTumor")
)

# Filter comparisons to available cell types
comparisons <- comparisons[sapply(comparisons, function(x) all(x %in% names(cell_subsets)))]

# Calculate metrics for each comparison
comparison_results <- lapply(names(comparisons), function(comp) {
  ct1 <- comparisons[[comp]][1]
  ct2 <- comparisons[[comp]][2]
  df <- avg_expr_df %>%
    mutate(
      !!paste0("log_", ct1) := log1p(.data[[ct1]]),
      !!paste0("log_", ct2) := log1p(.data[[ct2]]),
      !!paste0("avg_log2FC_", comp) := log2((.data[[ct1]] + 0.01) / (.data[[ct2]] + 0.01)),
      !!paste0("abs_log2FC_", comp) := abs(.data[[paste0("avg_log2FC_", comp)]]),
      !!paste0("expr_diff_", comp) := abs(.data[[ct1]] - .data[[ct2]])
    )
  corr <- cor(df[[ct1]], df[[ct2]], method = "pearson")
  log_message(sprintf("Correlation %s vs %s: %.3f", ct1, ct2, corr))
  list(data = df, correlation = corr)
})
names(comparison_results) <- names(comparisons)

# Save merged expression data
save_results_to_csv(avg_expr_df, "average_expression_all_cell_types.csv", "Average expression for all cell types")

# ===============================================
# PART 2: Gene Expression Similarity Visualization
# ===============================================

genes_to_annotate <- c("RUNX1", "SPI1", "GRN", "PF4", "LGALS3")
genes_present <- genes_to_annotate[genes_to_annotate %in% avg_expr_df$gene]
if (length(genes_present) < length(genes_to_annotate)) {
  log_message("Warning: Genes not found:", paste(setdiff(genes_to_annotate, genes_present), collapse = ", "))
}

for (comp in names(comparisons)) {
  ct1 <- comparisons[[comp]][1]
  ct2 <- comparisons[[comp]][2]
  df <- comparison_results[[comp]]$data
  df$label <- ifelse(df$gene %in% genes_present, df$gene, NA)

  p <- ggplot(df, aes_string(x = paste0("log_", ct1), y = paste0("log_", ct2))) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "gray") +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    geom_point(data = subset(df, !is.na(label)), color = "red", size = 2) +
    geom_text_repel(data = subset(df, !is.na(label)), aes(label = label),
                    size = 4, box.padding = 0.5, max.overlaps = Inf) +
    custom_theme() +
    labs(title = sprintf("Gene Expression Similarity: %s vs %s", ct1, ct2),
         x = sprintf("log1p Avg Expression in %s", ct1),
         y = sprintf("log1p Avg Expression in %s", ct2)) +
    coord_fixed()
  print(p)
}

# ========================================
# PART 3: Counting Co-expressed Genes
# ========================================

high_threshold <- 1
low_threshold <- 0.1
coexpression_results <- lapply(names(comparisons), function(comp) {
  ct1 <- comparisons[[comp]][1]
  ct2 <- comparisons[[comp]][2]
  df <- comparison_results[[comp]]$data
  high_in_both <- df %>% filter(.data[[ct1]] > high_threshold, .data[[ct2]] > high_threshold)
  low_in_both <- df %>% filter(.data[[ct1]] < low_threshold, .data[[ct2]] < low_threshold)
  similar_expr <- df %>% filter(abs(.data[[ct1]] - .data[[ct2]]) < 0.1)
  log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Genes high in both: %d", ct1, ct2, nrow(high_in_both)))
  log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Genes low in both: %d", ct1, ct2, nrow(low_in_both)))
  log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Genes with similar expression: %d", ct1, ct2, nrow(similar_expr)))
  list(high = high_in_both, low = low_in_both, similar = similar_expr)
})
names(coexpression_results) <- names(comparisons)

# ========================================
# PART 4: GO Enrichment Analysis
# ========================================

# Initialize the list first
go_enrichments <- list()

for (comp in names(comparisons)) {
  tryCatch({
    ct1 <- comparisons[[comp]][1]
    ct2 <- comparisons[[comp]][2]
    df <- comparison_results[[comp]]$data
    high_in_both <- coexpression_results[[comp]]$high
    low_in_both <- coexpression_results[[comp]]$low

    high_entrez <- safe_bitr(high_in_both$gene)
    low_entrez <- safe_bitr(low_in_both$gene)
    log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - High genes converted: %d out of %d", ct1, ct2, nrow(high_entrez), nrow(high_in_both)))
    log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Low genes converted: %d out of %d", ct1, ct2, nrow(low_entrez), nrow(low_in_both)))

    results <- list()

    # Process high expression genes
    if (nrow(high_entrez) > 5) {
      go_high <- enrichGO(
        gene = high_entrez$ENTREZID,
        OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
        ont = "BP",
        pAdjustMethod = "BH",
        pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
        qvalueCutoff = 0.1,
        readable = TRUE
      )

      if (nrow(go_high@result) > 0) {
        # Safely create plots with error handling
        tryCatch({
          p1 <- barplot(go_high, showCategory = 15, title = sprintf("GO Terms: High in %s & %s", ct1, ct2))
          print(p1)
        }, error = function(e) {
          log_message(sprintf("Error creating barplot for high genes in %s vs %s: %s", ct1, ct2, e$message))
        })

        tryCatch({
          p2 <- dotplot(go_high, showCategory = 15) +
                custom_theme() +
                ggtitle(sprintf("GO: Highly Expressed in %s & %s", ct1, ct2))
          print(p2)
        }, error = function(e) {
          log_message(sprintf("Error creating dotplot for high genes in %s vs %s: %s", ct1, ct2, e$message))
        })

        results$high <- go_high
      } else {
        log_message(sprintf("No significant GO terms found for highly expressed genes in %s vs %s", ct1, ct2))
      }
    } else {
      log_message(sprintf("Not enough genes for GO analysis (high) in %s vs %s: %d genes", ct1, ct2, nrow(high_entrez)))
    }

    # Process low expression genes
    if (nrow(low_entrez) > 5) {
      go_low <- enrichGO(
        gene = low_entrez$ENTREZID,
        OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
        ont = "BP",
        pAdjustMethod = "BH",
        pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
        qvalueCutoff = 0.1,
        readable = TRUE
      )

      if (nrow(go_low@result) > 0) {
        # Safely create plots with error handling
        tryCatch({
          p3 <- barplot(go_low, showCategory = 15, title = sprintf("GO Terms: Low in %s & %s", ct1, ct2))
          print(p3)
        }, error = function(e) {
          log_message(sprintf("Error creating barplot for low genes in %s vs %s: %s", ct1, ct2, e$message))
        })

        tryCatch({
          p4 <- dotplot(go_low, showCategory = 15) +
                custom_theme() +
                ggtitle(sprintf("GO: Lowly Expressed in %s & %s", ct1, ct2))
          print(p4)
        }, error = function(e) {
          log_message(sprintf("Error creating dotplot for low genes in %s vs %s: %s", ct1, ct2, e$message))
        })

        results$low <- go_low
      } else {
        log_message(sprintf("No significant GO terms found for lowly expressed genes in %s vs %s", ct1, ct2))
      }
    } else {
      log_message(sprintf("Not enough genes for GO analysis (low) in %s vs %s: %d genes", ct1, ct2, nrow(low_entrez)))
    }

    go_enrichments[[comp]] <- results

  }, error = function(e) {
    log_message(sprintf("Error processing GO enrichment for %s: %s", comp, e$message))
    go_enrichments[[comp]] <- list()
  })
}

log_message(sprintf("GO enrichment analysis completed for %d comparisons", length(go_enrichments)))

# ========================================
# PART 5: Cell Type Specific Analysis
# ========================================

specific_genes_results <- list()

for (ct in available_cell_types) {
  tryCatch({
    others <- setdiff(available_cell_types, ct)
    specific_genes_list <- list()

    for (other in others) {
      # Try different possible naming conventions
      possible_names <- c(
        paste0(ct, "_vs_", other),
        paste0(other, "_vs_", ct),
        paste(ct, "vs", other, sep = "_"),
        paste(other, "vs", ct, sep = "_")
      )

      comp <- NULL
      for (name in possible_names) {
        if (name %in% names(comparison_results)) {
          comp <- name
          break
        }
      }

      if (!is.null(comp)) {
        df <- comparison_results[[comp]]$data

        # Check which columns actually exist in the data
        if (ct %in% colnames(df) && other %in% colnames(df)) {
          specific <- df %>% filter(.data[[ct]] > 1, .data[[other]] < 0.1)
          if (nrow(specific) > 0) {
            specific_genes_list[[other]] <- specific
          }
        } else {
          log_message(sprintf("Warning: Columns %s or %s not found in comparison %s", ct, other, comp))
          log_message(sprintf("Available columns: %s", paste(colnames(df), collapse = ", ")))
        }
      } else {
        log_message(sprintf("No comparison found for %s vs %s", ct, other))
      }
    }

    # Combine all specific genes for this cell type
    if (length(specific_genes_list) > 0) {
      specific_genes <- do.call(rbind, specific_genes_list)
      specific_genes <- specific_genes %>% distinct(gene, .keep_all = TRUE)
      log_message(sprintf("%s-specific genes: %d", ct, nrow(specific_genes)))

      # GO enrichment analysis
      if (nrow(specific_genes) > 0) {
        entrez <- safe_bitr(specific_genes$gene)
        log_message(sprintf("%s genes converted: %d", ct, nrow(entrez)))

        if (nrow(entrez) > 5) {
          go <- enrichGO(
            gene = entrez$ENTREZID,
            OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
            ont = "BP",
            pAdjustMethod = "BH",
            pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
            readable = TRUE
          )

          if (nrow(go@result) > 0) {
            tryCatch({
              df_go <- head(go@result, 10)
              df_go$Description <- str_wrap(df_go$Description, width = 30)
              p <- ggplot(df_go, aes(x = reorder(Description, Count), y = Count, size = Count, color = p.adjust)) +
                geom_point() +
                coord_flip() +
                scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Adj. P-value") +
                custom_theme() +
                labs(title = sprintf("GO Terms - %s Specific", ct), x = NULL, y = "Gene Count") +
                theme(aspect.ratio = 2)
              print(p)
            }, error = function(e) {
              log_message(sprintf("Error creating plot for %s: %s", ct, e$message))
            })

            specific_genes_results[[ct]] <- list(genes = specific_genes, go = go)
          } else {
            log_message(sprintf("No significant GO terms found for %s-specific genes", ct))
            specific_genes_results[[ct]] <- list(genes = specific_genes, go = NULL)
          }
        } else {
          log_message(sprintf("Not enough %s-specific genes for GO enrichment (%d genes)", ct, nrow(entrez)))
          specific_genes_results[[ct]] <- list(genes = specific_genes, go = NULL)
        }
      } else {
        log_message(sprintf("No %s-specific genes found after filtering", ct))
        specific_genes_results[[ct]] <- list(genes = NULL, go = NULL)
      }
    } else {
      log_message(sprintf("No %s-specific genes found", ct))
      specific_genes_results[[ct]] <- list(genes = NULL, go = NULL)
    }

  }, error = function(e) {
    log_message(sprintf("Error processing %s-specific analysis: %s", ct, e$message))
    specific_genes_results[[ct]] <- list(genes = NULL, go = NULL)
  })
}

log_message(sprintf("Cell type specific analysis completed for %d cell types", length(specific_genes_results)))

# ========================================
# PART 6: Dot Plot Visualization of Top Genes 
#[250730]
# ========================================

top_genes_list <- lapply(names(comparisons), function(comp) {
  ct1 <- comparisons[[comp]][1]
  ct2 <- comparisons[[comp]][2]
  df <- comparison_results[[comp]]$data
  top_ct1 <- df %>%
    filter(.data[[paste0("avg_log2FC_", comp)]] > 0.5, .data[[ct1]] > 0.5) %>%
    arrange(desc(.data[[paste0("abs_log2FC_", comp)]])) %>%
    head(10) %>%
    pull(gene)
  top_ct2 <- df %>%
    filter(.data[[paste0("avg_log2FC_", comp)]] < -0.5, .data[[ct2]] > 0.5) %>%
    arrange(desc(.data[[paste0("abs_log2FC_", comp)]])) %>%
    head(10) %>%
    pull(gene)
  top_genes <- unique(c(top_ct1, top_ct2))
  log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Top %s genes: %d", ct1, ct2, ct1, length(top_ct1)))
  log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Top %s genes: %d", ct1, ct2, ct2, length(top_ct2)))
  log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Total unique top genes: %d", ct1, ct2, length(top_genes)))
  if (length(top_ct1) > 0) {
    log_message(sprintf("%s-enriched genes: %s", ct1, paste(top_ct1, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  if (length(top_ct2) > 0) {
    log_message(sprintf("%s-enriched genes: %s", ct2, paste(top_ct2, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  top_genes
})
names(top_genes_list) <- names(comparisons)

# Create dot plots
for (comp in names(comparisons)) {
  top_genes <- top_genes_list[[comp]]
  genes_in_object <- top_genes[top_genes %in% rownames(merged_data_all_7)]
  if (length(genes_in_object) > 0) {
    log_message(sprintf("%s - Creating dot plot with %d genes", comp, length(genes_in_object)))
    p_dot_all <- create_dot_plot(merged_data_all_7, genes_in_object, "RefinedCellType",
                                sprintf("Top Genes: %s (avg_log2FC)", comp))
    if (!is.null(p_dot_all)) print(p_dot_all)

    target_cell_types <- comparisons[[comp]]
    p_dot_target <- create_dot_plot(merged_data_all_7, genes_in_object, "RefinedCellType",
                                   sprintf("Top DGE Genes: %s", comp),
                                   cell.types = target_cell_types)
    if (!is.null(p_dot_target)) print(p_dot_target)
  } else {
    log_message(sprintf("Warning: None of the top genes found in the Seurat object for %s", comp))
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 7: Seurat FindMarkers Analysis
# ========================================

# FIXED: Proper layer handling for Seurat v5
if ("RNA" %in% names(merged_data_all_7@assays)) {
  # Check if layers need to be joined
  rna_layers <- Layers(merged_data_all_7[["RNA"]])
  log_message("RNA layers detected:", paste(rna_layers, collapse = ", "))

  if (length(rna_layers) > 1) {
    log_message("Multiple layers detected. Joining layers...")
    merged_data_all_7[["RNA"]] <- JoinLayers(merged_data_all_7[["RNA"]])
    log_message("Layers joined successfully.")
  }
}

Idents(merged_data_all_7) <- "RefinedCellType"
log_message("Available cell types:", paste(levels(Idents(merged_data_all_7)), collapse = ", "))

find_markers_results <- lapply(names(comparisons), function(comp) {
  ct1 <- comparisons[[comp]][1]
  ct2 <- comparisons[[comp]][2]
  log_message(sprintf("Running FindMarkers: %s vs %s...", ct1, ct2))

  # FIXED: FindMarkers for Seurat v5
  markers <- FindMarkers(
    merged_data_all_7,
    ident.1 = ct1,
    ident.2 = ct2,
    test.use = "wilcox",
    logfc.threshold = 0.25,
    min.pct = 0.1,
    verbose = TRUE
  ) %>%
    mutate(gene = rownames(.)) %>%
    select(gene, everything()) %>%
    arrange(desc(avg_log2FC))

  log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Total DEGs found: %d", ct1, ct2, nrow(markers)))
  log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Upregulated in %s (p_adj < 0.05): %d", ct1, ct2, ct1,
                     sum(markers$avg_log2FC > 0 & markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)))
  log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Upregulated in %s (p_adj < 0.05): %d", ct1, ct2, ct2,
                     sum(markers$avg_log2FC < 0 & markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)))
  markers
})
names(find_markers_results) <- names(comparisons)

# Save FindMarkers results
for (comp in names(find_markers_results)) {
  ct1 <- comparisons[[comp]][1]
  ct2 <- comparisons[[comp]][2]
  markers <- find_markers_results[[comp]]
  save_results_to_csv(markers, sprintf("FindMarkers_%s_vs_%s_all_genes.csv", ct1, ct2), sprintf("%s vs %s full DEG results", ct1, ct2))
  save_results_to_csv(markers %>% filter(p_val_adj < 0.05),
                     sprintf("FindMarkers_%s_vs_%s_significant_DEGs.csv", ct1, ct2),
                     sprintf("%s vs %s significant DEGs", ct1, ct2))
}

# ========================================
# PART 8: Visualization of FindMarkers Results
# ========================================

for (comp in names(find_markers_results)) {
  ct1 <- comparisons[[comp]][1]
  ct2 <- comparisons[[comp]][2]
  markers <- find_markers_results[[comp]]

  p_volcano <- ggplot(markers, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj))) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, color = "gray") +
    geom_point(data = subset(markers, p_val_adj < 0.05 & abs(avg_log2FC) > 0.5),
               aes(color = ifelse(avg_log2FC > 0, ct1, ct2)), size = 1.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(setNames(c("red", "blue"), c(ct1, ct2))), name = "Enriched in") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
    custom_theme() +
    labs(title = sprintf("Volcano Plot: %s vs %s", ct1, ct2),
         x = "Average Log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(Adjusted P-value)")
  print(p_volcano)

  top_genes_to_label <- rbind(
    markers %>% filter(avg_log2FC > 0, p_val_adj < 0.05) %>% head(5),
    markers %>% filter(avg_log2FC < 0, p_val_adj < 0.05) %>% arrange(avg_log2FC) %>% head(5)
  )
  p_volcano_labeled <- p_volcano +
    geom_text_repel(data = top_genes_to_label, aes(label = gene),
                    size = 3, box.padding = 0.3, max.overlaps = 20) +
    labs(title = sprintf("Volcano Plot: %s vs %s (Top Genes Labeled)", ct1, ct2))
  print(p_volcano_labeled)

  top_degs <- c(
    markers %>% filter(avg_log2FC > 0, p_val_adj < 0.05) %>% head(10) %>% pull(gene),
    markers %>% filter(avg_log2FC < 0, p_val_adj < 0.05) %>% arrange(avg_log2FC) %>% head(10) %>% pull(gene)
  )
  if (length(top_degs) > 0) {
    p_dot <- create_dot_plot(merged_data_all_7, top_degs, "RefinedCellType",
                             sprintf("Top DEGs: %s vs %s", ct1, ct2),
                             cell.types = c(ct1, ct2))
    if (!is.null(p_dot)) print(p_dot + theme(aspect.ratio = 2))

    p_dot_all <- create_dot_plot(merged_data_all_7, top_degs, "RefinedCellType",
                                 sprintf("Top DEGs: %s vs %s - All Cell Types", ct1, ct2))
    if (!is.null(p_dot_all)) print(p_dot_all + theme(aspect.ratio = 2))
  }
}


# ========================================
# PART 9: Specific Gene List Visualization
# ========================================

specific_genes <- c("RUNX1", "THBS1", "SPI1", "GRN", "PF4", "LGALS3")
available_specific_genes <- specific_genes[specific_genes %in% rownames(merged_data_all_7)]
log_message("\n=== SPECIFIC GENE LIST ANALYSIS ===")
log_message("Available genes:", paste(available_specific_genes, collapse = ", "))
if (length(available_specific_genes) < length(specific_genes)) {
  log_message("Missing genes:", paste(setdiff(specific_genes, available_specific_genes), collapse = ", "))
}

if (length(available_specific_genes) > 0) {
  p_specific_all <- create_dot_plot(merged_data_all_7, available_specific_genes, "RefinedCellType",
                                   "Specific Genes of Interest - All Cell Types")
  if (!is.null(p_specific_all)) print(p_specific_all + theme(aspect.ratio = 3))

  p_specific_target <- create_dot_plot(merged_data_all_7, available_specific_genes, "RefinedCellType",
                                      "Specific Genes: All Cell Types",
                                      cell.types = available_cell_types)
  if (!is.null(p_specific_target)) print(p_specific_target)

  specific_expr <- avg_expr_df %>% filter(gene %in% available_specific_genes)
  if (nrow(specific_expr) > 0) {
    log_message("\n=== SPECIFIC GENES EXPRESSION SUMMARY ===")
    for (i in 1:nrow(specific_expr)) {
      log_message(sprintf("%s: %s", specific_expr$gene[i],
                         paste(sapply(available_cell_types, function(ct) {
                           sprintf("%s=%.3f", ct, specific_expr[[ct]][i])
                         }), collapse = ", ")))
    }
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 10: GSEA GO Analysis [FIND ME]
# ========================================
gsea_results <- lapply(names(comparisons), function(comp) {
  ct1 <- comparisons[[comp]][1]
  ct2 <- comparisons[[comp]][2]
  df <- comparison_results[[comp]]$data
  gene_list <- setNames(df[[paste0("avg_log2FC_", comp)]], df$gene) %>% sort(decreasing = TRUE)
  log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Gene list prepared with %d genes", ct1, ct2, length(gene_list)))

  converted_genes <- safe_bitr(names(gene_list))
  if (nrow(converted_genes) > 0) {
    gsea_df <- merge(converted_genes, data.frame(SYMBOL = names(gene_list), log2FC = gene_list),
                     by = "SYMBOL") %>%
      arrange(desc(log2FC))
    gsea_gene_list <- setNames(gsea_df$log2FC, gsea_df$ENTREZID)
    log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Successfully converted %d genes for GSEA", ct1, ct2, length(gsea_gene_list)))

    gsea_bp <- run_gsea(gsea_gene_list, "BP", sprintf("GSEA %s vs %s", ct1, ct2))
    gsea_mf <- run_gsea(gsea_gene_list, "MF", sprintf("GSEA %s vs %s", ct1, ct2))

    if (!is.null(gsea_bp) && nrow(gsea_bp@result) > 0) {
      save_results_to_csv(gsea_bp@result %>% mutate(Enriched_in = ifelse(NES > 0, ct1, ct2)),
                         sprintf("gsea_go_bp_%s_vs_%s.csv", ct1, ct2),
                         sprintf("GSEA GO BP results %s vs %s", ct1, ct2))
    }
    if (!is.null(gsea_mf) && nrow(gsea_mf@result) > 0) {
      save_results_to_csv(gsea_mf@result %>% mutate(Enriched_in = ifelse(NES > 0, ct1, ct2)),
                         sprintf("gsea_go_mf_%s_vs_%s.csv", ct1, ct2),
                         sprintf("GSEA GO MF results %s vs %s", ct1, ct2))
    }

    list(BP = gsea_bp, MF = gsea_mf)
  } else {
    log_message(sprintf("No genes could be converted to Entrez IDs for GSEA %s vs %s", ct1, ct2))
    NULL
  }
})
names(gsea_results) <- names(comparisons)


# ========================================
# PART 11: Save Results
# ========================================

for (ct in names(specific_genes_results)) {
  if (!is.null(specific_genes_results[[ct]]$genes) && nrow(specific_genes_results[[ct]]$genes) > 0) {
    save_results_to_csv(specific_genes_results[[ct]]$genes,
                       sprintf("dge_%s_specific_genes.csv", ct),
                       sprintf("%s-specific genes", ct))
  }
}

specific_genes_data <- avg_expr_df %>%
  filter(gene %in% specific_genes) %>%
  mutate(gene_category = "Specific_Interest", available_in_dataset = TRUE)

missing_genes <- setdiff(specific_genes, specific_genes_data$gene)
if (length(missing_genes) > 0) {
  missing_df <- data.frame(
    gene = missing_genes,
    gene_category = "Specific_Interest",
    available_in_dataset = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  missing_df[available_cell_types] <- NA
  specific_genes_complete <- bind_rows(specific_genes_data, missing_df)
} else {
  specific_genes_complete <- specific_genes_data
}

save_results_to_csv(specific_genes_complete, "specific_genes_analysis.csv", "Specific genes analysis")

# Summary report
summary_report <- data.frame(
  Analysis_Component = c(
    "Total_Genes_Analyzed",
    paste0("Correlation_", names(comparisons)),
    paste0("Genes_High_Both_", names(comparisons)),
    paste0("Genes_Low_Both_", names(comparisons)),
    paste0("Specific_Genes_", available_cell_types),
    "Specific_Genes_Available"
  ),
  Value = c(
    nrow(avg_expr_df),
    sapply(comparison_results, function(x) round(x$correlation, 3)),
    sapply(coexpression_results, function(x) nrow(x$high)),
    sapply(coexpression_results, function(x) nrow(x$low)),
    sapply(specific_genes_results, function(x) nrow(x$genes)),
    length(available_specific_genes)
  ),
  Description = c(
    "Total number of genes in comparative analysis",
    paste0("Pearson correlation between ", names(comparisons)),
    paste0("Genes with high expression in both cell types for ", names(comparisons)),
    paste0("Genes with low expression in both cell types for ", names(comparisons)),
    paste0("Genes specifically enriched in ", available_cell_types),
    "Specific genes of interest found in dataset"
  )
)
save_results_to_csv(summary_report, "analysis_summary_report.csv", "Analysis summary report")

# ========================================
# PART 12: Print File Summary
# ========================================

log_message("\n=== FILES CREATED IN 'results/' DIRECTORY ===")
result_files <- list.files("results", pattern = "*.csv", full.names = FALSE)
if (length(result_files) > 0) {
  for (i in seq_along(result_files)) {
    file_size <- file.info(file.path("results", result_files[i]))$size
    log_message(sprintf("%d. %s (%.1f KB)", i, result_files[i], file_size/1024))
  }
} else {
  log_message("No CSV files found in results directory")
}

log_message("\n=== ANALYSIS SUMMARY ===")
log_message("Total genes analyzed:", nrow(avg_expr_df))
log_message("Available cell types:", paste(available_cell_types, collapse = ", "))
log_message("Specific genes available:", length(available_specific_genes))
log_message("\n=== ANALYSIS COMPLETE ===")
```

# 250730: Panel D
```{r}
# ========================================
# PART 6: Dot Plot Visualization of Top Genes 
#[250730]
# ========================================

# Create output directory
output_dir <- "250730PanelD"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  log_message(sprintf("Created output directory: %s", output_dir))
}

# Custom theme for plots with font size 6
custom_theme <- function() {
  theme_minimal() +
    theme(
```
