```{r}
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6, color = "black"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6, color = "black", angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
      axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.00001, "cm"),
      axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.00001, "mm"),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      panel.spacing = unit(0.001, "mm"),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 6, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2, "mm"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 2), size = 6),
      axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 2), size = 6),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 6),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
      legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
      legend.box.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)
    )
}

# Define updated custom colors with CHC subgroups
custom_colors_refined <- c(
  "THC" = "red3",
  "CHC1" = rgb(236/255, 164/255, 0/255),
  "CHC2" = rgb(40/255, 0/255, 3/255),
  "CHC3" = rgb(30/255, 145/255, 214/255),
  "EpcamTumor" = "gray45",
  "CD45Immune" = "cadetblue3"
)

# Function to create dot plots
create_dot_plot <- function(object, features, group.by, title, dot.scale = 10, cell.types = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(cell.types)) {
    cells <- WhichCells(object, expression = RefinedCellType %in% cell.types)
    object <- subset(object, cells = cells)
  }
  if (length(features) == 0) {
    log_message("No features available for dot plot")
    return(NULL)
  }
  DotPlot(
    object,
    features = features,
    group.by = group.by,
    dot.scale = dot.scale
  ) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Avg\nExpression") +
    custom_theme() +
    labs(title = title, x = "Genes", y = "Cell Type") +
    coord_flip() +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 2)
}

top_genes_list <- lapply(names(comparisons), function(comp) {
  ct1 <- comparisons[[comp]][1]
  ct2 <- comparisons[[comp]][2]
  df <- comparison_results[[comp]]$data
  top_ct1 <- df %>%
    filter(.data[[paste0("avg_log2FC_", comp)]] > 0.5, .data[[ct1]] > 0.5) %>%
    arrange(desc(.data[[paste0("abs_log2FC_", comp)]])) %>%
    head(10) %>%
    pull(gene)
  top_ct2 <- df %>%
    filter(.data[[paste0("avg_log2FC_", comp)]] < -0.5, .data[[ct2]] > 0.5) %>%
    arrange(desc(.data[[paste0("abs_log2FC_", comp)]])) %>%
    head(10) %>%
    pull(gene)
  top_genes <- unique(c(top_ct1, top_ct2))
  log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Top %s genes: %d", ct1, ct2, ct1, length(top_ct1)))
  log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Top %s genes: %d", ct1, ct2, ct2, length(top_ct2)))
  log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Total unique top genes: %d", ct1, ct2, length(top_genes)))
  if (length(top_ct1) > 0) {
    log_message(sprintf("%s-enriched genes: %s", ct1, paste(top_ct1, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  if (length(top_ct2) > 0) {
    log_message(sprintf("%s-enriched genes: %s", ct2, paste(top_ct2, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  top_genes
})
names(top_genes_list) <- names(comparisons)

# Create dot plots and save as PDFs
for (comp in names(comparisons)) {
  top_genes <- top_genes_list[[comp]]
  genes_in_object <- top_genes[top_genes %in% rownames(merged_data_all_7)]
  if (length(genes_in_object) > 0) {
    log_message(sprintf("%s - Creating dot plot with %d genes", comp, length(genes_in_object)))
    
    # Dot plot for all cell types
    p_dot_all <- create_dot_plot(merged_data_all_7, genes_in_object, "RefinedCellType",
                                sprintf("Top Genes: %s (avg_log2FC)", comp))
    if (!is.null(p_dot_all)) {
      pdf_file_all <- file.path(output_dir, sprintf("DotPlot_TopGenes_%s_AllCellTypes.pdf", comp))
      pdf(pdf_file_all, width = 8, height = 6)
      print(p_dot_all)
      dev.off()
      log_message(sprintf("Saved: %s", pdf_file_all))
    }

    # Dot plot for target cell types only
    target_cell_types <- comparisons[[comp]]
    p_dot_target <- create_dot_plot(merged_data_all_7, genes_in_object, "RefinedCellType",
                                   sprintf("Top DGE Genes: %s", comp),
                                   cell.types = target_cell_types)
    if (!is.null(p_dot_target)) {
      pdf_file_target <- file.path(output_dir, sprintf("DotPlot_TopGenes_%s_TargetCellTypes.pdf", comp))
      pdf(pdf_file_target, width = 6, height = 4)
      print(p_dot_target)
      dev.off()
      log_message(sprintf("Saved: %s", pdf_file_target))
    }
  } else {
    log_message(sprintf("Warning: None of the top genes found in the Seurat object for %s", comp))
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 7: Seurat FindMarkers Analysis
# ========================================

# FIXED: Proper layer handling for Seurat v5
if ("RNA" %in% names(merged_data_all_7@assays)) {
  # Check if layers need to be joined
  rna_layers <- Layers(merged_data_all_7[["RNA"]])
  log_message("RNA layers detected:", paste(rna_layers, collapse = ", "))

  if (length(rna_layers) > 1) {
    log_message("Multiple layers detected. Joining layers...")
    merged_data_all_7[["RNA"]] <- JoinLayers(merged_data_all_7[["RNA"]])
    log_message("Layers joined successfully.")
  }
}

Idents(merged_data_all_7) <- "RefinedCellType"
log_message("Available cell types:", paste(levels(Idents(merged_data_all_7)), collapse = ", "))

find_markers_results <- lapply(names(comparisons), function(comp) {
  ct1 <- comparisons[[comp]][1]
  ct2 <- comparisons[[comp]][2]
  log_message(sprintf("Running FindMarkers: %s vs %s...", ct1, ct2))

  # FIXED: FindMarkers for Seurat v5
  markers <- FindMarkers(
    merged_data_all_7,
    ident.1 = ct1,
    ident.2 = ct2,
    test.use = "wilcox",
    logfc.threshold = 0.25,
    min.pct = 0.1,
    verbose = TRUE
  ) %>%
    mutate(gene = rownames(.)) %>%
    select(gene, everything()) %>%
    arrange(desc(avg_log2FC))

  log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Total DEGs found: %d", ct1, ct2, nrow(markers)))
  log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Upregulated in %s (p_adj < 0.05): %d", ct1, ct2, ct1,
                     sum(markers$avg_log2FC > 0 & markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)))
  log_message(sprintf("%s vs %s - Upregulated in %s (p_adj < 0.05): %d", ct1, ct2, ct2,
                     sum(markers$avg_log2FC < 0 & markers$p_val_adj < 0.05)))
  markers
})
names(find_markers_results) <- names(comparisons)

# Function to save results to CSV in output directory
save_results_to_csv <- function(data, filename, description) {
  filepath <- file.path(output_dir, filename)
  write.csv(data, filepath, row.names = FALSE)
  log_message(sprintf("%s saved to %s", description, filepath))
}

# Save FindMarkers results in the output directory
for (comp in names(find_markers_results)) {
  ct1 <- comparisons[[comp]][1]
  ct2 <- comparisons[[comp]][2]
  markers <- find_markers_results[[comp]]
  save_results_to_csv(markers, sprintf("FindMarkers_%s_vs_%s_all_genes.csv", ct1, ct2), sprintf("%s vs %s full DEG results", ct1, ct2))
  save_results_to_csv(markers %>% filter(p_val_adj < 0.05),
                     sprintf("FindMarkers_%s_vs_%s_significant_DEGs.csv", ct1, ct2),
                     sprintf("%s vs %s significant DEGs", ct1, ct2))
}

# ========================================
# PART 8: Visualization of FindMarkers Results
# ========================================

for (comp in names(find_markers_results)) {
  ct1 <- comparisons[[comp]][1]
  ct2 <- comparisons[[comp]][2]
  markers <- find_markers_results[[comp]]

  # Volcano plot
  p_volcano <- ggplot(markers, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj))) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, color = "gray") +
    geom_point(data = subset(markers, p_val_adj < 0.05 & abs(avg_log2FC) > 0.5),
               aes(color = ifelse(avg_log2FC > 0, ct1, ct2)), size = 1.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(setNames(c("red", "blue"), c(ct1, ct2))), name = "Enriched in") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
    custom_theme() +
    labs(title = sprintf("Volcano Plot: %s vs %s", ct1, ct2),
         x = "Average Log2 Fold Change", y = "-log10(Adjusted P-value)")
  
  # Save volcano plot
  pdf_volcano <- file.path(output_dir, sprintf("VolcanoPlot_%s_vs_%s.pdf", ct1, ct2))
  pdf(pdf_volcano, width = 7, height = 6)
  print(p_volcano)
  dev.off()
  log_message(sprintf("Saved: %s", pdf_volcano))

  # Volcano plot with labels
  top_genes_to_label <- rbind(
    markers %>% filter(avg_log2FC > 0, p_val_adj < 0.05) %>% head(5),
    markers %>% filter(avg_log2FC < 0, p_val_adj < 0.05) %>% arrange(avg_log2FC) %>% head(5)
  )
  p_volcano_labeled <- p_volcano +
    geom_text_repel(data = top_genes_to_label, aes(label = gene),
                    size = 2, box.padding = 0.3, max.overlaps = 20) +
    labs(title = sprintf("Volcano Plot: %s vs %s (Top Genes Labeled)", ct1, ct2))
  
  # Save labeled volcano plot
  pdf_volcano_labeled <- file.path(output_dir, sprintf("VolcanoPlot_Labeled_%s_vs_%s.pdf", ct1, ct2))
  pdf(pdf_volcano_labeled, width = 8, height = 6)
  print(p_volcano_labeled)
  dev.off()
  log_message(sprintf("Saved: %s", pdf_volcano_labeled))

  # Dot plots for top DEGs
  top_degs <- c(
    markers %>% filter(avg_log2FC > 0, p_val_adj < 0.05) %>% head(10) %>% pull(gene),
    markers %>% filter(avg_log2FC < 0, p_val_adj < 0.05) %>% arrange(avg_log2FC) %>% head(10) %>% pull(gene)
  )
  if (length(top_degs) > 0) {
    # Dot plot for target cell types
    p_dot <- create_dot_plot(merged_data_all_7, top_degs, "RefinedCellType",
                            sprintf("Top DEGs: %s vs %s", ct1, ct2),
                            cell.types = c(ct1, ct2))
    if (!is.null(p_dot)) {
      pdf_dot <- file.path(output_dir, sprintf("DotPlot_TopDEGs_%s_vs_%s_TargetCells.pdf", ct1, ct2))
      pdf(pdf_dot, width = 8, height = 6)
      print(p_dot + theme(aspect.ratio = 2))
      dev.off()
      log_message(sprintf("Saved: %s", pdf_dot))
    }

    # Dot plot for all cell types
    p_dot_all <- create_dot_plot(merged_data_all_7, top_degs, "RefinedCellType",
                                sprintf("Top DEGs: %s vs %s - All Cell Types", ct1, ct2))
    if (!is.null(p_dot_all)) {
      pdf_dot_all <- file.path(output_dir, sprintf("DotPlot_TopDEGs_%s_vs_%s_AllCells.pdf", ct1, ct2))
      pdf(pdf_dot_all, width = 10, height = 8)
      print(p_dot_all + theme(aspect.ratio = 2))
      dev.off()
      log_message(sprintf("Saved: %s", pdf_dot_all))
    }
  }
}

# Print summary of saved files
log_message(sprintf("Analysis complete! All results saved in directory: %s", output_dir))
saved_files <- list.files(output_dir, full.names = FALSE)
log_message(sprintf("Total files saved: %d", length(saved_files)))
for (file in saved_files) {
  log_message(sprintf("  - %s", file))
}
```
# Panel E v2
```{r}
# ========================================
# PART 9: FindAllMarkers Analysis
# ========================================

# Create output directory if it doesn't exist
output_dir <- "250730PanelE"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  log_message(sprintf("Created output directory: %s", output_dir))
}

# Custom theme for plots with font size 6
custom_theme <- function() {
  theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6, color = "black"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6, color = "black", angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
      axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.00001, "cm"),
      axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.00001, "mm"),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      panel.spacing = unit(0.001, "mm"),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 6, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2, "mm"),
      axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 2), size = 6),
      axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 2), size = 6),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 6),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
      legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
      legend.box.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0)
    )
}

# Define updated custom colors with CHC subgroups
custom_colors_refined <- c(
  "THC" = "red3",
  "CHC1" = rgb(236/255, 164/255, 0/255),
  "CHC2" = rgb(40/255, 0/255, 3/255),
  "CHC3" = rgb(30/255, 145/255, 214/255),
  "EpcamTumor" = "gray45",
  "CD45Immune" = "cadetblue3"
)

# Function to create dot plots
create_dot_plot <- function(object, features, group.by, title, dot.scale = 10, cell.types = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(cell.types)) {
    cells <- WhichCells(object, expression = RefinedCellType %in% cell.types)
    object <- subset(object, cells = cells)
  }
  if (length(features) == 0) {
    log_message("No features available for dot plot")
    return(NULL)
  }
  DotPlot(
    object,
    features = features,
    group.by = group.by,
    dot.scale = dot.scale
  ) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Avg\nExpression") +
    custom_theme() +
    labs(title = title, x = "Genes", y = "Cell Type") +
    coord_flip() +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 2)
}

# Function to save results to CSV
save_results_to_csv <- function(data, filename, description) {
  filepath <- file.path(output_dir, filename)
  write.csv(data, filepath, row.names = FALSE)
  log_message(sprintf("%s saved to %s", description, filepath))
}

# Set identity to RefinedCellType
Idents(merged_data_all_7) <- "RefinedCellType"
log_message("Set Idents to RefinedCellType")
log_message("Available cell types:", paste(levels(Idents(merged_data_all_7)), collapse = ", "))

# Run FindAllMarkers - finding markers for each cell type vs all others
log_message("Running FindAllMarkers analysis...")
all_markers <- FindAllMarkers(
  merged_data_all_7, 
  only.pos = TRUE,
  min.pct = 0.25,
  logfc.threshold = 0.25,
  test.use = "wilcox",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# Add gene names as a column and reorder
all_markers <- all_markers %>%
  mutate(gene = rownames(.)) %>%
  select(gene, cluster, everything()) %>%
  arrange(cluster, desc(avg_log2FC))

log_message(sprintf("FindAllMarkers completed. Total markers found: %d", nrow(all_markers)))

# Show summary by cell type
marker_summary <- all_markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    total_markers = n(),
    significant_markers = sum(p_val_adj < 0.05),
    high_fc_markers = sum(avg_log2FC > 1 & p_val_adj < 0.05),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

print(marker_summary)

# Save all markers results
save_results_to_csv(all_markers, "FindAllMarkers_all_results.csv", "All markers from FindAllMarkers")
save_results_to_csv(all_markers %>% filter(p_val_adj < 0.05), 
                   "FindAllMarkers_significant.csv", "Significant markers from FindAllMarkers")

# ========================================
# Get top markers for visualization
# ========================================

# Get top 10 markers per cell type (high fold change and significant)
top_markers_per_celltype <- all_markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  dplyr::filter(avg_log2FC > 0.5, p_val_adj < 0.05) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10) %>%
  ungroup()

log_message(sprintf("Selected %d top markers across all cell types for visualization", nrow(top_markers_per_celltype)))

# Show top markers per cell type
for (ct in unique(top_markers_per_celltype$cluster)) {
  ct_markers <- top_markers_per_celltype %>% filter(cluster == ct) %>% pull(gene)
  log_message(sprintf("%s top markers (%d): %s", ct, length(ct_markers), paste(ct_markers, collapse = ", ")))
}

# Get unique genes for plotting
top_genes_unique <- unique(top_markers_per_celltype$gene)
log_message(sprintf("Total unique genes for visualization: %d", length(top_genes_unique)))

# ========================================
# Create Dot Plot
# ========================================

log_message("Creating dot plot for top markers...")

# Create dot plot with all cell types
p_dot_all_markers <- create_dot_plot(
  merged_data_all_7, 
  top_genes_unique, 
  "RefinedCellType",
  "Top Marker Genes - All Cell Types (FindAllMarkers)"
)

if (!is.null(p_dot_all_markers)) {
  # Save dot plot as PDF
  pdf_dot_all <- file.path(output_dir, "DotPlot_FindAllMarkers_TopGenes.pdf")
  pdf(pdf_dot_all, width = 12, height = 10)
  print(p_dot_all_markers)
  dev.off()
  log_message(sprintf("Saved dot plot: %s", pdf_dot_all))
} else {
  log_message("Warning: Could not create dot plot")
}

# ========================================
# Create Heatmap with better spacing
# ========================================

log_message("Creating heatmap for top markers...")

# Function to create condensed heatmap
create_condensed_heatmap <- function(genes, title_suffix = "") {
  # Check which genes are available in scale.data
  available_genes <- genes[genes %in% rownames(GetAssayData(merged_data_all_7, slot = "scale.data"))]
  missing_genes <- setdiff(genes, available_genes)
  
  if (length(missing_genes) > 0) {
    log_message(sprintf("Warning - genes missing from scale.data: %s", paste(missing_genes, collapse = ", ")))
    log_message("This suggests these genes weren't present when ScaleData was run")
  }
  
  if (length(available_genes) == 0) {
    log_message("No genes available in scale.data slot!")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  log_message(sprintf("Using %d out of %d genes for heatmap from scale.data", length(available_genes), length(genes)))
  
  DoHeatmap(
    merged_data_all_7, 
    features = available_genes,  # Use only genes available in scale.data
    group.by = "RefinedCellType",
    size = 1.5,  # Smaller font size for gene names
    raster = TRUE,  # Use raster for better performance with many genes
    draw.lines = FALSE,  # Remove lines between groups for cleaner look
    label = FALSE,  # Remove individual cell labels
    slot = "scale.data"  # Use properly scaled data
  ) + 
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", name = "Scaled\nExpression") +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 3, margin = margin(r = 0.5), lineheight = 0.8),
      axis.text.x = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 6, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 6),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
      plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5, "mm"),
      panel.spacing = unit(0, "mm"),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6, margin = margin(r = 2))
    ) +
    labs(title = paste0("Heatmap: Top Marker Genes - All Cell Types", title_suffix), x = "Cells", y = "Genes") +
    scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0), add = c(0, 0)))
}

# Create heatmap with all top genes (condensed)
p_heatmap_condensed <- create_condensed_heatmap(top_genes_unique, " (FindAllMarkers)")

# Save condensed heatmap as PDF with larger dimensions
pdf_heatmap_condensed <- file.path(output_dir, "Heatmap_FindAllMarkers_TopGenes_Condensed.pdf")
pdf(pdf_heatmap_condensed, width = 12, height = 16)  # Taller to accommodate genes
print(p_heatmap_condensed)
dev.off()
log_message(sprintf("Saved condensed heatmap: %s", pdf_heatmap_condensed))

# Create heatmap without legend for cleaner look
p_heatmap_no_legend <- p_heatmap_condensed + NoLegend()

# Save heatmap without legend
pdf_heatmap_no_legend <- file.path(output_dir, "Heatmap_FindAllMarkers_TopGenes_NoLegend.pdf")
pdf(pdf_heatmap_no_legend, width = 10, height = 16)
print(p_heatmap_no_legend)
dev.off()
log_message(sprintf("Saved condensed heatmap (no legend): %s", pdf_heatmap_no_legend))

# ========================================
# Alternative: Top 3 markers per cell type for ultra-clean visualization
# ========================================

log_message("Creating ultra-clean visualizations with top 3 markers per cell type...")

# Get top 3 markers per cell type for ultra-clean visualization
top3_markers_per_celltype <- all_markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  dplyr::filter(avg_log2FC > 1, p_val_adj < 0.05) %>%  # Higher threshold for cleaner results
  slice_head(n = 3) %>%
  ungroup()

top3_genes_unique <- unique(top3_markers_per_celltype$gene)
log_message(sprintf("Top 3 genes per cell type - Total unique genes: %d", length(top3_genes_unique)))

# Show which genes were selected for each cell type
for (ct in unique(top3_markers_per_celltype$cluster)) {
  ct_markers <- top3_markers_per_celltype %>% filter(cluster == ct) %>% pull(gene)
  log_message(sprintf("%s top 3 markers: %s", ct, paste(ct_markers, collapse = ", ")))
}

# Dot plot with top 3 genes
p_dot_top3 <- create_dot_plot(
  merged_data_all_7, 
  top3_genes_unique, 
  "RefinedCellType",
  "Top 3 Marker Genes per Cell Type (FindAllMarkers)"
)

if (!is.null(p_dot_top3)) {
  pdf_dot_top3 <- file.path(output_dir, "DotPlot_FindAllMarkers_Top3Genes.pdf")
  pdf(pdf_dot_top3, width = 8, height = 6)
  print(p_dot_top3)
  dev.off()
  log_message(sprintf("Saved top 3 dot plot: %s", pdf_dot_top3))
}

# Check which genes are available for heatmap in scale.data
available_genes_top3 <- top3_genes_unique[top3_genes_unique %in% rownames(GetAssayData(merged_data_all_7, slot = "scale.data"))]
missing_genes_top3 <- setdiff(top3_genes_unique, available_genes_top3)

if (length(missing_genes_top3) > 0) {
  log_message(sprintf("Top 3 genes missing from scale.data: %s", paste(missing_genes_top3, collapse = ", ")))
  log_message("This suggests these genes weren't present when ScaleData was run")
}
log_message(sprintf("Using %d out of %d top 3 genes for heatmap from scale.data", length(available_genes_top3), length(top3_genes_unique)))

# Heatmap with top 3 genes (should fit perfectly)
p_heatmap_top3 <- DoHeatmap(
  merged_data_all_7, 
  features = available_genes_top3,  # Use only genes available in scale.data
  group.by = "RefinedCellType",
  size = 2.5,  # Slightly smaller font for tighter spacing
  raster = FALSE,
  label = FALSE,  # Remove individual cell labels
  slot = "scale.data"  # Use properly scaled data
) + 
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", name = "Scaled\nExpression") +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 5, margin = margin(r = 0.5), lineheight = 0.8),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 6, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
    panel.spacing = unit(0, "mm"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6, margin = margin(r = 2))
  ) +
  labs(title = "Heatmap: Top 3 Marker Genes per Cell Type (FindAllMarkers)", x = "Cells", y = "Genes") +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0), add = c(0, 0)))

pdf_heatmap_top3 <- file.path(output_dir, "Heatmap_FindAllMarkers_Top3Genes.pdf")
pdf(pdf_heatmap_top3, width = 8, height = 6)
print(p_heatmap_top3)
dev.off()
log_message(sprintf("Saved top 3 heatmap: %s", pdf_heatmap_top3))

# Heatmap with top 3 genes - no legend version
p_heatmap_top3_no_legend <- p_heatmap_top3 + NoLegend()
pdf_heatmap_top3_no_legend <- file.path(output_dir, "Heatmap_FindAllMarkers_Top3Genes_NoLegend.pdf")
pdf(pdf_heatmap_top3_no_legend, width = 7, height = 6)
print(p_heatmap_top3_no_legend)
dev.off()
log_message(sprintf("Saved top 3 heatmap (no legend): %s", pdf_heatmap_top3_no_legend))

# ========================================
# Summary
# ========================================

log_message("FindAllMarkers analysis complete!")
log_message(sprintf("Results saved in: %s", output_dir))
log_message("Files created:")
log_message("  - FindAllMarkers_all_results.csv")
log_message("  - FindAllMarkers_significant.csv") 
log_message("  - DotPlot_FindAllMarkers_TopGenes.pdf")
log_message("  - DotPlot_FindAllMarkers_Top3Genes.pdf")
log_message("  - Heatmap_FindAllMarkers_TopGenes_Condensed.pdf")
log_message("  - Heatmap_FindAllMarkers_TopGenes_NoLegend.pdf")
log_message("  - Heatmap_FindAllMarkers_Top3Genes.pdf")
log_message("  - Heatmap_FindAllMarkers_Top3Genes_NoLegend.pdf")
```


## Looking at Hybrids vs. Controls
```{r}
# ========================================
# PART 1: Cell Subsetting and Average Expression
# ========================================

# Check if WellCellType exists in metadata
if(!"WellCellType" %in% colnames(merged_data_all_7@meta.data)) {
  stop("WellCellType column not found in metadata. Please check column name.")
}

# Check available cell types
table(merged_data_all_7$WellCellType)

# Combine CHC and THC into Hybrids and subset cells
Hybrid_cells <- WhichCells(merged_data_all_7, expression = WellCellType %in% c("CHC", "THC"))
CD45Immune_cells <- WhichCells(merged_data_all_7, expression = WellCellType == "CD45Immune")
EpcamTumor_cells <- WhichCells(merged_data_all_7, expression = WellCellType == "EpcamTumor")

# Check if cells were found
cat("Hybrid cells found:", length(Hybrid_cells), "\n")
cat("CD45Immune cells found:", length(CD45Immune_cells), "\n")
cat("EpcamTumor cells found:", length(EpcamTumor_cells), "\n")

if(length(Hybrid_cells) == 0 | length(CD45Immune_cells) == 0 | length(EpcamTumor_cells) == 0) {
  stop("No cells found for one or more cell types. Check cell type names.")
}

# Create subsets
Hybrid_subset <- subset(merged_data_all_7, cells = Hybrid_cells)
CD45Immune_subset <- subset(merged_data_all_7, cells = CD45Immune_cells)
EpcamTumor_subset <- subset(merged_data_all_7, cells = EpcamTumor_cells)

# Calculate average expression
# Note: Using 'data' layer which should contain log-normalized data
Hybrid_avg <- AverageExpression(Hybrid_subset, layer = "data")$RNA
CD45Immune_avg <- AverageExpression(CD45Immune_subset, layer = "data")$RNA
EpcamTumor_avg <- AverageExpression(EpcamTumor_subset, layer = "data")$RNA

# Check dimensions and structure
cat("Hybrid_avg dimensions:", dim(Hybrid_avg), "\n")
cat("CD45Immune_avg dimensions:", dim(CD45Immune_avg), "\n")
cat("EpcamTumor_avg dimensions:", dim(EpcamTumor_avg), "\n")
cat("Hybrid_avg column names:", colnames(Hybrid_avg), "\n")
cat("CD45Immune_avg column names:", colnames(CD45Immune_avg), "\n")
cat("EpcamTumor_avg column names:", colnames(EpcamTumor_avg), "\n")

# Convert to data frames
Hybrid_df <- data.frame(gene = rownames(Hybrid_avg), Hybrid = Hybrid_avg[, 1], stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
CD45Immune_df <- data.frame(gene = rownames(CD45Immune_avg), CD45Immune = CD45Immune_avg[, 1], stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
EpcamTumor_df <- data.frame(gene = rownames(EpcamTumor_avg), EpcamTumor = EpcamTumor_avg[, 1], stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Merge by gene name to ensure we only keep genes present in all
avg_expr_df <- merge(merge(Hybrid_df, CD45Immune_df, by = "gene", all = FALSE),
                     EpcamTumor_df, by = "gene", all = FALSE)  # inner join

cat("Final data frame dimensions:", dim(avg_expr_df), "\n")
cat("Genes in common:", nrow(avg_expr_df), "\n")

# Remove genes with NA values
avg_expr_df <- avg_expr_df[complete.cases(avg_expr_df), ]

# Add log1p transformation (log(x+1)) for visualization
avg_expr_df$log_Hybrid <- log1p(avg_expr_df$Hybrid)
avg_expr_df$log_CD45Immune <- log1p(avg_expr_df$CD45Immune)
avg_expr_df$log_EpcamTumor <- log1p(avg_expr_df$EpcamTumor)

# ========================================
# PART 2: Visualization
# ========================================

# Define genes to annotate
genes_to_annotate <- c("RUNX1", "SPI1", "GRN", "PF4", "LGALS3")

# Check if these genes exist in the data
genes_present <- genes_to_annotate[genes_to_annotate %in% avg_expr_df$gene]
genes_missing <- genes_to_annotate[!genes_to_annotate %in% avg_expr_df$gene]

if(length(genes_missing) > 0) {
  cat("Warning: These genes not found in data:", paste(genes_missing, collapse = ", "), "\n")
}

# Add label column
avg_expr_df$label <- ifelse(avg_expr_df$gene %in% genes_present, avg_expr_df$gene, NA)

# Create scatter plots for Hybrid vs controls
p1 <- ggplot(avg_expr_df, aes(x = log_Hybrid, y = log_CD45Immune)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "gray") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_point(data = subset(avg_expr_df, gene %in% genes_present),
             aes(x = log_Hybrid, y = log_CD45Immune), color = "red", size = 2) +
  geom_text_repel(data = subset(avg_expr_df, !is.na(label)),
                  aes(label = label),
                  size = 4,
                  box.padding = 0.5,
                  max.overlaps = Inf) +
  theme_minimal() +
  ggtitle("Gene Expression Similarity: Hybrid vs CD45Immune") +
  xlab("log1p Avg Expression in Hybrid") +
  ylab("log1p Avg Expression in CD45Immune") +
  coord_fixed()

p2 <- ggplot(avg_expr_df, aes(x = log_Hybrid, y = log_EpcamTumor)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "gray") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_point(data = subset(avg_expr_df, gene %in% genes_present),
             aes(x = log_Hybrid, y = log_EpcamTumor), color = "red", size = 2) +
  geom_text_repel(data = subset(avg_expr_df, !is.na(label)),
                  aes(label = label),
                  size = 4,
                  box.padding = 0.5,
                  max.overlaps = Inf) +
  theme_minimal() +
  ggtitle("Gene Expression Similarity: Hybrid vs EpcamTumor") +
  xlab("log1p Avg Expression in Hybrid") +
  ylab("log1p Avg Expression in EpcamTumor") +
  coord_fixed()

print(p1)
print(p2)

# ========================================
# PART 3: Finding Co-expressed Genes
# ========================================

# Define thresholds for high/low expression
high_threshold <- 1
low_threshold <- 0.1

# Find genes with similar expression patterns
high_in_all <- avg_expr_df[avg_expr_df$Hybrid > high_threshold &
                           avg_expr_df$CD45Immune > high_threshold &
                           avg_expr_df$EpcamTumor > high_threshold, ]
low_in_all <- avg_expr_df[avg_expr_df$Hybrid < low_threshold &
                          avg_expr_df$CD45Immune < low_threshold &
                          avg_expr_df$EpcamTumor < low_threshold, ]
similar_expr_hybrid_cd45 <- avg_expr_df[abs(avg_expr_df$Hybrid - avg_expr_df$CD45Immune) < 0.1, ]
similar_expr_hybrid_epcam <- avg_expr_df[abs(avg_expr_df$Hybrid - avg_expr_df$EpcamTumor) < 0.1, ]

cat("Genes high in all:", nrow(high_in_all), "\n")
cat("Genes low in all:", nrow(low_in_all), "\n")
cat("Genes with similar expression (Hybrid vs CD45Immune):", nrow(similar_expr_hybrid_cd45), "\n")
cat("Genes with similar expression (Hybrid vs EpcamTumor):", nrow(similar_expr_hybrid_epcam), "\n")

# Calculate correlations
corr_hybrid_cd45 <- cor(avg_expr_df$Hybrid, avg_expr_df$CD45Immune, method = "pearson")
corr_hybrid_epcam <- cor(avg_expr_df$Hybrid, avg_expr_df$EpcamTumor, method = "pearson")
cat("Correlation between Hybrid and CD45Immune:", round(corr_hybrid_cd45, 3), "\n")
cat("Correlation between Hybrid and EpcamTumor:", round(corr_hybrid_epcam, 3), "\n")

# ========================================
# PART 4: GO Enrichment Analysis
# ========================================

# Function to safely convert gene symbols to Entrez IDs
safe_bitr <- function(genes, fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID") {
  if(length(genes) == 0) {
    warning("No genes provided for conversion")
    return(data.frame(SYMBOL = character(0), ENTREZID = character(0)))
  }

  result <- tryCatch({
    bitr(genes, fromType = fromType, toType = toType, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db)
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning("Error in gene ID conversion: ", e$message)
    return(data.frame(SYMBOL = character(0), ENTREZID = character(0)))
  })

  return(result)
}

# Convert gene symbols to Entrez IDs
if(nrow(high_in_all) > 0) {
  high_entrez <- safe_bitr(high_in_all$gene)
  cat("High genes converted:", nrow(high_entrez), "out of", nrow(high_in_all), "\n")
} else {
  high_entrez <- data.frame(SYMBOL = character(0), ENTREZID = character(0))
}

if(nrow(low_in_all) > 0) {
  low_entrez <- safe_bitr(low_in_all$gene)
  cat("Low genes converted:", nrow(low_entrez), "out of", nrow(low_in_all), "\n")
} else {
  low_entrez <- data.frame(SYMBOL = character(0), ENTREZID = character(0))
}

# Run GO enrichment (only if we have genes)
if(nrow(high_entrez) > 5) {
  go_high <- enrichGO(
    gene = high_entrez$ENTREZID,
    OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
    ont = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
    qvalueCutoff = 0.1,
    readable = TRUE
  )

  if(nrow(go_high@result) > 0) {
    print(barplot(go_high, showCategory = 15, title = "GO Terms: High in All Cell Types"))
    print(dotplot(go_high, showCategory = 15) + ggtitle("GO: Highly Expressed in All Cell Types"))
  } else {
    cat("No significant GO terms found for highly expressed genes\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("Not enough genes for GO enrichment of highly expressed genes\n")
}

if(nrow(low_entrez) > 5) {
  go_low <- enrichGO(
    gene = low_entrez$ENTREZID,
    OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
    ont = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
    qvalueCutoff = 0.1,
    readable = TRUE
  )

  if(nrow(go_low@result) > 0) {
    print(barplot(go_low, showCategory = 15, title = "GO Terms: Low in All Cell Types"))
    print(dotplot(go_low, showCategory = 15) + ggtitle("GO: Lowly Expressed in All Cell Types"))
  } else {
    cat("No significant GO terms found for lowly expressed genes\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("Not enough genes for GO enrichment of lowly expressed genes\n")
}

# ========================================
# PART 5: Cell Type Specific Analysis
# ========================================

# Define cell-type specific genes with adjusted thresholds
hybrid_high_threshold <- 1
cd45_high_threshold <- 1
epcam_high_threshold <- 1
low_threshold <- 0.1

hybrid_specific <- avg_expr_df[avg_expr_df$Hybrid > hybrid_high_threshold &
                              avg_expr_df$CD45Immune < low_threshold &
                              avg_expr_df$EpcamTumor < low_threshold, ]
cd45_specific <- avg_expr_df[avg_expr_df$CD45Immune > cd45_high_threshold &
                            avg_expr_df$Hybrid < low_threshold &
                            avg_expr_df$EpcamTumor < low_threshold, ]
epcam_specific <- avg_expr_df[avg_expr_df$EpcamTumor > epcam_high_threshold &
                             avg_expr_df$Hybrid < low_threshold &
                             avg_expr_df$CD45Immune < low_threshold, ]

cat("Hybrid-specific genes:", nrow(hybrid_specific), "\n")
cat("CD45Immune-specific genes:", nrow(cd45_specific), "\n")
cat("EpcamTumor-specific genes:", nrow(epcam_specific), "\n")

# Convert to Entrez IDs for cell-type specific genes
hybrid_entrez <- safe_bitr(hybrid_specific$gene)
cd45_entrez <- safe_bitr(cd45_specific$gene)
epcam_entrez <- safe_bitr(epcam_specific$gene)

cat("Hybrid genes converted:", nrow(hybrid_entrez), "\n")
cat("CD45Immune genes converted:", nrow(cd45_entrez), "\n")
cat("EpcamTumor genes converted:", nrow(epcam_entrez), "\n")

# GO enrichment for cell-type specific genes
if(nrow(hybrid_entrez) > 5) {
  go_hybrid <- enrichGO(
    gene = hybrid_entrez$ENTREZID,
    OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
    ont = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
    readable = TRUE
  )

  if(nrow(go_hybrid@result) > 0) {
    df_go_hybrid <- head(go_hybrid@result, 10)

    p_hybrid <- ggplot(df_go_hybrid, aes(x = reorder(Description, Count), y = Count,
                                        size = Count, color = p.adjust)) +
      geom_point() +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Adj. P-value") +
      labs(title = "GO Terms - Hybrid Specific", x = NULL, y = "Gene Count") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9)
      )

    print(p_hybrid)
  } else {
    cat("No significant GO terms found for Hybrid-specific genes\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("Not enough Hybrid-specific genes for GO enrichment\n")
}

if(nrow(cd45_entrez) > 5) {
  go_cd45 <- enrichGO(
    gene = cd45_entrez$ENTREZID,
    OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
    ont = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
    readable = TRUE
  )

  if(nrow(go_cd45@result) > 0) {
    df_go_cd45 <- head(go_cd45@result, 10)

    p_cd45 <- ggplot(df_go_cd45, aes(x = reorder(Description, Count), y = Count,
                                    size = Count, color = p.adjust)) +
      geom_point() +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Adj. P-value") +
      labs(title = "GO Terms - CD45Immune Specific", x = NULL, y = "Gene Count") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9)
      )

    print(p_cd45)
  } else {
    cat("No significant GO terms found for CD45Immune-specific genes\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("Not enough CD45Immune-specific genes for GO enrichment\n")
}

if(nrow(epcam_entrez) > 5) {
  go_epcam <- enrichGO(
    gene = epcam_entrez$ENTREZID,
    OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
    ont = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
    readable = TRUE
  )

  if(nrow(go_epcam@result) > 0) {
    df_go_epcam <- head(go_epcam@result, 10)

    p_epcam <- ggplot(df_go_epcam, aes(x = reorder(Description, Count), y = Count,
                                      size = Count, color = p.adjust)) +
      geom_point() +
      coord_flip() +
      scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Adj. P-value") +
      labs(title = "GO Terms - EpcamTumor Specific", x = NULL, y = "Gene Count") +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 9)
      )

    print(p_epcam)
  } else {
    cat("No significant GO terms found for EpcamTumor-specific genes\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("Not enough EpcamTumor-specific genes for GO enrichment\n")
}

# ========================================
# PART 6: Dot Plot Visualization of Top Genes
# ========================================

library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

# Calculate fold changes (Hybrid vs controls)
avg_expr_df$avg_log2FC_hybrid_cd45 <- log2((avg_expr_df$Hybrid + 0.01) / (avg_expr_df$CD45Immune + 0.01))
avg_expr_df$avg_log2FC_hybrid_epcam <- log2((avg_expr_df$Hybrid + 0.01) / (avg_expr_df$EpcamTumor + 0.01))
avg_expr_df$abs_log2FC_hybrid_cd45 <- abs(avg_expr_df$avg_log2FC_hybrid_cd45)
avg_expr_df$abs_log2FC_hybrid_epcam <- abs(avg_expr_df$avg_log2FC_hybrid_epcam)

# Add a pseudo p-value based on expression difference
avg_expr_df$expr_diff_hybrid_cd45 <- abs(avg_expr_df$Hybrid - avg_expr_df$CD45Immune)
avg_expr_df$expr_diff_hybrid_epcam <- abs(avg_expr_df$Hybrid - avg_expr_df$EpcamTumor)

# Top 10 genes higher in Hybrid vs CD45Immune
top_genes_hybrid_cd45 <- avg_expr_df %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC_hybrid_cd45 > 0.5 & Hybrid > 0.5) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs_log2FC_hybrid_cd45)) %>%
  head(10) %>%
  pull(gene)

# Top 10 genes higher in CD45Immune vs Hybrid
top_genes_cd45_hybrid <- avg_expr_df %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC_hybrid_cd45 < -0.5 & CD45Immune > 0.5) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs_log2FC_hybrid_cd45)) %>%
  head(10) %>%
  pull(gene)

# Top 10 genes higher in Hybrid vs EpcamTumor
top_genes_hybrid_epcam <- avg_expr_df %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC_hybrid_epcam > 0.5 & Hybrid > 0.5) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs_log2FC_hybrid_epcam)) %>%
  head(10) %>%
  pull(gene)

# Top 10 genes higher in EpcamTumor vs Hybrid
top_genes_epcam_hybrid <- avg_expr_df %>%
  filter(avg_log2FC_hybrid_epcam < -0.5 & EpcamTumor > 0.5) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs_log2FC_hybrid_epcam)) %>%
  head(10) %>%
  pull(gene)

# Combine all sets of genes
top_genes <- unique(c(top_genes_hybrid_cd45, top_genes_cd45_hybrid,
                      top_genes_hybrid_epcam, top_genes_epcam_hybrid))

cat("Top Hybrid vs CD45Immune genes:", length(top_genes_hybrid_cd45), "\n")
cat("Top CD45Immune vs Hybrid genes:", length(top_genes_cd45_hybrid), "\n")
cat("Top Hybrid vs EpcamTumor genes:", length(top_genes_hybrid_epcam), "\n")
cat("Top EpcamTumor vs Hybrid genes:", length(top_genes_epcam_hybrid), "\n")
cat("Total unique top genes:", length(top_genes), "\n")

# Print the gene lists
if(length(top_genes_hybrid_cd45) > 0) {
  cat("Hybrid-enriched vs CD45Immune genes:", paste(top_genes_hybrid_cd45, collapse = ", "), "\n")
}
if(length(top_genes_cd45_hybrid) > 0) {
  cat("CD45Immune-enriched vs Hybrid genes:", paste(top_genes_cd45_hybrid, collapse = ", "), "\n")
}
if(length(top_genes_hybrid_epcam) > 0) {
  cat("Hybrid-enriched vs EpcamTumor genes:", paste(top_genes_hybrid_epcam, collapse = ", "), "\n")
}
if(length(top_genes_epcam_hybrid) > 0) {
  cat("EpcamTumor-enriched vs Hybrid genes:", paste(top_genes_epcam_hybrid, collapse = ", "), "\n")
}

# Create dot plot if we have genes to plot
if(length(top_genes) > 0) {
  # Check if genes exist in the original object
  genes_in_object <- top_genes[top_genes %in% rownames(merged_data_all_7)]

  if(length(genes_in_object) > 0) {
    cat("Creating dot plot with", length(genes_in_object), "genes\n")

    # Dot plot for all cell types
    p_dot_all <- DotPlot(
      merged_data_all_7,
      features = genes_in_object,
      group.by = "WellCellType",
      dot.scale = 10
    ) +
      scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3") +
      theme_minimal() +
      labs(title = "Top Differential Genes - All Cell Types",
           x = "Genes", y = "Cell Type") +
      coord_flip() +
      theme(
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.00001, "cm"),
        axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.00001, "mm"),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        panel.spacing = unit(0.001, "mm"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
      )

    print(p_dot_all)

    # Dot plot for Hybrid, CD45Immune, and EpcamTumor
    target_cell_types <- c("CHC", "THC", "CD45Immune", "EpcamTumor")
    available_cell_types <- intersect(target_cell_types, unique(merged_data_all_7$WellCellType))

    cat("Available target cell types:", paste(available_cell_types, collapse = ", "), "\n")

    if(length(available_cell_types) >= 2) {
      # Get cells for the target types
      target_cells <- WhichCells(merged_data_all_7, expression = WellCellType %in% available_cell_types)
      target_subset <- subset(merged_data_all_7, cells = target_cells)

      p_dot_target <- DotPlot(
        target_subset,
        features = genes_in_object,
        group.by = "WellCellType",
        dot.scale = 10
      ) +
        scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3") +
        theme_minimal() +
        labs(title = "Top Differential Genes - Hybrid vs Controls",
             x = "Genes", y = "Cell Type") +
        coord_flip() +
        theme(
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
          axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.00001, "cm"),
          axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.00001, "mm"),
          axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
          panel.spacing = unit(0.001, "mm"),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
        )

      print(p_dot_target)
    } else {
      cat("Not enough target cell types found for comparison plot\n")
    }

  } else {
    cat("Warning: None of the top genes found in the Seurat object\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("No genes met the criteria for visualization\n")
}

# ========================================
# PART 7: Specific Gene List Visualization
# ========================================

# Define specific genes of interest
specific_genes <- c("RUNX1", "THBS1", "SPI1", "GRN", "PF4", "LGALS3")

# Check which genes are available in the dataset
available_specific_genes <- specific_genes[specific_genes %in% rownames(merged_data_all_7)]
missing_specific_genes <- specific_genes[!specific_genes %in% rownames(merged_data_all_7)]

cat("\n=== SPECIFIC GENE LIST ANALYSIS ===\n")
cat("Available genes:", paste(available_specific_genes, collapse = ", "), "\n")
if(length(missing_specific_genes) > 0) {
  cat("Missing genes:", paste(missing_specific_genes, collapse = ", "), "\n")
}

if(length(available_specific_genes) > 0) {
  # Dot plot for all cell types with specific genes
  p_specific_all <- DotPlot(
    merged_data_all_7,
    features = available_specific_genes,
    group.by = "WellCellType",
    dot.scale = 10
  ) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "Specific Genes of Interest - All Cell Types",
         x = "Genes", y = "Cell Type") +
    coord_flip() +
    theme(
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold"),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
      axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.00001, "cm"),
      axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.00001, "mm"),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      panel.spacing = unit(0.001, "mm"),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
    )

  print(p_specific_all)

  # Dot plot for target cell types with specific genes
  if(length(available_cell_types) >= 2) {
    p_specific_target <- DotPlot(
      target_subset,
      features = available_specific_genes,
      group.by = "WellCellType",
      dot.scale = 10
    ) +
      scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3") +
      theme_minimal() +
      labs(title = "Specific Genes: Hybrid vs Controls",
           x = "Genes", y = "Cell Type") +
      coord_flip() +
      theme(
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, color = "black", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.00001, "cm"),
        axis.ticks.length.x = unit(0.00001, "mm"),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        panel.spacing = unit(0.001, "mm"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
      )

    print(p_specific_target)
  }

  # Expression summary for specific genes
  if(exists("avg_expr_df")) {
    specific_expr <- avg_expr_df[avg_expr_df$gene %in% available_specific_genes, ]
    if(nrow(specific_expr) > 0) {
      cat("\n=== SPECIFIC GENES EXPRESSION SUMMARY ===\n")
      for(i in 1:nrow(specific_expr)) {
        gene <- specific_expr$gene[i]
        hybrid_expr <- round(specific_expr$Hybrid[i], 3)
        cd45_expr <- round(specific_expr$CD45Immune[i], 3)
        epcam_expr <- round(specific_expr$EpcamTumor[i], 3)
        fc_hybrid_cd45 <- round(specific_expr$avg_log2FC_hybrid_cd45[i], 3)
        fc_hybrid_epcam <- round(specific_expr$avg_log2FC_hybrid_epcam[i], 3)
        cat(sprintf("%s: Hybrid=%.3f, CD45Immune=%.3f, EpcamTumor=%.3f, log2FC(Hybrid/CD45)=%.3f, log2FC(Hybrid/Epcam)=%.3f\n",
                    gene, hybrid_expr, cd45_expr, epcam_expr, fc_hybrid_cd45, fc_hybrid_epcam))
      }
    }
  }

} else {
  cat("None of the specific genes found in the dataset\n")
}

# ========================================
# PART 8: GSEA GO Analysis
# ========================================

cat("\n=== GSEA GO ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Prepare ranked gene lists for GSEA (Hybrid vs each control)
if(exists("avg_expr_df") && nrow(avg_expr_df) > 0) {

  # GSEA for Hybrid vs CD45Immune
  gene_list_cd45 <- avg_expr_df$avg_log2FC_hybrid_cd45
  names(gene_list_cd45) <- avg_expr_df$gene
  gene_list_cd45 <- sort(gene_list_cd45, decreasing = TRUE)

  cat("Gene list prepared for Hybrid vs CD45Immune with", length(gene_list_cd45), "genes\n")
  cat("Range of log2FC:", round(min(gene_list_cd45), 3), "to", round(max(gene_list_cd45), 3), "\n")

  # Convert gene symbols to Entrez IDs
  gene_df_cd45 <- data.frame(
    SYMBOL = names(gene_list_cd45),
    log2FC = as.numeric(gene_list_cd45),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  converted_genes_cd45 <- tryCatch({
    bitr(gene_df_cd45$SYMBOL, fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db)
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning("Error in gene ID conversion for GSEA (Hybrid vs CD45Immune): ", e$message)
    return(data.frame(SYMBOL = character(0), ENTREZID = character(0)))
  })

  # GSEA for Hybrid vs EpcamTumor
  gene_list_epcam <- avg_expr_df$avg_log2FC_hybrid_epcam
  names(gene_list_epcam) <- avg_expr_df$gene
  gene_list_epcam <- sort(gene_list_epcam, decreasing = TRUE)

  cat("Gene list prepared for Hybrid vs EpcamTumor with", length(gene_list_epcam), "genes\n")
  cat("Range of log2FC:", round(min(gene_list_epcam), 3), "to", round(max(gene_list_epcam), 3), "\n")

  gene_df_epcam <- data.frame(
    SYMBOL = names(gene_list_epcam),
    log2FC = as.numeric(gene_list_epcam),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  converted_genes_epcam <- tryCatch({
    bitr(gene_df_epcam$SYMBOL, fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db)
  }, error = function(e) {
    warning("Error in gene ID conversion for GSEA (Hybrid vs EpcamTumor): ", e$message)
    return(data.frame(SYMBOL = character(0), ENTREZID = character(0)))
  })

  # Run GSEA for Hybrid vs CD45Immune
  if(nrow(converted_genes_cd45) > 0) {
    gsea_df_cd45 <- merge(converted_genes_cd45, gene_df_cd45, by = "SYMBOL")
    gsea_df_cd45 <- gsea_df_cd45[order(gsea_df_cd45$log2FC, decreasing = TRUE), ]
    gsea_gene_list_cd45 <- gsea_df_cd45$log2FC
    names(gsea_gene_list_cd45) <- gsea_df_cd45$ENTREZID

    cat("Successfully converted", length(gsea_gene_list_cd45), "genes for GSEA (Hybrid vs CD45Immune)\n")

    if(length(gsea_gene_list_cd45) >= 100) {
      cat("Running GSEA for Biological Process (Hybrid vs CD45Immune)...\n")

      gsea_bp_cd45 <- tryCatch({
        gseGO(
          geneList = gsea_gene_list_cd45,
          OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
          ont = "BP",
          keyType = "ENTREZID",
          minGSSize = 15,
          maxGSSize = 500,
          pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
          pAdjustMethod = "BH",
          verbose = FALSE
        )
      }, error = function(e) {
        warning("Error in GSEA BP (Hybrid vs CD45Immune): ", e$message)
        return(NULL)
      })

      if(!is.null(gsea_bp_cd45) && nrow(gsea_bp_cd45@result) > 0) {
        cat("Found", nrow(gsea_bp_cd45@result), "significant GO terms in GSEA BP (Hybrid vs CD45Immune)\n")

        p_gsea_dot_cd45 <- dotplot(gsea_bp_cd45, showCategory = 15,
                                  title = "GSEA: GO Biological Process (Hybrid vs CD45Immune)",
                                  font.size = 10) +
          scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Adj. P-value") +
          theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10))
        print(p_gsea_dot_cd45)

        top_results_cd45 <- gsea_bp_cd45@result[1:min(6, nrow(gsea_bp_cd45@result)), ]
        for(i in 1:min(3, nrow(top_results_cd45))) {
          pathway_id <- top_results_cd45$ID[i]
          p_enrich <- gseaplot2(gsea_bp_cd45,
                               geneSetID = pathway_id,
                               title = paste("GSEA:", top_results_cd45$Description[i]),
                               pvalue_table = TRUE)
          print(p_enrich)
        }

        p_ridge_cd45 <- ridgeplot(gsea_bp_cd45, showCategory = 20) +
          scale_fill_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Adj. P-value") +
          labs(title = "GSEA Ridge Plot: GO BP Terms (Hybrid vs CD45Immune)") +
          theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9))
        print(p_ridge_cd45)

        cat("\n=== TOP GSEA RESULTS (Hybrid-enriched vs CD45Immune) ===\n")
        hybrid_enriched <- gsea_bp_cd45@result[gsea_bp_cd45@result$NES > 0, ][1:min(5, sum(gsea_bp_cd45@result$NES > 0)), ]
        if(nrow(hybrid_enriched) > 0) {
          for(i in 1:nrow(hybrid_enriched)) {
            cat(sprintf("%s (NES=%.2f, FDR=%.3f)\n",
                       hybrid_enriched$Description[i],
                       hybrid_enriched$NES[i],
                       hybrid_enriched$qvalue[i]))
          }
        }

        cat("\n=== TOP GSEA RESULTS (CD45Immune-enriched) ===\n")
        cd45_enriched <- gsea_bp_cd45@result[gsea_bp_cd45@result$NES < 0, ][1:min(5, sum(gsea_bp_cd45@result$NES < 0)), ]
        if(nrow(cd45_enriched) > 0) {
          for(i in 1:nrow(cd45_enriched)) {
            cat(sprintf("%s (NES=%.2f, FDR=%.3f)\n",
                       cd45_enriched$Description[i],
                       cd45_enriched$NES[i],
                       cd45_enriched$qvalue[i]))
          }
        }
      } else {
        cat("No significant GO terms found in GSEA BP analysis (Hybrid vs CD45Immune)\n")
      }
    } else {
      cat("Not enough genes for GSEA analysis (Hybrid vs CD45Immune, need >= 100, have", length(gsea_gene_list_cd45), ")\n")
    }
  } else {
    cat("No genes could be converted to Entrez IDs for GSEA (Hybrid vs CD45Immune)\n")
  }

  # Run GSEA for Hybrid vs EpcamTumor
  if(nrow(converted_genes_epcam) > 0) {
    gsea_df_epcam <- merge(converted_genes_epcam, gene_df_epcam, by = "SYMBOL")
    gsea_df_epcam <- gsea_df_epcam[order(gsea_df_epcam$log2FC, decreasing = TRUE), ]
    gsea_gene_list_epcam <- gsea_df_epcam$log2FC
    names(gsea_gene_list_epcam) <- gsea_df_epcam$ENTREZID

    cat("Successfully converted", length(gsea_gene_list_epcam), "genes for GSEA (Hybrid vs EpcamTumor)\n")

    if(length(gsea_gene_list_epcam) >= 100) {
      cat("Running GSEA for Biological Process (Hybrid vs EpcamTumor)...\n")

      gsea_bp_epcam <- tryCatch({
        gseGO(
          geneList = gsea_gene_list_epcam,
          OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
          ont = "BP",
          keyType = "ENTREZID",
          minGSSize = 15,
          maxGSSize = 500,
          pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
          pAdjustMethod = "BH",
          verbose = FALSE
        )
      }, error = function(e) {
        warning("Error in GSEA BP (Hybrid vs EpcamTumor): ", e$message)
        return(NULL)
      })

      if(!is.null(gsea_bp_epcam) && nrow(gsea_bp_epcam@result) > 0) {
        cat("Found", nrow(gsea_bp_epcam@result), "significant GO terms in GSEA BP (Hybrid vs EpcamTumor)\n")

        p_gsea_dot_epcam <- dotplot(gsea_bp_epcam, showCategory = 15,
                                   title = "GSEA: GO Biological Process (Hybrid vs EpcamTumor)",
                                   font.size = 10) +
          scale_color_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Adj. P-value") +
          theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10))
        print(p_gsea_dot_epcam)

        top_results_epcam <- gsea_bp_epcam@result[1:min(6, nrow(gsea_bp_epcam@result)), ]
        for(i in 1:min(3, nrow(top_results_epcam))) {
          pathway_id <- top_results_epcam$ID[i]
          p_enrich <- gseaplot2(gsea_bp_epcam,
                               geneSetID = pathway_id,
                               title = paste("GSEA:", top_results_epcam$Description[i]),
                               pvalue_table = TRUE)
          print(p_enrich)
        }

        p_ridge_epcam <- ridgeplot(gsea_bp_epcam, showCategory = 20) +
          scale_fill_gradient(low = "cyan3", high = "magenta3", name = "Adj. P-value") +
          labs(title = "GSEA Ridge Plot: GO BP Terms (Hybrid vs EpcamTumor)") +
          theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9))
        print(p_ridge_epcam)

        cat("\n=== TOP GSEA RESULTS (Hybrid-enriched vs EpcamTumor) ===\n")
        hybrid_enriched <- gsea_bp_epcam@result[gsea_bp_epcam@result$NES > 0, ][1:min(5, sum(gsea_bp_epcam@result$NES > 0)), ]
        if(nrow(hybrid_enriched) > 0) {
          for(i in 1:nrow(hybrid_enriched)) {
            cat(sprintf("%s (NES=%.2f, FDR=%.3f)\n",
                       hybrid_enriched$Description[i],
                       hybrid_enriched$NES[i],
                       hybrid_enriched$qvalue[i]))
          }
        }

        cat("\n=== TOP GSEA RESULTS (EpcamTumor-enriched) ===\n")
        epcam_enriched <- gsea_bp_epcam@result[gsea_bp_epcam@result$NES < 0, ][1:min(5, sum(gsea_bp_epcam@result$NES < 0)), ]
        if(nrow(epcam_enriched) > 0) {
          for(i in 1:nrow(epcam_enriched)) {
            cat(sprintf("%s (NES=%.2f, FDR=%.3f)\n",
                       epcam_enriched$Description[i],
                       epcam_enriched$NES[i],
                       epcam_enriched$qvalue[i]))
          }
        }
      } else {
        cat("No significant GO terms found in GSEA BP analysis (Hybrid vs EpcamTumor)\n")
      }
    } else {
      cat("Not enough genes for GSEA analysis (Hybrid vs EpcamTumor, need >= 100, have", length(gsea_gene_list_epcam), ")\n")
    }
  } else {
    cat("No genes could be converted to Entrez IDs for GSEA (Hybrid vs EpcamTumor)\n")
  }

} else {
  cat("Average expression data not available for GSEA\n")
}

# ========================================
# Summary Statistics
# ========================================

cat("\n=== ANALYSIS SUMMARY ===\n")
cat("Total genes analyzed:", nrow(avg_expr_df), "\n")
cat("Hybrid vs CD45Immune correlation:", round(corr_hybrid_cd45, 3), "\n")
cat("Hybrid vs EpcamTumor correlation:", round(corr_hybrid_epcam, 3), "\n")
cat("High in all cell types:", nrow(high_in_all), "\n")
cat("Low in all cell types:", nrow(low_in_all), "\n")
cat("Hybrid-specific genes:", nrow(hybrid_specific), "\n")
cat("CD45Immune-specific genes:", nrow(cd45_specific), "\n")
cat("EpcamTumor-specific genes:", nrow(epcam_specific), "\n")
cat("Top genes for visualization:", length(top_genes), "\n")
```


# [OutDated] Gene Signature for Export
```{r}
# ========================================
# PART 1: Data Preparation and Cell Subsetting
# ========================================

# Check if WellCellType exists in metadata
if(!"WellCellType" %in% colnames(merged_data_all_7@meta.data)) {
  stop("WellCellType column not found in metadata. Please check column name.")
}

# Check available cell types
table(merged_data_all_7$WellCellType)

# Define Hybrid cells (CHC + THC) and Control cells (CD45Immune + EpcamTumor)
Hybrid_cells <- WhichCells(merged_data_all_7, expression = WellCellType %in% c("CHC", "THC"))
Control_cells <- WhichCells(merged_data_all_7, expression = WellCellType %in% c("CD45Immune", "EpcamTumor"))

# Check if cells were found
cat("Hybrid cells found:", length(Hybrid_cells), "\n")
cat("Control cells found:", length(Control_cells), "\n")

if(length(Hybrid_cells) == 0 | length(Control_cells) == 0) {
  stop("No cells found for one or more groups. Check cell type names.")
}

# Create subsets
Hybrid_subset <- subset(merged_data_all_7, cells = Hybrid_cells)
Control_subset <- subset(merged_data_all_7, cells = Control_cells)

# Add group labels to metadata for differential expression analysis
merged_data_all_7$CellGroup <- ifelse(colnames(merged_data_all_7) %in% Hybrid_cells, "Hybrid", "Control")

# Check group assignment
table(merged_data_all_7$CellGroup)

# ========================================
# PART 2: Differential Expression Analysis
# ========================================

# Join layers in the Seurat object
cat("Joining layers in Seurat object...\n")
merged_data_all_7 <- JoinLayers(merged_data_all_7)

# Set identity to the new group variable
Idents(merged_data_all_7) <- "CellGroup"

# Run differential expression analysis: Hybrid vs Control
cat("Running differential expression analysis...\n")
hybrid_markers <- FindMarkers(
  merged_data_all_7,
  ident.1 = "Hybrid",
  ident.2 = "Control",
  test.use = "wilcox",
  logfc.threshold = 0.25,
  min.pct = 0.1,
  verbose = TRUE
)

# Add gene names as a column
hybrid_markers$gene <- rownames(hybrid_markers)

# Sort by log fold change (descending)
hybrid_markers <- hybrid_markers[order(hybrid_markers$avg_log2FC, decreasing = TRUE), ]

cat("Total differentially expressed genes:", nrow(hybrid_markers), "\n")
cat("Upregulated in Hybrids (log2FC > 0):", sum(hybrid_markers$avg_log2FC > 0), "\n")
cat("Downregulated in Hybrids (log2FC < 0):", sum(hybrid_markers$avg_log2FC < 0), "\n")

# ========================================
# PART 3: Gene Signature Creation
# ========================================

# Define criteria for signature genes
min_log2fc <- 0.5        # Minimum absolute log2 fold change
max_padj <- 0.05         # Maximum adjusted p-value
min_pct_diff <- 0.1      # Minimum difference in percentage of cells expressing

# Filter for high-quality markers
signature_candidates <- hybrid_markers[
  abs(hybrid_markers$avg_log2FC) >= min_log2fc &
  hybrid_markers$p_val_adj <= max_padj &
  abs(hybrid_markers$pct.1 - hybrid_markers$pct.2) >= min_pct_diff,
]

cat("Signature candidates after filtering:", nrow(signature_candidates), "\n")

# Separate into upregulated and downregulated
hybrid_upregulated <- signature_candidates[signature_candidates$avg_log2FC > 0, ]
hybrid_downregulated <- signature_candidates[signature_candidates$avg_log2FC < 0, ]

cat("Upregulated signature genes:", nrow(hybrid_upregulated), "\n")
cat("Downregulated signature genes:", nrow(hybrid_downregulated), "\n")

# Create final gene signature lists
# Top upregulated genes (limit to reasonable number for signature)
n_genes_per_direction <- 50  # Adjust this number as needed

hybrid_signature_up <- head(hybrid_upregulated$gene, n_genes_per_direction)
hybrid_signature_down <- head(hybrid_downregulated$gene, n_genes_per_direction)

# Combined signature
hybrid_signature_all <- c(hybrid_signature_up, hybrid_signature_down)

cat("\n=== FINAL GENE SIGNATURE ===\n")
cat("Upregulated genes in signature:", length(hybrid_signature_up), "\n")
cat("Downregulated genes in signature:", length(hybrid_signature_down), "\n")
cat("Total signature genes:", length(hybrid_signature_all), "\n")

# ========================================
# PART 4: Signature Quality Assessment
# ========================================

# Display top genes
cat("\n=== TOP UPREGULATED GENES ===\n")
top_up <- head(hybrid_upregulated, 10)
for(i in 1:nrow(top_up)) {
  cat(sprintf("%s: log2FC=%.3f, adj.p=%.2e, pct.hybrid=%.3f, pct.control=%.3f\n",
             top_up$gene[i], top_up$avg_log2FC[i], top_up$p_val_adj[i],
             top_up$pct.1[i], top_up$pct.2[i]))
}

cat("\n=== TOP DOWNREGULATED GENES ===\n")
top_down <- head(hybrid_downregulated, 10)
for(i in 1:nrow(top_down)) {
  cat(sprintf("%s: log2FC=%.3f, adj.p=%.2e, pct.hybrid=%.3f, pct.control=%.3f\n",
             top_down$gene[i], top_down$avg_log2FC[i], top_down$p_val_adj[i],
             top_down$pct.1[i], top_down$pct.2[i]))
}

# ========================================
# PART 5: Visualization
# ========================================

# Volcano plot
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)

# Prepare data for volcano plot
volcano_data <- hybrid_markers
volcano_data$significance <- ifelse(volcano_data$p_val_adj < 0.05 & abs(volcano_data$avg_log2FC) > 0.5,
                                   "Significant", "Not Significant")
volcano_data$direction <- ifelse(volcano_data$avg_log2FC > 0.5 & volcano_data$p_val_adj < 0.05, "Up",
                               ifelse(volcano_data$avg_log2FC < -0.5 & volcano_data$p_val_adj < 0.05, "Down", "NS"))

# Add labels for top genes
top_genes_to_label <- c(head(hybrid_upregulated$gene, 5), head(hybrid_downregulated$gene, 5))
volcano_data$label <- ifelse(volcano_data$gene %in% top_genes_to_label, volcano_data$gene, "")

# Create volcano plot
p_volcano <- ggplot(volcano_data, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj))) +
  geom_point(aes(color = direction), alpha = 0.6, size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Up" = "red", "Down" = "blue", "NS" = "gray")) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = label), size = 3, max.overlaps = 20) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Hybrid vs Control Cells - Volcano Plot",
       x = "Average log2 Fold Change",
       y = "-log10(Adjusted P-value)",
       color = "Regulation") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_volcano)

# Dot plot of signature genes
if(length(hybrid_signature_all) > 0) {
  # Limit to top genes for visualization
  top_signature_genes <- c(head(hybrid_signature_up, 10), head(hybrid_signature_down, 10))

  p_signature <- DotPlot(
    merged_data_all_7,
    features = top_signature_genes,
    group.by = "CellGroup",
    dot.scale = 8
  ) +
    scale_color_gradient(low = "lightblue", high = "darkred") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "Hybrid Cell Signature Genes",
         x = "Genes", y = "Cell Group") +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

  print(p_signature)
}

# ========================================
# PART 6: Export Gene Signature
# ========================================

# Create signature data frame for export
signature_df <- data.frame(
  Gene = hybrid_signature_all,
  Direction = c(rep("Up", length(hybrid_signature_up)),
                rep("Down", length(hybrid_signature_down))),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Add statistics for signature genes
signature_stats <- hybrid_markers[hybrid_markers$gene %in% hybrid_signature_all,
                                 c("gene", "avg_log2FC", "p_val_adj", "pct.1", "pct.2")]
colnames(signature_stats) <- c("Gene", "Log2FC", "Adj_Pvalue", "Pct_Hybrid", "Pct_Control")

signature_export <- merge(signature_df, signature_stats, by = "Gene")
signature_export <- signature_export[order(signature_export$Log2FC, decreasing = TRUE), ]

# Print signature for copying
cat("\n=== GENE SIGNATURE FOR EXPORT ===\n")
cat("Upregulated genes:\n")
cat(paste(hybrid_signature_up, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")
cat("Downregulated genes:\n")
cat(paste(hybrid_signature_down, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")

# Summary statistics
cat("=== SIGNATURE SUMMARY ===\n")
cat("Total signature genes:", nrow(signature_export), "\n")
cat("Upregulated genes:", sum(signature_export$Direction == "Up"), "\n")
cat("Downregulated genes:", sum(signature_export$Direction == "Down"), "\n")
cat("Mean absolute log2FC:", round(mean(abs(signature_export$Log2FC)), 3), "\n")
cat("Range of log2FC:", round(min(signature_export$Log2FC), 3), "to", round(max(signature_export$Log2FC), 3), "\n")

# Optional: Save to files
write.csv(signature_export, "hybrid_cell_signature.csv", row.names = FALSE)
# write.table(hybrid_signature_up, "hybrid_signature_upregulated.txt",
#            row.names = FALSE, col.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)
# write.table(hybrid_signature_down, "hybrid_signature_downregulated.txt",
#            row.names = FALSE, col.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)

cat("\nGene signature generation complete!\n")
```

# Improved Hybrid Gene Modules
```{r}
# ========================================
# COMPREHENSIVE CELL TYPE GENE MODULE GENERATION
# ========================================
# This script generates gene modules for:
# - THC vs CD45Immune, THC vs EpcamTumor
# - CHC (all) vs CD45Immune, CHC (all) vs EpcamTumor
# - CHC1 vs CD45Immune, CHC1 vs EpcamTumor
# - CHC2 vs CD45Immune, CHC2 vs EpcamTumor
# - CHC3 vs CD45Immune, CHC3 vs EpcamTumor

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(dplyr)

# ========================================
# PART 1: Data Preparation and Validation
# ========================================

# Check if required columns exist
required_cols <- c("RefinedCellType", "WellCellType")
missing_cols <- required_cols[!required_cols %in% colnames(merged_data_all_7@meta.data)]
if(length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(paste("Missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
}

# Check available cell types
cat("=== CELL TYPE DISTRIBUTION ===\n")
cat("RefinedCellType counts:\n")
print(table(merged_data_all_7$RefinedCellType))
cat("\nWellCellType counts:\n")
print(table(merged_data_all_7$WellCellType))

# Define cell groups for analysis
target_groups <- c("THC", "CHC1", "CHC2", "CHC3")
control_groups <- c("CD45Immune", "EpcamTumor")

# Get all CHC cells (CHC1 + CHC2 + CHC3) for combined analysis
all_chc_cells <- WhichCells(merged_data_all_7, expression = RefinedCellType %in% c("CHC1", "CHC2", "CHC3"))
cat("Total CHC cells found:", length(all_chc_cells), "\n")

# Validate cell counts for each group
for(group in c(target_groups, control_groups)) {
  if(group %in% c("CHC1", "CHC2", "CHC3", "THC")) {
    cell_count <- sum(merged_data_all_7$RefinedCellType == group)
  } else {
    cell_count <- sum(merged_data_all_7$WellCellType == group)
  }
  cat(paste(group, "cells:", cell_count, "\n"))

  if(cell_count < 10) {
    warning(paste("Very few cells in group", group, "- results may be unreliable"))
  }
}

# Join layers in the Seurat object
cat("Joining layers in Seurat object...\n")
merged_data_all_7 <- JoinLayers(merged_data_all_7)

# ========================================
# PART 2: Differential Expression Analysis Functions
# ========================================

# Function to run differential expression analysis
run_differential_analysis <- function(seurat_obj, group1, group2, group1_column = "RefinedCellType", group2_column = "WellCellType") {
  cat(paste("Running DE analysis:", group1, "vs", group2, "\n"))

  # Get cells for each group using direct metadata access
  if(group1 == "CHC_all") {
    group1_cells <- rownames(seurat_obj@meta.data)[seurat_obj@meta.data$RefinedCellType %in% c("CHC1", "CHC2", "CHC3")]
  } else {
    group1_cells <- rownames(seurat_obj@meta.data)[seurat_obj@meta.data[[group1_column]] == group1]
  }

  group2_cells <- rownames(seurat_obj@meta.data)[seurat_obj@meta.data[[group2_column]] == group2]

  cat(paste("Group1 (", group1, ") cells:", length(group1_cells), "\n"))
  cat(paste("Group2 (", group2, ") cells:", length(group2_cells), "\n"))

  if(length(group1_cells) < 3 | length(group2_cells) < 3) {
    warning(paste("Insufficient cells for comparison:", group1, "vs", group2))
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Create temporary grouping variable
  temp_group <- rep("Other", ncol(seurat_obj))
  temp_group[match(group1_cells, colnames(seurat_obj))] <- "Target"
  temp_group[match(group2_cells, colnames(seurat_obj))] <- "Control"

  seurat_obj$temp_comparison <- temp_group

  # Set identity and run FindMarkers
  Idents(seurat_obj) <- "temp_comparison"

  tryCatch({
    markers <- FindMarkers(
      seurat_obj,
      ident.1 = "Target",
      ident.2 = "Control",
      test.use = "wilcox",
      logfc.threshold = 0.25,
      min.pct = 0.1,
      verbose = FALSE,
      only.pos = FALSE
    )

    # Add gene names and comparison info
    markers$gene <- rownames(markers)
    markers$comparison <- paste(group1, "vs", group2, sep = "_")
    markers$target_group <- group1
    markers$control_group <- group2

    # Sort by log fold change
    markers <- markers[order(markers$avg_log2FC, decreasing = TRUE), ]

    cat(paste("Found", nrow(markers), "DE genes\n"))
    cat(paste("Upregulated:", sum(markers$avg_log2FC > 0), "\n"))
    cat(paste("Downregulated:", sum(markers$avg_log2FC < 0), "\n"))

    return(markers)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(paste("Error in DE analysis for", group1, "vs", group2, ":", e$message, "\n"))
    return(NULL)
  })
}

# Function to create gene signature from DE results
create_gene_signature <- function(de_results, min_log2fc = 0.5, max_padj = 0.05,
                                 min_pct_diff = 0.1, n_genes_per_direction = 50) {
  if(is.null(de_results) || nrow(de_results) == 0) {
    return(list(up = character(0), down = character(0), all = character(0), stats = NULL))
  }

  # Filter for high-quality markers
  signature_candidates <- de_results[
    abs(de_results$avg_log2FC) >= min_log2fc &
    de_results$p_val_adj <= max_padj &
    abs(de_results$pct.1 - de_results$pct.2) >= min_pct_diff,
  ]

  if(nrow(signature_candidates) == 0) {
    cat("No genes meet signature criteria\n")
    return(list(up = character(0), down = character(0), all = character(0), stats = NULL))
  }

  # Separate up and down regulated
  up_genes <- signature_candidates[signature_candidates$avg_log2FC > 0, ]
  down_genes <- signature_candidates[signature_candidates$avg_log2FC < 0, ]

  # Get top genes
  signature_up <- head(up_genes$gene, n_genes_per_direction)
  signature_down <- head(down_genes$gene, n_genes_per_direction)
  signature_all <- c(signature_up, signature_down)

  # Create stats summary
  stats_summary <- data.frame(
    total_de_genes = nrow(de_results),
    signature_candidates = nrow(signature_candidates),
    upregulated = length(signature_up),
    downregulated = length(signature_down),
    total_signature = length(signature_all),
    mean_abs_log2fc = round(mean(abs(signature_candidates$avg_log2FC)), 3),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  return(list(
    up = signature_up,
    down = signature_down,
    all = signature_all,
    stats = stats_summary,
    candidates = signature_candidates
  ))
}

# ========================================
# PART 3: Run All Comparisons
# ========================================

# Initialize storage for results
all_de_results <- list()
all_signatures <- list()

# Define all comparisons to perform
comparisons <- list()

# Add individual cell type comparisons
for(target in target_groups) {
  for(control in control_groups) {
    comp_name <- paste(target, control, sep = "_vs_")
    comparisons[[comp_name]] <- list(target = target, control = control)
  }
}

# Add combined CHC comparisons
for(control in control_groups) {
  comp_name <- paste("CHC_all", control, sep = "_vs_")
  comparisons[[comp_name]] <- list(target = "CHC_all", control = control)
}

# Run all comparisons
cat("\n=== RUNNING DIFFERENTIAL EXPRESSION ANALYSES ===\n")
for(comp_name in names(comparisons)) {
  cat(paste("\n--- Processing:", comp_name, "---\n"))

  comp <- comparisons[[comp_name]]

  # Run DE analysis
  de_result <- run_differential_analysis(
    merged_data_all_7,
    comp$target,
    comp$control,
    group1_column = "RefinedCellType",
    group2_column = "WellCellType"
  )

  if(!is.null(de_result)) {
    all_de_results[[comp_name]] <- de_result

    # Create gene signature
    signature <- create_gene_signature(de_result)
    all_signatures[[comp_name]] <- signature

    # Print summary
    cat(paste("Signature genes:", signature$stats$total_signature,
              "(", signature$stats$upregulated, "up,",
              signature$stats$downregulated, "down)\n"))
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 4: Summary and Visualization
# ========================================

cat("\n=== ANALYSIS SUMMARY ===\n")
summary_df <- data.frame(
  Comparison = character(),
  Total_DE_Genes = numeric(),
  Signature_Up = numeric(),
  Signature_Down = numeric(),
  Total_Signature = numeric(),
  Mean_AbsLog2FC = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for(comp_name in names(all_signatures)) {
  if(!is.null(all_signatures[[comp_name]]$stats)) {
    stats <- all_signatures[[comp_name]]$stats
    summary_df <- rbind(summary_df, data.frame(
      Comparison = comp_name,
      Total_DE_Genes = stats$total_de_genes,
      Signature_Up = stats$upregulated,
      Signature_Down = stats$downregulated,
      Total_Signature = stats$total_signature,
      Mean_AbsLog2FC = stats$mean_abs_log2fc,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
}

print(summary_df)

# ========================================
# PART 5: Create Visualizations
# ========================================

# Function to create volcano plot
create_volcano_plot <- function(de_data, title_suffix) {
  if(is.null(de_data) || nrow(de_data) == 0) return(NULL)

  volcano_data <- de_data
  volcano_data$significance <- ifelse(volcano_data$p_val_adj < 0.05 & abs(volcano_data$avg_log2FC) > 0.5,
                                     "Significant", "Not Significant")
  volcano_data$direction <- ifelse(volcano_data$avg_log2FC > 0.5 & volcano_data$p_val_adj < 0.05, "Up",
                                 ifelse(volcano_data$avg_log2FC < -0.5 & volcano_data$p_val_adj < 0.05, "Down", "NS"))

  # Label top genes
  top_up <- head(volcano_data[volcano_data$direction == "Up", ], 3)
  top_down <- head(volcano_data[volcano_data$direction == "Down", ], 3)
  volcano_data$label <- ifelse(volcano_data$gene %in% c(top_up$gene, top_down$gene),
                              volcano_data$gene, "")

  p <- ggplot(volcano_data, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = direction), alpha = 0.6, size = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Up" = "red", "Down" = "blue", "NS" = "gray")) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = label), size = 3, max.overlaps = 10) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = paste("Volcano Plot:", title_suffix),
         x = "Average log2 Fold Change",
         y = "-log10(Adjusted P-value)",
         color = "Regulation") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  return(p)
}

# Create volcano plots for key comparisons
key_comparisons <- names(all_de_results)[1:min(6, length(all_de_results))]
volcano_plots <- list()

for(comp_name in key_comparisons) {
  if(!is.null(all_de_results[[comp_name]])) {
    p <- create_volcano_plot(all_de_results[[comp_name]], comp_name)
    if(!is.null(p)) {
      volcano_plots[[comp_name]] <- p
      print(p)
    }
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 6: Export Gene Signatures
# ========================================

# Create comprehensive export data
export_signatures <- list()

for(comp_name in names(all_signatures)) {
  sig <- all_signatures[[comp_name]]
  if(length(sig$all) > 0) {
    export_df <- data.frame(
      Comparison = comp_name,
      Gene = sig$all,
      Direction = c(rep("Up", length(sig$up)), rep("Down", length(sig$down))),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    # Add statistics
    if(!is.null(sig$candidates)) {
      stats_subset <- sig$candidates[sig$candidates$gene %in% sig$all,
                                   c("gene", "avg_log2FC", "p_val_adj", "pct.1", "pct.2")]
      colnames(stats_subset) <- c("Gene", "Log2FC", "Adj_Pvalue", "Pct_Target", "Pct_Control")
      export_df <- merge(export_df, stats_subset, by = "Gene")
      export_df <- export_df[order(export_df$Log2FC, decreasing = TRUE), ]
    }

    export_signatures[[comp_name]] <- export_df
  }
}

# Print signatures for each comparison
cat("\n=== GENE SIGNATURES FOR EXPORT ===\n")
for(comp_name in names(export_signatures)) {
  cat(paste("\n--- ", comp_name, " ---\n"))
  sig_data <- export_signatures[[comp_name]]

  up_genes <- sig_data$Gene[sig_data$Direction == "Up"]
  down_genes <- sig_data$Gene[sig_data$Direction == "Down"]

  cat("Upregulated genes (", length(up_genes), "):\n")
  if(length(up_genes) > 0) {
    cat(paste(up_genes, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }

  cat("Downregulated genes (", length(down_genes), "):\n")
  if(length(down_genes) > 0) {
    cat(paste(down_genes, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
}

# Save results to files
cat("\n=== SAVING RESULTS ===\n")

# Save summary
write.csv(summary_df, "cell_type_signatures_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Save individual signatures
for(comp_name in names(export_signatures)) {
  filename <- paste0("signature_", gsub("_vs_", "_vs_", comp_name), ".csv")
  write.csv(export_signatures[[comp_name]], filename, row.names = FALSE)
  cat(paste("Saved:", filename, "\n"))
}

# Save all DE results
for(comp_name in names(all_de_results)) {
  filename <- paste0("DE_results_", gsub("_vs_", "_vs_", comp_name), ".csv")
  write.csv(all_de_results[[comp_name]], filename, row.names = FALSE)
}

# Create a master signature file with all comparisons
master_signature <- do.call(rbind, export_signatures)
write.csv(master_signature, "master_gene_signatures.csv", row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n=== ANALYSIS COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("Generated signatures for", length(export_signatures), "comparisons\n")
cat("Files saved:\n")
cat("- cell_type_signatures_summary.csv\n")
cat("- master_gene_signatures.csv\n")
cat("- Individual signature and DE results files\n")

# Display final summary
cat("\n=== FINAL SUMMARY ===\n")
```
