```{r}
for(comp_name in names(all_signatures)) {
  sig <- all_signatures[[comp_name]]
  if(!is.null(sig$stats)) {
    cat(paste(comp_name, ":", sig$stats$total_signature, "signature genes\n"))
  }
}
```

# 250725: Apply Gene signature to 10x Set Post Harmony 
```{r}
# ========================================
# PART 0: Signature Scoring Function - FIXED for Seurat 5.0.2
# ========================================

# Load Seurat object
merged_seurat_hmm <- readRDS(file = "/Users/queitsch/Documents/AdeyLab/1_Hybrid_Fusion/SmartSeq_CRC177_DeepSeq/10xCompliment/CRC176B_filtered_feature_bc_matrix/merged_hybridfusionseq_harmony.rds")

# Load the gene signatures CSV
signature_export <- read.csv("/Users/queitsch/Documents/AdeyLab/1_Hybrid_Fusion/SmartSeq_CRC177_DeepSeq/master_gene_signatures.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Define the 10 signatures plus the combined hybrid
signatures <- c(
  "THC_vs_CD45Immune",
  "THC_vs_EpcamTumor",
  "CHC1_vs_CD45Immune",
  "CHC1_vs_EpcamTumor",
  "CHC2_vs_CD45Immune",
  "CHC2_vs_EpcamTumor",
  "CHC3_vs_CD45Immune",
  "CHC3_vs_EpcamTumor",
  "CHC_all_vs_CD45Immune",
  "CHC_all_vs_EpcamTumor",
  "Combined_Hybrid" # For the original combined signature
)

# Initialize a list to store gene lists for each signature
signature_gene_lists <- list()

# ========================================
# PART 1: Prepare Gene Signature Lists
# ========================================

for (sig in signatures) {
  if (sig == "Combined_Hybrid") {
    # For the combined hybrid, use all upregulated and downregulated genes
    up_genes <- signature_export$Gene[signature_export$Direction == "Up"]
    down_genes <- signature_export$Gene[signature_export$Direction == "Down"]
  } else {
    # For specific signatures, filter by Comparison
    up_genes <- signature_export$Gene[signature_export$Comparison == sig & signature_export$Direction == "Up"]
    down_genes <- signature_export$Gene[signature_export$Comparison == sig & signature_export$Direction == "Down"]
  }

  # Check which genes are present in the dataset
  genes_in_data_up <- up_genes[up_genes %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]
  genes_in_data_down <- down_genes[down_genes %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]
  missing_genes_up <- up_genes[!up_genes %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]
  missing_genes_down <- down_genes[!down_genes %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]

  # Store gene lists
  signature_gene_lists[[sig]] <- list(
    Up = genes_in_data_up,
    Down = genes_in_data_down
  )

  # Print summary
  cat("\nSignature:", sig, "\n")
  cat("Upregulated genes:", length(up_genes), "\n")
  cat("Downregulated genes:", length(down_genes), "\n")
  cat("Upregulated genes in dataset:", length(genes_in_data_up), "of", length(up_genes), "\n")
  cat("Downregulated genes in dataset:", length(genes_in_data_down), "of", length(down_genes), "\n")
  if (length(missing_genes_up) > 0) {
    cat("Missing upregulated genes:", paste(missing_genes_up, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
  if (length(missing_genes_down) > 0) {
    cat("Missing downregulated genes:", paste(missing_genes_down, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 2: Calculate Signature Scores
# ========================================

# Set default assay - Updated for Seurat v5
if ("SCT" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@assays)) {
  DefaultAssay(merged_seurat_hmm) <- "SCT"
  # For Seurat v5, use 'data' layer
  expr_data <- LayerData(merged_seurat_hmm, assay = "SCT", layer = "data")
} else {
  DefaultAssay(merged_seurat_hmm) <- "RNA"
  # For Seurat v5, use 'data' layer
  expr_data <- LayerData(merged_seurat_hmm, assay = "RNA", layer = "data")
}

# Loop through each signature to calculate scores
for (sig in signatures) {
  cat("\n=== Processing signature:", sig, "===\n")

  # Extract gene lists
  genes_in_data_up <- signature_gene_lists[[sig]]$Up
  genes_in_data_down <- signature_gene_lists[[sig]]$Down

  # Skip if no genes available
  if (length(genes_in_data_up) == 0 && length(genes_in_data_down) == 0) {
    cat("No valid genes for", sig, "- skipping.\n")
    next
  }

  # Create unique score names
  score_name_up <- paste0(sig, "_Up_Score")
  score_name_down <- paste0(sig, "_Down_Score")
  score_name_combined <- paste0(sig, "_Module_Score")

  # Method 1: Using AddModuleScore with proper gene list structure
  gene_lists <- list()
  if (length(genes_in_data_up) > 0) {
    gene_lists[["Up"]] <- genes_in_data_up
  }
  if (length(genes_in_data_down) > 0) {
    gene_lists[["Down"]] <- genes_in_data_down
  }

  if (length(gene_lists) > 0) {
    # Calculate control size
    ctrl_size <- min(100, max(length(genes_in_data_up), length(genes_in_data_down), 5))

    merged_seurat_hmm <- AddModuleScore(
      merged_seurat_hmm,
      features = gene_lists,
      name = paste0(sig, "_ModuleScore"),
      ctrl = ctrl_size,
      seed = 42
    )

    # Extract the scores and rename properly
    module_score_cols <- grep(paste0(sig, "_ModuleScore"), colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE)

    if ("Up" %in% names(gene_lists) && "Down" %in% names(gene_lists)) {
      # Both up and down genes present
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_up]] <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[module_score_cols[1]]]
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_down]] <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[module_score_cols[2]]]
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_combined]] <-
        merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_up]] - merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_down]]
    } else if ("Up" %in% names(gene_lists)) {
      # Only up genes present
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_up]] <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[module_score_cols[1]]]
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_down]] <- 0
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_combined]] <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_up]]
    } else if ("Down" %in% names(gene_lists)) {
      # Only down genes present
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_up]] <- 0
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_down]] <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[module_score_cols[1]]]
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_combined]] <- -merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_down]]
    }

    # Remove temporary module score columns
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, !colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data) %in% module_score_cols]
  }

  # Method 2: Manual calculation
  if (length(genes_in_data_up) > 0) {
    up_scores <- Matrix::colMeans(expr_data[genes_in_data_up, , drop = FALSE])
  } else {
    up_scores <- rep(0, ncol(expr_data))
  }

  if (length(genes_in_data_down) > 0) {
    down_scores <- Matrix::colMeans(expr_data[genes_in_data_down, , drop = FALSE])
  } else {
    down_scores <- rep(0, ncol(expr_data))
  }

  # Add manual scores
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(sig, "_Manual_Up_Score")]] <- up_scores
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(sig, "_Manual_Down_Score")]] <- down_scores
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(sig, "_Manual_Module_Score")]] <- up_scores - down_scores

  # Verify the score column exists before proceeding
  if (!score_name_combined %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cat("Warning: Score column", score_name_combined, "not found. Using manual score instead.\n")
    score_name_combined <- paste0(sig, "_Manual_Module_Score")
  }

  # Define thresholds for classification
  threshold_high <- quantile(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_combined]], 0.8, na.rm = TRUE)
  threshold_low <- quantile(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_combined]], 0.2, na.rm = TRUE)

  cat("High threshold (80th percentile):", round(threshold_high, 3), "\n")
  cat("Low threshold (20th percentile):", round(threshold_low, 3), "\n")

  # Classify cells
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(sig, "_Module_Class")]] <- ifelse(
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_combined]] >= threshold_high, "High_Module",
    ifelse(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_combined]] <= threshold_low, "Low_Module", "Medium_Module")
  )

  # Count cells in each category
  module_counts <- table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(sig, "_Module_Class")]])
  cat("Cell Classification for", sig, ":\n")
  print(module_counts)
}

# ========================================
# PART 3: Visualizations - FIXED
# ========================================

# Run UMAP if not already present
if (!"umap" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@reductions)) {
  cat("Running UMAP...\n")
  merged_seurat_hmm <- RunUMAP(merged_seurat_hmm, dims = 1:30, verbose = FALSE)
}

# Create visualizations for each signature
for (sig in signatures) {
  cat("\n=== Creating visualizations for", sig, "===\n")

  # Check which score column to use
  score_name_combined <- paste0(sig, "_Module_Score")
  if (!score_name_combined %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    score_name_combined <- paste0(sig, "_Manual_Module_Score")
  }

  class_name <- paste0(sig, "_Module_Class")

  # Skip if neither score column exists
  if (!score_name_combined %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cat("Skipping", sig, "- no score column found\n")
    next
  }

  # UMAP colored by module score
  p1 <- FeaturePlot(
    merged_seurat_hmm,
    features = score_name_combined,
    pt.size = 0.5,
    cols = c("blue", "lightgray", "red")
  ) +
    ggtitle(paste(sig, "Module Score")) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5))

  # UMAP colored by module classification (if class column exists)
  if (class_name %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    p2 <- DimPlot(
      merged_seurat_hmm,
      group.by = class_name,
      pt.size = 0.5,
      cols = c("High_Module" = "red", "Medium_Module" = "gray", "Low_Module" = "blue")
    ) +
      ggtitle(paste(sig, "Module Classification")) +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5))

    # Combine UMAP plots
    combined_umap <- p1 | p2
    print(combined_umap)
  } else {
    print(p1)
  }

  # Distribution of module scores
  p3 <- ggplot(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data, aes(.data[[score_name_combined]])) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 50, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(
      quantile(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_combined]], 0.2, na.rm = TRUE),
      quantile(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_combined]], 0.8, na.rm = TRUE)
    ), linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
    labs(title = paste("Distribution of", sig, "Module Scores"),
         x = "Module Score", y = "Number of Cells") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5))

  print(p3)

  # Violin plot by clusters (if clusters exist)
  if ("seurat_clusters" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    p4 <- VlnPlot(
      merged_seurat_hmm,
      features = score_name_combined,
      group.by = "seurat_clusters",
      pt.size = 0
    ) +
      ggtitle(paste(sig, "Module Scores by Cluster")) +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5))

    print(p4)
  }

  # Heatmap of signature genes in high-scoring cells
  if (class_name %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    top_genes <- c(head(signature_gene_lists[[sig]]$Up, 10), head(signature_gene_lists[[sig]]$Down, 10))

    # Use direct indexing instead of WhichCells with expression
    high_score_mask <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[class_name]] == "High_Module"
    high_score_cells <- colnames(merged_seurat_hmm)[which(high_score_mask)]

    if (length(high_score_cells) > 100) {
      high_score_cells <- sample(high_score_cells, 100)
    }

    if (length(top_genes) > 0 & length(high_score_cells) > 10) {
      tryCatch({
        p5 <- DoHeatmap(
          merged_seurat_hmm,
          features = top_genes,
          cells = high_score_cells,
          group.by = class_name,
          size = 3
        ) +
          ggtitle(paste(sig, "Module Genes in High-Scoring Cells")) +
          theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5))

        print(p5)
      }, error = function(e) {
        cat("Could not create heatmap for", sig, ":", e$message, "\n")
      })
    }
  }

  # Feature plots for top signature genes
  top_up_genes <- head(signature_gene_lists[[sig]]$Up, 4)
  top_down_genes <- head(signature_gene_lists[[sig]]$Down, 4)

  if (length(top_up_genes) > 0) {
    tryCatch({
      p6 <- FeaturePlot(
        merged_seurat_hmm,
        features = top_up_genes,
        ncol = 2,
        pt.size = 0.3
      )
      print(p6)
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("Could not create feature plot for up genes in", sig, ":", e$message, "\n")
    })
  }

  if (length(top_down_genes) > 0) {
    tryCatch({
      p7 <- FeaturePlot(
        merged_seurat_hmm,
        features = top_down_genes,
        ncol = 2,
        pt.size = 0.3
      )
      print(p7)
    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("Could not create feature plot for down genes in", sig, ":", e$message, "\n")
    })
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 4: Summary and Export
# ========================================

# Create a comprehensive summary data frame
cell_summary <- data.frame(
  Cell_ID = colnames(merged_seurat_hmm),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Add scores and classifications for each signature
for (sig in signatures) {
  # Check which columns actually exist
  score_col <- paste0(sig, "_Module_Score")
  if (!score_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    score_col <- paste0(sig, "_Manual_Module_Score")
  }

  if (score_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cell_summary[[paste0(sig, "_Module_Score")]] <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col]]
  }

  class_col <- paste0(sig, "_Module_Class")
  if (class_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cell_summary[[paste0(sig, "_Module_Class")]] <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[class_col]]
  }

  # Add other score columns if they exist
  up_col <- paste0(sig, "_Up_Score")
  down_col <- paste0(sig, "_Down_Score")
  manual_col <- paste0(sig, "_Manual_Module_Score")

  if (up_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cell_summary[[up_col]] <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[up_col]]
  }
  if (down_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cell_summary[[down_col]] <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[down_col]]
  }
  if (manual_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    cell_summary[[manual_col]] <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[manual_col]]
  }
}

# Add UMAP coordinates if available
if ("umap" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@reductions)) {
  umap_coords <- Embeddings(merged_seurat_hmm, reduction = "umap")
  cell_summary$UMAP_1 <- umap_coords[, 1]
  cell_summary$UMAP_2 <- umap_coords[, 2]
}

# Print summary statistics for each signature
cat("\n=== FINAL SUMMARY ===\n")
cat("Total cells analyzed:", nrow(cell_summary), "\n")
for (sig in signatures) {
  class_col <- paste0(sig, "_Module_Class")
  score_col <- paste0(sig, "_Module_Score")

  if (class_col %in% colnames(cell_summary)) {
    cat("\nModule:", sig, "\n")
    cat("High module cells:", sum(cell_summary[[class_col]] == "High_Module", na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
    cat("Medium module cells:", sum(cell_summary[[class_col]] == "Medium_Module", na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
    cat("Low module cells:", sum(cell_summary[[class_col]] == "Low_Module", na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

    if (score_col %in% colnames(cell_summary)) {
      cat("Mean module score:", round(mean(cell_summary[[score_col]], na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
      cat("Score range:", round(min(cell_summary[[score_col]], na.rm = TRUE), 3), "to",
          round(max(cell_summary[[score_col]], na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
    }
  }
}

# Optional: Save results
# write.csv(cell_summary, "all_modules_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
# saveRDS(merged_seurat_hmm, "merged_seurat_with_all_modules.rds")

cat("\nModule application complete!\n")
cat("The module scores for all signatures are now stored in your Seurat object metadata.\n")
cat("Available columns in metadata:\n")
print(colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)[grep("Module|Score", colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data))])
```
# Combined Modules?
```{r}
# ========================================
# PART 5: Combined Hybrid Module Analysis
# ========================================

# Define hybrid subsets and their corresponding module pairs
hybrid_combinations <- list(
  "CHC1_Combined" = c("CHC1_vs_CD45Immune", "CHC1_vs_EpcamTumor"),
  "CHC2_Combined" = c("CHC2_vs_CD45Immune", "CHC2_vs_EpcamTumor"),
  "CHC3_Combined" = c("CHC3_vs_CD45Immune", "CHC3_vs_EpcamTumor"),
  "THC_Combined" = c("THC_vs_CD45Immune", "THC_vs_EpcamTumor")
)

# ========================================
# Method 1: Average of Module Scores
# ========================================

cat("\n=== Creating Combined Hybrid Module Scores ===\n")

for (hybrid_name in names(hybrid_combinations)) {
  cat("\nProcessing:", hybrid_name, "\n")

  # Get the two constituent modules
  module1 <- hybrid_combinations[[hybrid_name]][1]
  module2 <- hybrid_combinations[[hybrid_name]][2]

  # Check which score columns exist for each module
  score_col1 <- paste0(module1, "_Module_Score")
  score_col2 <- paste0(module2, "_Module_Score")

  if (!score_col1 %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    score_col1 <- paste0(module1, "_Manual_Module_Score")
  }
  if (!score_col2 %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    score_col2 <- paste0(module2, "_Manual_Module_Score")
  }

  # Check if both score columns exist
  if (score_col1 %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data) &&
      score_col2 %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {

    # Method 1: Simple average
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(hybrid_name, "_Average_Score")]] <-
      (merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col1]] + merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col2]]) / 2

    # Method 2: Weighted average (giving equal weight, but could be adjusted)
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(hybrid_name, "_Weighted_Score")]] <-
      0.5 * merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col1]] + 0.5 * merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col2]]

    # Method 3: Maximum of the two scores (most permissive)
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(hybrid_name, "_Max_Score")]] <-
      pmax(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col1]], merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col2]])

    # Method 4: Minimum of the two scores (most restrictive)
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(hybrid_name, "_Min_Score")]] <-
      pmin(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col1]], merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col2]])

    # Method 5: Geometric mean (good for multiplicative effects)
    # Add small constant to avoid issues with negative values
    offset <- abs(min(c(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col1]],
                       merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col2]]), na.rm = TRUE)) + 0.1

    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(hybrid_name, "_GeomMean_Score")]] <-
      sqrt((merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col1]] + offset) *
           (merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col2]] + offset)) - offset

    # Create classifications based on average score
    combined_score_col <- paste0(hybrid_name, "_Average_Score")
    threshold_high <- quantile(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[combined_score_col]], 0.8, na.rm = TRUE)
    threshold_low <- quantile(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[combined_score_col]], 0.2, na.rm = TRUE)

    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(hybrid_name, "_Class")]] <- ifelse(
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[combined_score_col]] >= threshold_high, "High_Combined",
      ifelse(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[combined_score_col]] <= threshold_low, "Low_Combined", "Medium_Combined")
    )

    # Print summary
    cat("Successfully created combined scores for", hybrid_name, "\n")
    cat("High combined cells:", sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(hybrid_name, "_Class")]] == "High_Combined", na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
    cat("Medium combined cells:", sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(hybrid_name, "_Class")]] == "Medium_Combined", na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
    cat("Low combined cells:", sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(hybrid_name, "_Class")]] == "Low_Combined", na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

    # Calculate correlation between the two constituent modules
    correlation <- cor(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col1]],
                      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col2]], use = "complete.obs")
    cat("Correlation between constituent modules:", round(correlation, 3), "\n")

  } else {
    cat("Warning: Could not find both score columns for", hybrid_name, "\n")
    cat("Looking for:", score_col1, "and", score_col2, "\n")
  }
}

# ========================================
# Method 2: Gene-level Combination
# ========================================

cat("\n=== Creating Gene-level Combined Signatures ===\n")

for (hybrid_name in names(hybrid_combinations)) {
  cat("\nProcessing gene-level combination for:", hybrid_name, "\n")

  # Get the two constituent modules
  module1 <- hybrid_combinations[[hybrid_name]][1]
  module2 <- hybrid_combinations[[hybrid_name]][2]

  # Combine gene lists from both modules
  combined_up_genes <- unique(c(signature_gene_lists[[module1]]$Up,
                               signature_gene_lists[[module2]]$Up))
  combined_down_genes <- unique(c(signature_gene_lists[[module1]]$Down,
                                 signature_gene_lists[[module2]]$Down))

  # Calculate module score using combined gene lists
  gene_lists_combined <- list()
  if (length(combined_up_genes) > 0) {
    gene_lists_combined[["Up"]] <- combined_up_genes
  }
  if (length(combined_down_genes) > 0) {
    gene_lists_combined[["Down"]] <- combined_down_genes
  }

  if (length(gene_lists_combined) > 0) {
    # Calculate control size
    ctrl_size <- min(100, max(length(combined_up_genes), length(combined_down_genes), 5))

    merged_seurat_hmm <- AddModuleScore(
      merged_seurat_hmm,
      features = gene_lists_combined,
      name = paste0(hybrid_name, "_GeneCombined"),
      ctrl = ctrl_size,
      seed = 42
    )

    # Extract and rename the scores
    module_score_cols <- grep(paste0(hybrid_name, "_GeneCombined"),
                             colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE)

    if (length(gene_lists_combined) == 2) {
      # Both up and down genes
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(hybrid_name, "_GeneCombined_Up")]] <-
        merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[module_score_cols[1]]]
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(hybrid_name, "_GeneCombined_Down")]] <-
        merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[module_score_cols[2]]]
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(hybrid_name, "_GeneCombined_Score")]] <-
        merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[module_score_cols[1]]] - merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[module_score_cols[2]]]
    } else if ("Up" %in% names(gene_lists_combined)) {
      # Only up genes
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(hybrid_name, "_GeneCombined_Score")]] <-
        merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[module_score_cols[1]]]
    } else {
      # Only down genes
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[paste0(hybrid_name, "_GeneCombined_Score")]] <-
        -merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[module_score_cols[1]]]
    }

    # Remove temporary columns
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, !colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data) %in% module_score_cols]

    cat("Gene-level combined signature created with", length(combined_up_genes), "up genes and",
        length(combined_down_genes), "down genes\n")
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 6: Visualizations for Combined Modules
# ========================================

cat("\n=== Creating Visualizations for Combined Modules ===\n")

for (hybrid_name in names(hybrid_combinations)) {
  cat("\nCreating visualizations for", hybrid_name, "\n")

  # Get constituent module names
  module1 <- hybrid_combinations[[hybrid_name]][1]
  module2 <- hybrid_combinations[[hybrid_name]][2]

  # Define score columns to visualize
  score_cols <- c(
    paste0(hybrid_name, "_Average_Score"),
    paste0(hybrid_name, "_Max_Score"),
    paste0(hybrid_name, "_Min_Score"),
    paste0(hybrid_name, "_GeneCombined_Score")
  )

  # Filter to existing columns
  existing_score_cols <- score_cols[score_cols %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]

  if (length(existing_score_cols) > 0) {
    # Create feature plots for different combination methods
    plot_list <- list()

    for (i in seq_along(existing_score_cols)) {
      score_col <- existing_score_cols[i]
      method_name <- gsub(paste0(hybrid_name, "_"), "", gsub("_Score", "", score_col))

      plot_list[[i]] <- FeaturePlot(
        merged_seurat_hmm,
        features = score_col,
        pt.size = 0.5,
        cols = c("blue", "lightgray", "red")
      ) +
        ggtitle(paste(hybrid_name, "-", method_name)) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
              aspect.ratio = 1)
    }

    # Combine plots
    if (length(plot_list) > 1) {
      combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plot_list, ncol = 2)
      print(combined_plot)
    } else {
      print(plot_list[[1]])
    }

    # Create comparison plot of constituent modules vs combined
    constituent_score_cols <- c(
      paste0(module1, "_Module_Score"),
      paste0(module2, "_Module_Score")
    )

    # Check if manual scores exist
    for (i in seq_along(constituent_score_cols)) {
      if (!constituent_score_cols[i] %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
        constituent_score_cols[i] <- gsub("_Module_Score", "_Manual_Module_Score", constituent_score_cols[i])
      }
    }

    # Filter to existing columns
    existing_constituent_cols <- constituent_score_cols[constituent_score_cols %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)]

    if (length(existing_constituent_cols) == 2) {
      # Create comparison plots
      p1 <- FeaturePlot(merged_seurat_hmm, features = existing_constituent_cols[1],
                       pt.size = 0.5, cols = c("blue", "lightgray", "red")) +
        ggtitle(gsub("_Module_Score|_Manual_Module_Score", "", existing_constituent_cols[1])) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
              aspect.ratio = 1)

      p2 <- FeaturePlot(merged_seurat_hmm, features = existing_constituent_cols[2],
                       pt.size = 0.5, cols = c("blue", "lightgray", "red")) +
        ggtitle(gsub("_Module_Score|_Manual_Module_Score", "", existing_constituent_cols[2])) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
              aspect.ratio = 1)

      p3 <- FeaturePlot(merged_seurat_hmm, features = existing_score_cols[1],
                       pt.size = 0.5, cols = c("blue", "lightgray", "red")) +
        ggtitle(paste(hybrid_name, "Combined")) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
              aspect.ratio = 1)

      comparison_plot <- p1 | p2 | p3
      print(comparison_plot)

      # Create scatter plot comparing the two constituent modules
      scatter_data <- data.frame(
        Module1 = merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[existing_constituent_cols[1]]],
        Module2 = merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[existing_constituent_cols[2]]],
        Combined = merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[existing_score_cols[1]]]
      )

      p4 <- ggplot(scatter_data, aes(x = Module1, y = Module2, color = Combined)) +
        geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 0.5) +
        scale_color_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "lightgray", high = "red", midpoint = 0) +
        labs(x = gsub("_Module_Score|_Manual_Module_Score", "", existing_constituent_cols[1]),
             y = gsub("_Module_Score|_Manual_Module_Score", "", existing_constituent_cols[2]),
             title = paste("Constituent Modules Comparison -", hybrid_name),
             color = "Combined\nScore") +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5)) +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black", linetype = "dashed")

      print(p4)
    }

    # Distribution plot for combined score
    if (length(existing_score_cols) > 0) {
      p5 <- ggplot(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data, aes(.data[[existing_score_cols[1]]])) +
        geom_histogram(bins = 50, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = c(
          quantile(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[existing_score_cols[1]]], 0.2, na.rm = TRUE),
          quantile(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[existing_score_cols[1]]], 0.8, na.rm = TRUE)
        ), linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
        labs(title = paste("Distribution of", hybrid_name, "Combined Scores"),
             x = "Combined Module Score", y = "Number of Cells") +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5))

      print(p5)
    }
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 7: Summary of Combined Analysis
# ========================================

cat("\n=== COMBINED MODULE ANALYSIS SUMMARY ===\n")

# Create summary table
combined_summary <- data.frame(
  Hybrid = character(),
  Method = character(),
  High_Cells = numeric(),
  Medium_Cells = numeric(),
  Low_Cells = numeric(),
  Mean_Score = numeric(),
  Score_Range = character(),
  Correlation_Constituents = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (hybrid_name in names(hybrid_combinations)) {
  # Get constituent modules
  module1 <- hybrid_combinations[[hybrid_name]][1]
  module2 <- hybrid_combinations[[hybrid_name]][2]

  # Get constituent score columns
  score_col1 <- paste0(module1, "_Module_Score")
  score_col2 <- paste0(module2, "_Module_Score")

  if (!score_col1 %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    score_col1 <- paste0(module1, "_Manual_Module_Score")
  }
  if (!score_col2 %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    score_col2 <- paste0(module2, "_Manual_Module_Score")
  }

  # Calculate correlation if both exist
  correlation <- NA
  if (score_col1 %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data) &&
      score_col2 %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    correlation <- cor(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col1]],
                      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col2]], use = "complete.obs")
  }

  # Check different combination methods
  methods <- c("Average", "Max", "Min", "GeneCombined")

  for (method in methods) {
    score_col <- paste0(hybrid_name, "_", method, "_Score")
    class_col <- paste0(hybrid_name, "_Class")  # Only exists for Average method

    if (score_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
      mean_score <- mean(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col]], na.rm = TRUE)
      score_range <- paste(round(min(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col]], na.rm = TRUE), 3),
                          "to",
                          round(max(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_col]], na.rm = TRUE), 3))

      # Get cell counts (only for Average method with classification)
      high_cells <- medium_cells <- low_cells <- NA
      if (method == "Average" && class_col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
        high_cells <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[class_col]] == "High_Combined", na.rm = TRUE)
        medium_cells <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[class_col]] == "Medium_Combined", na.rm = TRUE)
        low_cells <- sum(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[class_col]] == "Low_Combined", na.rm = TRUE)
      }

      # Add to summary
      combined_summary <- rbind(combined_summary, data.frame(
        Hybrid = hybrid_name,
        Method = method,
        High_Cells = high_cells,
        Medium_Cells = medium_cells,
        Low_Cells = low_cells,
        Mean_Score = round(mean_score, 3),
        Score_Range = score_range,
        Correlation_Constituents = round(correlation, 3),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}

print(combined_summary)

# Export combined results
cat("\nAvailable combined score columns:\n")
combined_cols <- colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)[grep("Combined|_Average_|_Max_|_Min_|_GeneCombined",
                                                           colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data))]
print(combined_cols)

cat("\nCombined module analysis complete!\n")
cat("All combined hybrid scores are now available in the Seurat object metadata.\n")
```
# Save combined modules for export
```{r}
# ========================================
# Save Combined Gene Modules to CSV Files
# ========================================

# Define the hybrid combinations (same as in your original code)
hybrid_combinations <- list(
  "CHC1_Combined" = c("CHC1_vs_CD45Immune", "CHC1_vs_EpcamTumor"),
  "CHC2_Combined" = c("CHC2_vs_CD45Immune", "CHC2_vs_EpcamTumor"),
  "CHC3_Combined" = c("CHC3_vs_CD45Immune", "CHC3_vs_EpcamTumor"),
  "THC_Combined" = c("THC_vs_CD45Immune", "THC_vs_EpcamTumor")
)

# Create a list to store all combined gene modules
combined_gene_modules <- list()

# Process each hybrid combination
for (hybrid_name in names(hybrid_combinations)) {
  cat("Processing:", hybrid_name, "\n")

  # Get the two constituent modules
  module1 <- hybrid_combinations[[hybrid_name]][1]
  module2 <- hybrid_combinations[[hybrid_name]][2]

  # Combine gene lists from both modules
  combined_up_genes <- unique(c(signature_gene_lists[[module1]]$Up,
                               signature_gene_lists[[module2]]$Up))
  combined_down_genes <- unique(c(signature_gene_lists[[module1]]$Down,
                                 signature_gene_lists[[module2]]$Down))

  # Store the combined gene lists
  combined_gene_modules[[hybrid_name]] <- list(
    Up = combined_up_genes,
    Down = combined_down_genes
  )

  cat("  Up genes:", length(combined_up_genes), "\n")
  cat("  Down genes:", length(combined_down_genes), "\n")
}

# ========================================
# Save to CSV files
# ========================================

# Create output directory if it doesn't exist
output_dir <- "combined_gene_modules"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir)
}

# Save each combined module to separate CSV files
for (hybrid_name in names(combined_gene_modules)) {
  # Prepare data for CSV
  up_genes <- combined_gene_modules[[hybrid_name]]$Up
  down_genes <- combined_gene_modules[[hybrid_name]]$Down

  # Create a data frame with all genes and their regulation direction
  gene_df <- data.frame(
    Gene = c(up_genes, down_genes),
    Regulation = c(rep("Up", length(up_genes)), rep("Down", length(down_genes))),
    Module = hybrid_name,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  # Save to CSV
  filename <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(hybrid_name, "_genes.csv"))
  write.csv(gene_df, filename, row.names = FALSE)
  cat("Saved", hybrid_name, "to", filename, "\n")
}

# ========================================
# Create a master CSV with all modules
# ========================================

# Combine all modules into one master file
master_df <- data.frame(
  Gene = character(),
  Regulation = character(),
  Module = character(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (hybrid_name in names(combined_gene_modules)) {
  up_genes <- combined_gene_modules[[hybrid_name]]$Up
  down_genes <- combined_gene_modules[[hybrid_name]]$Down

  # Add up genes
  if (length(up_genes) > 0) {
    master_df <- rbind(master_df, data.frame(
      Gene = up_genes,
      Regulation = "Up",
      Module = hybrid_name,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }

  # Add down genes
  if (length(down_genes) > 0) {
    master_df <- rbind(master_df, data.frame(
      Gene = down_genes,
      Regulation = "Down",
      Module = hybrid_name,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
}

# Save master file
master_filename <- file.path(output_dir, "All_Combined_Modules.csv")
write.csv(master_df, master_filename, row.names = FALSE)
cat("Saved master file to", master_filename, "\n")

# ========================================
# Create summary statistics
# ========================================

# Create summary table
summary_df <- data.frame(
  Module = character(),
  Total_Genes = numeric(),
  Up_Genes = numeric(),
  Down_Genes = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (hybrid_name in names(combined_gene_modules)) {
  up_count <- length(combined_gene_modules[[hybrid_name]]$Up)
  down_count <- length(combined_gene_modules[[hybrid_name]]$Down)
  total_count <- up_count + down_count

  summary_df <- rbind(summary_df, data.frame(
    Module = hybrid_name,
    Total_Genes = total_count,
    Up_Genes = up_count,
    Down_Genes = down_count,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ))
}

# Save summary
summary_filename <- file.path(output_dir, "Combined_Modules_Summary.csv")
write.csv(summary_df, summary_filename, row.names = FALSE)
cat("Saved summary to", summary_filename, "\n")

# Print summary to console
cat("\n=== COMBINED GENE MODULES SUMMARY ===\n")
print(summary_df)

# ========================================
# Optional: Create gene list format for AddModuleScore
# ========================================

# Create lists in the format needed for AddModuleScore
cat("\n=== Gene lists for AddModuleScore ===\n")
for (hybrid_name in names(combined_gene_modules)) {
  cat("\n", hybrid_name, ":\n")
  cat("Up genes list:\n")
  cat("c(", paste0('"', combined_gene_modules[[hybrid_name]]$Up, '"', collapse = ", "), ")\n")
  cat("Down genes list:\n")
  cat("c(", paste0('"', combined_gene_modules[[hybrid_name]]$Down, '"', collapse = ", "), ")\n")
}

cat("\nAll files saved to:", output_dir, "\n")
cat("Files created:\n")
for (hybrid_name in names(combined_gene_modules)) {
  cat("  -", paste0(hybrid_name, "_genes.csv"), "\n")
}
cat("  - All_Combined_Modules.csv\n")
cat("  - Combined_Modules_Summary.csv\n")
```
