# PART 10: AA Subset Question
```{r}
#clusters or cells that are high for runx1 or spi1 -look what else they are expressing with the find markers function in Seurat for those specific clusters or by isolating those cells as their own group of that makes sense
# ========================================
# PART 1: Subset Hybrid Cells High in RUNX1 and SPI1
# ========================================

# Ensure layers are joined (required for Seurat v5)
cat("Joining layers in Seurat object...\n")
merged_data_all_7 <- JoinLayers(merged_data_all_7)

# Check if WellCellType exists in metadata
if(!"WellCellType" %in% colnames(merged_data_all_7@meta.data)) {
  stop("WellCellType column not found in metadata. Please check column name.")
}

# Define Hybrid cells (CHC + THC)
Hybrid_cells <- WhichCells(merged_data_all_7, expression = WellCellType %in% c("CHC", "THC"))
cat("Total Hybrid cells:", length(Hybrid_cells), "\n")

# Define expression threshold for "high" (e.g., expression > 0 or quantile-based)
# Option 1: Simple threshold (expression > 0)
# Option 2: Quantile-based threshold (e.g., top 25% of expression)
threshold_type <- "quantile"  # Change to "simple" for fixed threshold
quantile_cutoff <- 0.75      # Top 25% for quantile-based
fixed_threshold <- 0         # Fixed threshold for simple method

# Get expression data for RUNX1 and SPI1
expression_data <- GetAssayData(merged_data_all_7, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")
runx1_expr <- expression_data["RUNX1", Hybrid_cells]
spi1_expr <- expression_data["SPI1", Hybrid_cells]

# Calculate thresholds
if(threshold_type == "quantile") {
  runx1_threshold <- quantile(runx1_expr[runx1_expr > 0], quantile_cutoff)
  spi1_threshold <- quantile(spi1_expr[spi1_expr > 0], quantile_cutoff)
} else {
  runx1_threshold <- fixed_threshold
  spi1_threshold <- fixed_threshold
}

cat("RUNX1 threshold:", runx1_threshold, "\n")
cat("SPI1 threshold:", spi1_threshold, "\n")

# Subset Hybrid cells high in both RUNX1 and SPI1
runx1_high <- Hybrid_cells[runx1_expr > runx1_threshold]
spi1_high <- Hybrid_cells[spi1_expr > spi1_threshold]
runx1_spi1_high <- intersect(runx1_high, spi1_high)

cat("Hybrid cells high in SPI1:", length(spi1_high), "\n")

# Check if any cells were found
if(length(spi1_high) == 0) {
  stop("No Hybrid cells found with high SPI1 expression. Try lowering thresholds.")
}

# Define other cells (all cells except RUNX1/SPI1-high Hybrids)
other_cells <- setdiff(colnames(merged_data_all_7), spi1_high)
cat("Other cells:", length(other_cells), "\n")

# Add group labels to metadata
merged_data_all_7$SPI1_Group <- ifelse(colnames(merged_data_all_7) %in% spi1_high,
                                             "SPI1_High_Hybrid", "Other")

# Check group assignment
table(merged_data_all_7$SPI1_Group)

# ========================================
# PART 2: Differential Expression Analysis
# ========================================

# Set identity to the new group variable
Idents(merged_data_all_7) <- "SPI1_Group"

# Run differential expression analysis: RUNX1/SPI1-high Hybrids vs Others
cat("Running differential expression analysis...\n")
spi1_markers <- FindMarkers(
  merged_data_all_7,
  ident.1 = "SPI1_High_Hybrid",
  ident.2 = "Other",
  test.use = "wilcox",
  logfc.threshold = 0.25,
  min.pct = 0.1,
  verbose = TRUE
)

# Add gene names as a column
spi1_markers$gene <- rownames(spi1_markers)

# Sort by log fold change (descending)
spi1_markers <- spi1_markers[order(spi1_markers$avg_log2FC, decreasing = TRUE), ]

cat("Total differentially expressed genes:", nrow(spi1_markers), "\n")
cat("Upregulated in SPI1-high Hybrids:", sum(spi1_markers$avg_log2FC > 0), "\n")
cat("Downregulated in SPI1-high Hybrids:", sum(spi1_markers$avg_log2FC < 0), "\n")

# Filter for significant genes
sig_markers <- spi1_markers[spi1_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 &
                                  abs(spi1_markers$avg_log2FC) > 0.5, ]
cat("Significant differentially expressed genes:", nrow(sig_markers), "\n")

# ========================================
# PART 3: GO-Term Biological Process Analysis
# ========================================


# Check if significant markers exist
if(nrow(sig_markers) == 0) {
  stop("No significant differentially expressed genes found for GO analysis.")
}

# Extract significant genes
go_genes <- sig_markers$gene
cat("Number of significant genes for GO analysis:", length(go_genes), "\n")

# Convert gene symbols to Entrez IDs
gene_entrez <- bitr(go_genes, fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db)
cat("Genes successfully mapped to Entrez IDs:", nrow(gene_entrez), "\n")

if(nrow(gene_entrez) == 0) {
  stop("No genes mapped to Entrez IDs. Check gene symbols or OrgDb compatibility.")
}

# Perform GO Biological Process enrichment analysis
go_results <- enrichGO(
  gene = gene_entrez$ENTREZID,
  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
  keyType = "ENTREZID",
  ont = "BP",  # Biological Process
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",  # Benjamini-Hochberg adjustment
  pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
  qvalueCutoff = 0.2,
  readable = TRUE  # Map Entrez IDs back to gene symbols
)

# Check if any GO terms were enriched
if(is.null(go_results) || nrow(go_results) == 0) {
  warning("No enriched GO-BP terms found. Try relaxing p-value or q-value cutoffs.")
} else {
  cat("Number of enriched GO-BP terms:", nrow(go_results), "\n")

  # Display top 10 GO terms
  cat("\n=== Top 10 Enriched GO-BP Terms ===\n")
  top_go <- head(as.data.frame(go_results), 10)
  for(i in 1:nrow(top_go)) {
    cat(sprintf("%s: %s (p.adjust=%.2e, GeneRatio=%s)\n",
                top_go$ID[i], top_go$Description[i], top_go$p.adjust[i], top_go$GeneRatio[i]))
  }

  # Visualize GO results with a dot plot
  p_go <- dotplot(
    go_results,
    showCategory = 20,  # Show top 20 terms
    title = "GO Biological Process Enrichment: SPI1-High Hybrids",
    font.size = 10
  ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

  print(p_go)

  # Save GO results to CSV
  write.csv(as.data.frame(go_results), "SPI1_High_Hybrid_GO_BP.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  cat("GO results saved to 'SPI1_High_Hybrid_GO_BP.csv'\n")
}


# ========================================
# PART 4: UMAP Visualization
# ========================================

# Create UMAP plot highlighting RUNX1/SPI1-high Hybrid cells
p_umap <- DimPlot(
  merged_data_all_7,
  group.by = "SPI1_Group",
  cols = c("SPI1_High_Hybrid" = "red", "Other" = "gray"),
  label = FALSE,
  pt.size = 2
) +
  ggtitle("UMAP: SPI1-High Hybrid Cells vs Others") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_umap)

# Feature plots for RUNX1 and SPI1 expression
p_feature_runx1 <- FeaturePlot(
  merged_data_all_7,
  features = "RUNX1",
  pt.size = 0.5,
  order = TRUE
) + ggtitle("RUNX1 Expression")

p_feature_spi1 <- FeaturePlot(
  merged_data_all_7,
  features = "SPI1",
  pt.size = 0.5,
  order = TRUE
) + ggtitle("SPI1 Expression")

print(p_feature_runx1)
print(p_feature_spi1)

# ========================================
# PART 4: Generalized Subsetting Functions
# ========================================

# Function to subset cells based on a single gene
subset_by_single_gene <- function(seurat_obj, gene, cell_types = NULL, threshold_type = "quantile",
                                 quantile_cutoff = 0.75, fixed_threshold = 0, group_name = "High_Expr") {

  # Subset to specific cell types if provided
  if(!is.null(cell_types)) {
    cells <- WhichCells(seurat_obj, expression = WellCellType %in% cell_types)
    cat("Total cells in specified types:", length(cells), "\n")
  } else {
    cells <- colnames(seurat_obj)
  }

  # Get expression data
  expr_data <- GetAssayData(seurat_obj, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")
  if(!(gene %in% rownames(expr_data))) {
    stop("Gene ", gene, " not found in dataset.")
  }
  gene_expr <- expr_data[gene, cells]

  # Calculate threshold
  if(threshold_type == "quantile") {
    threshold <- quantile(gene_expr[gene_expr > 0], quantile_cutoff)
  } else {
    threshold <- fixed_threshold
  }

  cat("Threshold for", gene, ":", threshold, "\n")

  # Subset cells
  high_cells <- cells[gene_expr > threshold]
  cat("Cells high in", gene, ":", length(high_cells), "\n")

  if(length(high_cells) == 0) {
    stop("No cells found with high expression for ", gene, ". Try lowering threshold.")
  }

  # Add group labels
  seurat_obj[[group_name]] <- ifelse(colnames(seurat_obj) %in% high_cells,
                                     paste0(gene, "_High"), "Other")

  return(seurat_obj)
}

# Function to subset cells based on multiple genes
subset_by_multiple_genes <- function(seurat_obj, genes, cell_types = NULL, threshold_type = "quantile",
                                    quantile_cutoff = 0.75, fixed_threshold = 0, group_name = "High_Expr") {

  # Subset to specific cell types if provided
  if(!is.null(cell_types)) {
    cells <- WhichCells(seurat_obj, expression = WellCellType %in% cell_types)
    cat("Total cells in specified types:", length(cells), "\n")
  } else {
    cells <- colnames(seurat_obj)
  }

  # Get expression data
  expr_data <- GetAssayData(seurat_obj, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")
  missing_genes <- genes[!(genes %in% rownames(expr_data))]
  if(length(missing_genes) > 0) {
    stop("Genes not found in dataset: ", paste(missing_genes, collapse = ", "))
  }

  # Calculate thresholds for each gene
  thresholds <- sapply(genes, function(g) {
    expr <- expr_data[g, cells]
    if(threshold_type == "quantile") {
      quantile(expr[expr > 0], quantile_cutoff)
    } else {
      fixed_threshold
    }
  })

  cat("Thresholds:\n")
  for(i in 1:length(genes)) {
    cat(genes[i], ":", thresholds[i], "\n")
  }

  # Identify cells high in all genes
  high_cells_list <- lapply(genes, function(g) {
    cells[expr_data[g, cells] > thresholds[g]]
  })
  high_cells <- Reduce(intersect, high_cells_list)

  cat("Cells high in all genes:", length(high_cells), "\n")

  if(length(high_cells) == 0) {
    stop("No cells found with high expression for all genes. Try lowering thresholds.")
  }

  # Add group labels
  seurat_obj[[group_name]] <- ifelse(colnames(seurat_obj) %in% high_cells,
                                    paste0(group_name, "_High"), "Other")

  return(seurat_obj)
}

# Example usage of generalized functions
# Subset by single gene (e.g., RUNX1) in Hybrid cells
# merged_data_all_7 <- subset_by_single_gene(
#   seurat_obj = merged_data_all_7,
#   gene = "RUNX1",
#   cell_types = c("CHC", "THC"),
#   threshold_type = "quantile",
#   quantile_cutoff = 0.75,
#   group_name = "RUNX1_High"
# )

# Subset by multiple genes (e.g., RUNX1, SPI1) in Hybrid cells
#genes_of_interest <- c("RUNX1", "SPI1")
# merged_data_all_7 <- subset_by_multiple_genes(
#   seurat_obj = merged_data_all_7,
#   genes = genes_of_interest,
#   cell_types = c("CHC", "THC"),
#   threshold_type = "quantile",
#   quantile_cutoff = 0.75,
#   group_name = "RUNX1_SPI1"
# )

# Example: Differential expression for single-gene subset
# Idents(merged_data_all_7) <- "RUNX1_High"
# markers <- FindMarkers(merged_data_all_7, ident.1 = "RUNX1_High", ident.2 = "Other")

# Example: UMAP for single-gene subset
# DimPlot(merged_data_all_7, group.by = "RUNX1_High", cols = c("RUNX1_High" = "red", "Other" = "gray"))
```
# AA Subset 2.0
```{r}
# ========================================
# PART 1: Subset Hybrid Cells High in SPI1, GRN, and PF4 relative to EpcamTumor
# ========================================

# Ensure layers are joined (required for Seurat v5)
cat("Joining layers in Seurat object...\n")
merged_data_all_7 <- JoinLayers(merged_data_all_7)

# Check if WellCellType exists in metadata
if(!"WellCellType" %in% colnames(merged_data_all_7@meta.data)) {
  stop("WellCellType column not found in metadata. Please check column name.")
}

# Define cell populations
Hybrid_cells <- WhichCells(merged_data_all_7, expression = WellCellType %in% c("CHC", "THC"))
EpcamTumor_cells <- WhichCells(merged_data_all_7, expression = WellCellType == "EpcamTumor")

cat("Total Hybrid cells:", length(Hybrid_cells), "\n")
cat("Total EpcamTumor cells:", length(EpcamTumor_cells), "\n")

# Check if we have cells from both populations
if(length(Hybrid_cells) == 0) {
  stop("No Hybrid cells found. Check cell type names.")
}
if(length(EpcamTumor_cells) == 0) {
  stop("No EpcamTumor cells found. Check cell type names.")
}

# Define genes of interest
genes_of_interest <- c("SPI1", "GRN", "PF4")

# Get expression data
expression_data <- GetAssayData(merged_data_all_7, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Check if all genes are present
missing_genes <- genes_of_interest[!(genes_of_interest %in% rownames(expression_data))]
if(length(missing_genes) > 0) {
  stop("Genes not found in dataset: ", paste(missing_genes, collapse = ", "))
}

# Calculate mean expression in EpcamTumor cells for each gene (as reference)
epcam_mean_expr <- sapply(genes_of_interest, function(gene) {
  mean(expression_data[gene, EpcamTumor_cells])
})

cat("Mean expression in EpcamTumor cells:\n")
for(i in 1:length(genes_of_interest)) {
  cat(genes_of_interest[i], ":", round(epcam_mean_expr[i], 3), "\n")
}

# Calculate expression thresholds (e.g., 1.5x mean expression in EpcamTumor cells)
fold_change_threshold <- 1.5  # Adjust this value as needed
expression_thresholds <- epcam_mean_expr * fold_change_threshold

cat("\nExpression thresholds (", fold_change_threshold, "x EpcamTumor mean):\n")
for(i in 1:length(genes_of_interest)) {
  cat(genes_of_interest[i], ":", round(expression_thresholds[i], 3), "\n")
}

# Identify Hybrid cells with high expression for each gene
high_expr_lists <- list()
for(gene in genes_of_interest) {
  gene_expr_hybrids <- expression_data[gene, Hybrid_cells]
  high_cells <- Hybrid_cells[gene_expr_hybrids > expression_thresholds[gene]]
  high_expr_lists[[gene]] <- high_cells
  cat("Hybrid cells high in", gene, ":", length(high_cells), "\n")
}

# Find intersection: Hybrid cells high in ALL three genes
triple_high_cells <- Reduce(intersect, high_expr_lists)
cat("Hybrid cells high in all three genes (SPI1, GRN, PF4):", length(triple_high_cells), "\n")

# Check if any cells were found
if(length(triple_high_cells) == 0) {
  cat("No cells found with high expression in all three genes. Trying individual gene analysis...\n")

  # Alternative: Use cells high in at least 2 out of 3 genes
  all_high_cells <- unique(unlist(high_expr_lists))
  cell_counts <- table(unlist(lapply(high_expr_lists, function(x) rep(names(high_expr_lists), each = length(x)))))
  # This approach is more complex, let's use union instead for now
  triple_high_cells <- unique(unlist(high_expr_lists))
  cat("Using union approach - Hybrid cells high in any of the three genes:", length(triple_high_cells), "\n")

  if(length(triple_high_cells) == 0) {
    stop("No Hybrid cells found with elevated expression. Try lowering fold_change_threshold.")
  }
}

# Add group labels to metadata
merged_data_all_7$TripleHigh_Group <- "Other"
merged_data_all_7$TripleHigh_Group[colnames(merged_data_all_7) %in% triple_high_cells] <- "SPI1_GRN_PF4_High_Hybrid"
merged_data_all_7$TripleHigh_Group[colnames(merged_data_all_7) %in% EpcamTumor_cells] <- "EpcamTumor"

# Check group assignment
cat("\nGroup assignment:\n")
print(table(merged_data_all_7$TripleHigh_Group))

# ========================================
# PART 2: Differential Expression Analysis
# ========================================

# Set identity to the new group variable
Idents(merged_data_all_7) <- "TripleHigh_Group"

# Run differential expression analysis: Triple-high Hybrids vs EpcamTumor
cat("Running differential expression analysis: SPI1/GRN/PF4-high Hybrids vs EpcamTumor...\n")
de_markers <- FindMarkers(
  merged_data_all_7,
  ident.1 = "SPI1_GRN_PF4_High_Hybrid",
  ident.2 = "EpcamTumor",
  test.use = "wilcox",
  logfc.threshold = 0.25,
  min.pct = 0.1,
  verbose = TRUE
)

# Add gene names as a column
de_markers$gene <- rownames(de_markers)

# Sort by log fold change (descending)
de_markers <- de_markers[order(de_markers$avg_log2FC, decreasing = TRUE), ]

cat("Total differentially expressed genes:", nrow(de_markers), "\n")
cat("Upregulated in triple-high Hybrids:", sum(de_markers$avg_log2FC > 0), "\n")
cat("Downregulated in triple-high Hybrids:", sum(de_markers$avg_log2FC < 0), "\n")

# Filter for significant genes
sig_markers <- de_markers[de_markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 &
                         abs(de_markers$avg_log2FC) > 0.5, ]
cat("Significant differentially expressed genes:", nrow(sig_markers), "\n")

# Display top upregulated genes
cat("\n=== Top 10 Upregulated Genes in Triple-High Hybrids ===\n")
top_up <- head(sig_markers[sig_markers$avg_log2FC > 0, ], 10)
if(nrow(top_up) > 0) {
  for(i in 1:nrow(top_up)) {
    cat(sprintf("%s: log2FC=%.2f, p.adj=%.2e\n",
                top_up$gene[i], top_up$avg_log2FC[i], top_up$p_val_adj[i]))
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 3: GSEA Analysis
# ========================================

# Prepare gene list for GSEA (all genes ranked by log2FC)
gene_list <- de_markers$avg_log2FC
names(gene_list) <- de_markers$gene
gene_list <- sort(gene_list, decreasing = TRUE)

cat("Prepared gene list for GSEA with", length(gene_list), "genes\n")

# Convert gene symbols to Entrez IDs for GSEA
gene_df <- data.frame(SYMBOL = names(gene_list), logFC = gene_list)
gene_entrez <- bitr(gene_df$SYMBOL, fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db)

# Merge and create ranked list
gene_df_entrez <- merge(gene_df, gene_entrez, by = "SYMBOL")
gene_list_entrez <- gene_df_entrez$logFC
names(gene_list_entrez) <- gene_df_entrez$ENTREZID
gene_list_entrez <- sort(gene_list_entrez, decreasing = TRUE)

cat("Genes mapped to Entrez IDs for GSEA:", length(gene_list_entrez), "\n")

if(length(gene_list_entrez) < 10) {
  warning("Very few genes mapped for GSEA. Results may not be reliable.")
}

# Perform GSEA for GO Biological Process
cat("Running GSEA for GO Biological Process...\n")
gsea_go <- gseGO(
  geneList = gene_list_entrez,
  ont = "BP",
  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
  keyType = "ENTREZID",
  pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  verbose = TRUE
)

# Check GSEA results
if(is.null(gsea_go) || nrow(gsea_go) == 0) {
  warning("No enriched pathways found in GSEA. Try different parameters.")
} else {
  cat("Number of enriched pathways in GSEA:", nrow(gsea_go), "\n")

  # Display top pathways
  cat("\n=== Top 10 Enriched Pathways (GSEA) ===\n")
  top_gsea <- head(as.data.frame(gsea_go), 10)
  for(i in 1:nrow(top_gsea)) {
    cat(sprintf("%s: %s (NES=%.2f, p.adjust=%.2e)\n",
                top_gsea$ID[i], top_gsea$Description[i],
                top_gsea$NES[i], top_gsea$p.adjust[i]))
  }

  # Visualize GSEA results
  p_gsea <- dotplot(gsea_go, showCategory = 15, title = "GSEA: GO-BP Pathways") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

  print(p_gsea)

  # Save GSEA results
  write.csv(as.data.frame(gsea_go), "Triple_High_Hybrid_GSEA_GO_BP.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  cat("GSEA results saved to 'Triple_High_Hybrid_GSEA_GO_BP.csv'\n")
}

# ========================================
# PART 4: UMAP Visualization
# ========================================

# Create UMAP plot highlighting triple-high Hybrid cells
p_umap <- DimPlot(
  merged_data_all_7,
  group.by = "TripleHigh_Group",
  cols = c("SPI1_GRN_PF4_High_Hybrid" = "red", "EpcamTumor" = "blue", "Other" = "lightgray"),
  label = FALSE,
  pt.size = 2
) +
  ggtitle("UMAP: SPI1/GRN/PF4-High Hybrid Cells vs EpcamTumor vs Others") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_umap)

# Feature plots for the three genes of interest
feature_plots <- list()
for(gene in genes_of_interest) {
  p_feature <- FeaturePlot(
    merged_data_all_7,
    features = gene,
    pt.size = 0.5,
    order = TRUE
  ) +
    ggtitle(paste(gene, "Expression")) +
    theme_minimal()

  feature_plots[[gene]] <- p_feature
  print(p_feature)
}

# Create a combined feature plot
if(require(patchwork)) {
  combined_features <- wrap_plots(feature_plots, ncol = 2)
  print(combined_features)
}

# ========================================
# PART 5: Additional Analysis and Validation
# ========================================

# Violin plot showing expression of the three genes across groups
genes_to_plot <- genes_of_interest
p_violin <- VlnPlot(
  merged_data_all_7,
  features = genes_to_plot,
  group.by = "TripleHigh_Group",
  cols = c("SPI1_GRN_PF4_High_Hybrid" = "red", "EpcamTumor" = "blue", "Other" = "lightgray"),
  pt.size = 0.1
) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

print(p_violin)

# Summary statistics
cat("\n=== Summary Statistics ===\n")
cat("Total cells analyzed:", ncol(merged_data_all_7), "\n")
cat("Triple-high Hybrid cells:", length(triple_high_cells), "\n")
cat("EpcamTumor cells:", length(EpcamTumor_cells), "\n")
cat("Percentage of Hybrids that are triple-high:",
    round(length(triple_high_cells) / length(Hybrid_cells) * 100, 2), "%\n")

# Save the differential expression results
write.csv(de_markers, "Triple_High_Hybrid_vs_EpcamTumor_DEGs.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("Differential expression results saved to 'Triple_High_Hybrid_vs_EpcamTumor_DEGs.csv'\n")

# Save significant markers
write.csv(sig_markers, "Triple_High_Hybrid_vs_EpcamTumor_Significant_DEGs.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("Significant DEGs saved to 'Triple_High_Hybrid_vs_EpcamTumor_Significant_DEGs.csv'\n")
```

# AA Subset 4.0
```{r}
# ========================================
# Comprehensive Comparison: Relative vs 90th Percentile vs Top 50 Methods
# ========================================

library(cowplot)

# Ensure layers are joined (required for Seurat v5)
cat("Joining layers in Seurat object...\n")
merged_data_all_7 <- JoinLayers(merged_data_all_7)

# Check if WellCellType exists in metadata
if(!"WellCellType" %in% colnames(merged_data_all_7@meta.data)) {
  stop("WellCellType column not found in metadata. Please check column name.")
}

# Define cell populations
Hybrid_cells <- WhichCells(merged_data_all_7, expression = WellCellType %in% c("CHC", "THC"))
EpcamTumor_cells <- WhichCells(merged_data_all_7, expression = WellCellType == "EpcamTumor")
CD45Immune_cells <- WhichCells(merged_data_all_7, expression = WellCellType == "CD45Immune")

cat("Total Hybrid cells:", length(Hybrid_cells), "\n")
cat("Total EpcamTumor cells:", length(EpcamTumor_cells), "\n")
cat("Total CD45Immune cells:", length(CD45Immune_cells), "\n")

# Define genes of interest
genes_of_interest <- c("SPI1", "RUNX1")

# Get expression data
expression_data <- GetAssayData(merged_data_all_7, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# ========================================
# PART 1: Calculate All Three Methods
# ========================================

# Method 1: Relative to EpcamTumor (1.5x mean)
calculate_relative_cells <- function(fold_change = 1.5) {
  cat("\n=== Relative Method (", fold_change, "x EpcamTumor mean) ===\n")

  relative_cells <- list()
  thresholds <- list()

  for(gene in genes_of_interest) {
    # Calculate mean expression in EpcamTumor cells
    epcam_expr <- expression_data[gene, EpcamTumor_cells]
    epcam_mean <- mean(epcam_expr)
    threshold <- epcam_mean * fold_change

    # Get hybrid cells above threshold
    hybrid_expr <- expression_data[gene, Hybrid_cells]
    above_threshold <- hybrid_expr > threshold
    high_cells <- Hybrid_cells[above_threshold]

    relative_cells[[gene]] <- high_cells
    thresholds[[gene]] <- threshold

    cat(gene, "- EpcamTumor mean:", round(epcam_mean, 3),
        ", Threshold (", fold_change, "x):", round(threshold, 3),
        ", High cells:", length(high_cells), "\n")

    # Show what percentage of hybrids this captures
    pct_hybrids <- round(length(high_cells) / length(Hybrid_cells) * 100, 1)
    cat("  → Captures", pct_hybrids, "% of hybrid cells\n")
  }

  return(list(cells = relative_cells, thresholds = thresholds))
}

# Method 2: 90th percentile of hybrid cells
calculate_percentile_cells <- function(percentile = 90) {
  cat("\n=== 90th Percentile Method (top", 100-percentile, "% of Hybrid cells) ===\n")

  percentile_cells <- list()
  thresholds <- list()

  for(gene in genes_of_interest) {
    hybrid_expr <- expression_data[gene, Hybrid_cells]
    threshold <- quantile(hybrid_expr, percentile/100)
    above_threshold <- hybrid_expr > threshold
    high_cells <- Hybrid_cells[above_threshold]

    percentile_cells[[gene]] <- high_cells
    thresholds[[gene]] <- threshold

    cat(gene, "- Threshold (", percentile, "th percentile):", round(threshold, 3),
        ", Cells above threshold:", length(high_cells), "\n")
  }

  return(list(cells = percentile_cells, thresholds = thresholds))
}

# Method 3: Top 50 cells
calculate_top_n_cells <- function(n_cells = 50) {
  cat("\n=== Top N Method (top", n_cells, "cells per gene) ===\n")

  top_cells <- list()
  thresholds <- list()

  for(gene in genes_of_interest) {
    hybrid_expr <- expression_data[gene, Hybrid_cells]
    # Sort cells by expression and take top N
    sorted_indices <- order(hybrid_expr, decreasing = TRUE)
    top_indices <- sorted_indices[1:min(n_cells, length(sorted_indices))]
    high_cells <- Hybrid_cells[top_indices]

    # Get the threshold (expression of the 50th highest cell)
    threshold <- hybrid_expr[sorted_indices[min(n_cells, length(sorted_indices))]]

    top_cells[[gene]] <- high_cells
    thresholds[[gene]] <- threshold

    cat(gene, "- Top", length(high_cells), "cells, min expression:", round(threshold, 3), "\n")
  }

  return(list(cells = top_cells, thresholds = thresholds))
}

# Calculate all three methods
relative_result <- calculate_relative_cells(1.5)
percentile_result <- calculate_percentile_cells(90)
top_n_result <- calculate_top_n_cells(50)

# Extract cell lists for easier access
relative_cells <- relative_result$cells
percentile_cells <- percentile_result$cells
top_n_cells <- top_n_result$cells

# ========================================
# PART 2: Compare Overlaps for Each Gene
# ========================================

cat("\n=== OVERLAP ANALYSIS FOR INDIVIDUAL GENES ===\n")

overlap_results <- list()

for(gene in genes_of_interest) {
  cat("\n--- Analyzing", gene, "---\n")

  relative_set <- relative_cells[[gene]]
  percentile_set <- percentile_cells[[gene]]
  top_n_set <- top_n_cells[[gene]]

  # Calculate all pairwise overlaps
  overlap_rel_perc <- intersect(relative_set, percentile_set)
  overlap_rel_top <- intersect(relative_set, top_n_set)
  overlap_perc_top <- intersect(percentile_set, top_n_set)
  overlap_all_three <- intersect(intersect(relative_set, percentile_set), top_n_set)

  # Calculate unique to each method
  unique_relative <- setdiff(setdiff(relative_set, percentile_set), top_n_set)
  unique_percentile <- setdiff(setdiff(percentile_set, relative_set), top_n_set)
  unique_top_n <- setdiff(setdiff(top_n_set, relative_set), percentile_set)

  # Calculate Jaccard indices
  union_all <- unique(c(relative_set, percentile_set, top_n_set))
  jaccard_rel_perc <- length(overlap_rel_perc) / length(union(relative_set, percentile_set))
  jaccard_rel_top <- length(overlap_rel_top) / length(union(relative_set, top_n_set))
  jaccard_perc_top <- length(overlap_perc_top) / length(union(percentile_set, top_n_set))
  jaccard_all_three <- length(overlap_all_three) / length(union_all)

  # Print results
  cat("Method cell counts:\n")
  cat("  Relative (1.5x EpcamTumor):", length(relative_set), "\n")
  cat("  90th Percentile:", length(percentile_set), "\n")
  cat("  Top 50:", length(top_n_set), "\n")

  cat("\nPairwise overlaps:\n")
  cat("  Relative ∩ Percentile:", length(overlap_rel_perc), "(Jaccard:", round(jaccard_rel_perc, 3), ")\n")
  cat("  Relative ∩ Top 50:", length(overlap_rel_top), "(Jaccard:", round(jaccard_rel_top, 3), ")\n")
  cat("  Percentile ∩ Top 50:", length(overlap_perc_top), "(Jaccard:", round(jaccard_perc_top, 3), ")\n")

  cat("\nThree-way overlap:\n")
  cat("  All three methods:", length(overlap_all_three), "(Jaccard:", round(jaccard_all_three, 3), ")\n")

  cat("\nUnique to each method:\n")
  cat("  Only Relative:", length(unique_relative), "\n")
  cat("  Only Percentile:", length(unique_percentile), "\n")
  cat("  Only Top 50:", length(unique_top_n), "\n")

  # Store results
  overlap_results[[gene]] <- list(
    relative_set = relative_set,
    percentile_set = percentile_set,
    top_n_set = top_n_set,
    overlap_all_three = overlap_all_three,
    unique_relative = unique_relative,
    unique_percentile = unique_percentile,
    unique_top_n = unique_top_n,
    jaccard_rel_perc = jaccard_rel_perc,
    jaccard_rel_top = jaccard_rel_top,
    jaccard_perc_top = jaccard_perc_top,
    jaccard_all_three = jaccard_all_three
  )

  # Show expression ranges for different groups
  hybrid_expr <- expression_data[gene, Hybrid_cells]

  cat("\nExpression ranges:\n")
  if(length(overlap_all_three) > 0) {
    all_three_expr <- hybrid_expr[match(overlap_all_three, Hybrid_cells)]
    cat("  All three methods:", round(min(all_three_expr), 3), "to", round(max(all_three_expr), 3), "\n")
  }
  if(length(unique_relative) > 0) {
    rel_only_expr <- hybrid_expr[match(unique_relative, Hybrid_cells)]
    cat("  Relative only:", round(min(rel_only_expr), 3), "to", round(max(rel_only_expr), 3), "\n")
  }
  if(length(unique_percentile) > 0) {
    perc_only_expr <- hybrid_expr[match(unique_percentile, Hybrid_cells)]
    cat("  Percentile only:", round(min(perc_only_expr), 3), "to", round(max(perc_only_expr), 3), "\n")
  }
  if(length(unique_top_n) > 0) {
    top_only_expr <- hybrid_expr[match(unique_top_n, Hybrid_cells)]
    cat("  Top 50 only:", round(min(top_only_expr), 3), "to", round(max(top_only_expr), 3), "\n")
  }
}

# ========================================
# PART 3: Compare Union Sets (SPI1 OR RUNX1)
# ========================================

cat("\n=== UNION SET COMPARISON (SPI1 OR RUNX1) ===\n")

# Calculate union sets for all three methods
relative_union <- unique(c(relative_cells[["SPI1"]], relative_cells[["RUNX1"]]))
percentile_union <- unique(c(percentile_cells[["SPI1"]], percentile_cells[["RUNX1"]]))
top_n_union <- unique(c(top_n_cells[["SPI1"]], top_n_cells[["RUNX1"]]))

# Calculate overlaps for union sets
union_overlap_all <- intersect(intersect(relative_union, percentile_union), top_n_union)
union_total <- unique(c(relative_union, percentile_union, top_n_union))
union_jaccard <- length(union_overlap_all) / length(union_total)

cat("Union cell counts:\n")
cat("  Relative union:", length(relative_union), "\n")
cat("  Percentile union:", length(percentile_union), "\n")
cat("  Top 50 union:", length(top_n_union), "\n")
cat("  Overlap (all three):", length(union_overlap_all), "\n")
cat("  Total unique cells:", length(union_total), "\n")
cat("  Union Jaccard Index:", round(union_jaccard, 3), "\n")

# ========================================
# PART 4: Visualizations - Bar Charts and Stats
# ========================================

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(reshape2)

# Prepare data for plotting
comparison_data <- data.frame(
  Gene = rep(genes_of_interest, each = 3),
  Method = rep(c("Relative_1.5x", "Percentile_90th", "Top_50"), length(genes_of_interest)),
  Cell_Count = c(
    length(relative_cells[["SPI1"]]), length(percentile_cells[["SPI1"]]), length(top_n_cells[["SPI1"]]),
    length(relative_cells[["RUNX1"]]), length(percentile_cells[["RUNX1"]]), length(top_n_cells[["RUNX1"]])
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Bar plot comparing cell counts
p1 <- ggplot(comparison_data, aes(x = Gene, y = Cell_Count, fill = Method)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(label = Cell_Count), position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), vjust = -0.2, size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Relative_1.5x" = "coral", "Percentile_90th" = "steelblue", "Top_50" = "forestgreen")) +
  labs(title = "Cell Count Comparison: Three Methods",
       x = "Gene", y = "Number of High-Expressing Cells") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14))

print(p1)

# Jaccard index comparison
jaccard_data <- data.frame(
  Gene = rep(genes_of_interest, each = 4),
  Comparison = rep(c("Rel_vs_Perc", "Rel_vs_Top50", "Perc_vs_Top50", "All_Three"), length(genes_of_interest)),
  Jaccard_Index = c(
    overlap_results[["SPI1"]]$jaccard_rel_perc, overlap_results[["SPI1"]]$jaccard_rel_top,
    overlap_results[["SPI1"]]$jaccard_perc_top, overlap_results[["SPI1"]]$jaccard_all_three,
    overlap_results[["RUNX1"]]$jaccard_rel_perc, overlap_results[["RUNX1"]]$jaccard_rel_top,
    overlap_results[["RUNX1"]]$jaccard_perc_top, overlap_results[["RUNX1"]]$jaccard_all_three
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

p2 <- ggplot(jaccard_data, aes(x = Gene, y = Jaccard_Index, fill = Comparison)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(Jaccard_Index, 3)), position = position_dodge(width = 0.9), vjust = -0.2, size = 3) +
  scale_fill_brewer(type = "qual", palette = "Set2") +
  labs(title = "Jaccard Index Comparison Between Methods",
       x = "Gene", y = "Jaccard Index (Overlap/Union)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14), legend.position = "bottom")

print(p2)

# ========================================
# PART 5: UMAP Visualizations for Each Method
# ========================================

# Check if UMAP exists
if(!"umap" %in% names(merged_data_all_7@reductions)) {
  cat("Running UMAP...\n")
  merged_data_all_7 <- RunUMAP(merged_data_all_7, dims = 1:30, verbose = FALSE)
}

# Create color scheme
colors_method <- c("High RUNX1/SPI1 Hybrids" = "red3", "EpcamTumor" = "gray45", "CD45Immune" = "cadetblue3", "Other" = "lightgray")

# Function to create UMAP plot for a specific method
create_method_umap <- function(high_cells_union, method_name, show_legend = TRUE) {
  # Initialize all cells as "Other"
  cell_groups <- rep("Other", ncol(merged_data_all_7))
  names(cell_groups) <- colnames(merged_data_all_7)

  # Assign groups
  cell_groups[EpcamTumor_cells] <- "EpcamTumor"
  cell_groups[CD45Immune_cells] <- "CD45Immune"
  cell_groups[high_cells_union] <- "High RUNX1/SPI1 Hybrids"

  # Add to metadata temporarily
  merged_data_all_7[[paste0("temp_", method_name)]] <- cell_groups

  # Create plot
  p <- DimPlot(
    merged_data_all_7,
    group.by = paste0("temp_", method_name),
    cols = colors_method,
    pt.size = 0.8,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
    ggtitle(paste("UMAP:", method_name, "Method")) +
    labs(subtitle = paste("High RUNX1/SPI1 Hybrids:", length(high_cells_union))) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12),
      legend.position = if(show_legend) "bottom" else "none",
      aspect.ratio = 1  # Ensure square plots
    )

  return(p)
}

# Create UMAP plots for each method
cat("\n=== Creating UMAP visualizations ===\n")

p_relative <- create_method_umap(relative_union, "Relative_1.5x_EpcamTumor", show_legend = TRUE)
p_percentile <- create_method_umap(percentile_union, "90th_Percentile", show_legend = TRUE)
p_top_n <- create_method_umap(top_n_union, "Top_50", show_legend = TRUE)

print(p_relative)
print(p_percentile)
print(p_top_n)

# Create side-by-side comparison with single legend
library(patchwork)

# Create plots without individual legends for the combined plot
p_relative_no_legend <- create_method_umap(relative_union, "Relative_1.5x_EpcamTumor", show_legend = FALSE)
p_percentile_no_legend <- create_method_umap(percentile_union, "90th_Percentile", show_legend = FALSE)
p_top_n_no_legend <- create_method_umap(top_n_union, "Top_50", show_legend = FALSE)

# Extract legend from one of the plots
legend <- get_legend(p_relative)

# Combine plots without legends
combined_plots <- p_relative_no_legend + p_percentile_no_legend + p_top_n_no_legend

# Add the single legend at the bottom
combined_umap <- combined_plots +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "UMAP Comparison: Three High RUNX1/SPI1 Hybrid Selection Methods",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"))
  ) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(combined_umap)

# Clean up temporary metadata columns
merged_data_all_7@meta.data <- merged_data_all_7@meta.data[, !grepl("^temp_", colnames(merged_data_all_7@meta.data))]

# ========================================
# PART 6: Expression Distribution Analysis
# ========================================

cat("\n=== EXPRESSION DISTRIBUTION ANALYSIS ===\n")

for(gene in genes_of_interest) {
  cat("\n--- Expression Analysis for", gene, "---\n")

  hybrid_expr <- expression_data[gene, Hybrid_cells]
  epcam_expr <- expression_data[gene, EpcamTumor_cells]

  cat("Overall stats:\n")
  cat("  Hybrid cells - Mean:", round(mean(hybrid_expr), 3), "Range:", round(min(hybrid_expr), 3), "to", round(max(hybrid_expr), 3), "\n")
  cat("  EpcamTumor cells - Mean:", round(mean(epcam_expr), 3), "Range:", round(min(epcam_expr), 3), "to", round(max(epcam_expr), 3), "\n")
  cat("  Fold difference (Hybrid/Epcam means):", round(mean(hybrid_expr)/mean(epcam_expr), 2), "\n")

  cat("Thresholds used:\n")
  cat("  Relative (1.5x EpcamTumor):", round(relative_result$thresholds[[gene]], 3), "\n")
  cat("  90th Percentile:", round(percentile_result$thresholds[[gene]], 3), "\n")
  cat("  Top 50:", round(top_n_result$thresholds[[gene]], 3), "\n")

  # Create comprehensive expression plot
  plot_data <- data.frame(
    Expression = hybrid_expr,
    Cell_ID = Hybrid_cells,
    Group = "Other_Hybrid",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  # Assign groups based on method selection
  plot_data$Group[plot_data$Cell_ID %in% overlap_results[[gene]]$overlap_all_three] <- "All_Three_Methods"
  plot_data$Group[plot_data$Cell_ID %in% overlap_results[[gene]]$unique_relative] <- "Relative_Only"
  plot_data$Group[plot_data$Cell_ID %in% overlap_results[[gene]]$unique_percentile] <- "Percentile_Only"
  plot_data$Group[plot_data$Cell_ID %in% overlap_results[[gene]]$unique_top_n] <- "Top50_Only"

  # Add EpcamTumor data for context
  epcam_data <- data.frame(
    Expression = epcam_expr,
    Cell_ID = EpcamTumor_cells,
    Group = "EpcamTumor",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  plot_data_combined <- rbind(plot_data, epcam_data)

  # Create histogram with all thresholds
  p3 <- ggplot(plot_data_combined, aes(x = Expression, fill = Group)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 50, alpha = 0.7, position = "identity") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
      "All_Three_Methods" = "purple",
      "Relative_Only" = "coral",
      "Percentile_Only" = "steelblue",
      "Top50_Only" = "forestgreen",
      "Other_Hybrid" = "lightgray",
      "EpcamTumor" = "darkgray"
    )) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = relative_result$thresholds[[gene]], linetype = "dashed", color = "coral", size = 1) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = percentile_result$thresholds[[gene]], linetype = "dashed", color = "steelblue", size = 1) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = top_n_result$thresholds[[gene]], linetype = "dashed", color = "forestgreen", size = 1) +
    labs(title = paste("Expression Distribution -", gene),
         subtitle = "Dashed lines show thresholds: Coral=Relative, Blue=Percentile, Green=Top50",
         x = paste(gene, "Expression"), y = "Number of Cells") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 10))

  print(p3)
}

# ========================================
# PART 7: Summary and Recommendations
# ========================================

# Create comprehensive summary table
summary_table <- data.frame(
  Gene = rep(genes_of_interest, each = 3),
  Method = rep(c("Relative_1.5x", "Percentile_90th", "Top_50"), length(genes_of_interest)),
  Cell_Count = c(
    length(relative_cells[["SPI1"]]), length(percentile_cells[["SPI1"]]), length(top_n_cells[["SPI1"]]),
    length(relative_cells[["RUNX1"]]), length(percentile_cells[["RUNX1"]]), length(top_n_cells[["RUNX1"]])
  ),
  Threshold = c(
    round(relative_result$thresholds[["SPI1"]], 3), round(percentile_result$thresholds[["SPI1"]], 3), round(top_n_result$thresholds[["SPI1"]], 3),
    round(relative_result$thresholds[["RUNX1"]], 3), round(percentile_result$thresholds[["RUNX1"]], 3), round(top_n_result$thresholds[["RUNX1"]], 3)
  ),
  Pct_of_Hybrids = round(c(
    length(relative_cells[["SPI1"]]) / length(Hybrid_cells) * 100,
    length(percentile_cells[["SPI1"]]) / length(Hybrid_cells) * 100,
    length(top_n_cells[["SPI1"]]) / length(Hybrid_cells) * 100,
    length(relative_cells[["RUNX1"]]) / length(Hybrid_cells) * 100,
    length(percentile_cells[["RUNX1"]]) / length(Hybrid_cells) * 100,
    length(top_n_cells[["RUNX1"]]) / length(Hybrid_cells) * 100
  ), 1),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

cat("\n=== COMPREHENSIVE SUMMARY TABLE ===\n")
print(summary_table)

# Union summary
cat("\n=== UNION SUMMARY (SPI1 OR RUNX1) ===\n")
union_summary <- data.frame(
  Method = c("Relative_1.5x", "Percentile_90th", "Top_50", "All_Three_Overlap"),
  Cell_Count = c(length(relative_union), length(percentile_union), length(top_n_union), length(union_overlap_all)),
  Pct_of_Hybrids = round(c(
    length(relative_union) / length(Hybrid_cells) * 100,
    length(percentile_union) / length(Hybrid_cells) * 100,
    length(top_n_union) / length(Hybrid_cells) * 100,
    length(union_overlap_all) / length(Hybrid_cells) * 100
  ), 1),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
print(union_summary)

# Calculate average Jaccard indices
avg_jaccard_pairwise <- mean(c(
  sapply(genes_of_interest, function(g) overlap_results[[g]]$jaccard_rel_perc),
  sapply(genes_of_interest, function(g) overlap_results[[g]]$jaccard_rel_top),
  sapply(genes_of_interest, function(g) overlap_results[[g]]$jaccard_perc_top)
))

avg_jaccard_three_way <- mean(sapply(genes_of_interest, function(g) overlap_results[[g]]$jaccard_all_three))

cat("\n=== OVERLAP ASSESSMENT ===\n")
cat("Average pairwise Jaccard Index:", round(avg_jaccard_pairwise, 3), "\n")
cat("Average three-way Jaccard Index:", round(avg_jaccard_three_way, 3), "\n")
cat("Union three-way Jaccard Index:", round(union_jaccard, 3), "\n")

# ========================================
# PART 8: Commented Out - Differential Expression Analysis and File Export
# ========================================

# ========================================
# PART 8: Differential Expression Analysis and File Export
# ========================================

# Create output directory
output_dir <- "RUNX1SPI1HighSubsetDEG"
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir)
  cat("Created directory:", output_dir, "\n")
}

# Function to run DE analysis and save results
run_de_and_save <- function(high_cells, method_name, comparison_group = "EpcamTumor") {
  cat("Running DE analysis for", method_name, "method vs", comparison_group, "...\n")

  # Create temporary grouping
  temp_group <- rep("Other", ncol(merged_data_all_7))
  names(temp_group) <- colnames(merged_data_all_7)
  temp_group[high_cells] <- "High RUNX1/SPI1 Hybrids"

  if(comparison_group == "EpcamTumor") {
    temp_group[EpcamTumor_cells] <- "EpcamTumor"
    comparison_cells <- EpcamTumor_cells
  } else if(comparison_group == "CD45Immune") {
    temp_group[CD45Immune_cells] <- "CD45Immune"
    comparison_cells <- CD45Immune_cells
  }

  # Add to metadata and set identity
  merged_data_all_7[[paste0("temp_", method_name)]] <- temp_group
  Idents(merged_data_all_7) <- paste0("temp_", method_name)

  # Check if we have enough cells
  group_counts <- table(temp_group)
  cat("Group sizes - High RUNX1/SPI1 Hybrids:",
      ifelse("High RUNX1/SPI1 Hybrids" %in% names(group_counts), group_counts["High RUNX1/SPI1 Hybrids"], 0),
      ", ", comparison_group, ":",
      ifelse(comparison_group %in% names(group_counts), group_counts[comparison_group], 0), "\n")

  if(group_counts["High RUNX1/SPI1 Hybrids"] >= 3 && group_counts[comparison_group] >= 3) {

    # Run FindMarkers
    tryCatch({
      de_results <- FindMarkers(
        merged_data_all_7,
        ident.1 = "High RUNX1/SPI1 Hybrids",
        ident.2 = comparison_group,
        test.use = "wilcox",
        logfc.threshold = 0.25,
        min.pct = 0.1,
        verbose = FALSE
      )

      # Add gene names and metadata
      de_results$gene <- rownames(de_results)
      de_results$method <- method_name
      de_results$comparison <- paste("High_RUNX1_SPI1_Hybrids_vs", comparison_group, sep = "_")
      de_results$n_high_cells <- group_counts["High RUNX1/SPI1 Hybrids"]
      de_results$n_comparison_cells <- group_counts[comparison_group]

      # Reorder columns
      de_results <- de_results[, c("gene", "method", "comparison", "n_high_cells", "n_comparison_cells",
                                  "avg_log2FC", "pct.1", "pct.2", "p_val", "p_val_adj")]

      # Sort by log2FC (descending)
      de_results <- de_results[order(de_results$avg_log2FC, decreasing = TRUE), ]

      # Save to CSV
      filename <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(method_name, "_vs_", comparison_group, "_DEGs.csv"))
      write.csv(de_results, filename, row.names = FALSE)
      cat("Saved:", filename, "(", nrow(de_results), "genes)\n")

      # Print quick summary
      sig_genes <- sum(de_results$p_val_adj < 0.05)
      up_genes <- sum(de_results$avg_log2FC > 0 & de_results$p_val_adj < 0.05)
      down_genes <- sum(de_results$avg_log2FC < 0 & de_results$p_val_adj < 0.05)
      cat("  → Significant DEGs:", sig_genes, "(", up_genes, "up,", down_genes, "down)\n")

      # Clean up temp metadata
      merged_data_all_7@meta.data[[paste0("temp_", method_name)]] <- NULL

      return(de_results)

    }, error = function(e) {
      cat("Error in DE analysis for", method_name, "vs", comparison_group, ":", e$message, "\n")
      merged_data_all_7@meta.data[[paste0("temp_", method_name)]] <- NULL
      return(NULL)
    })
  } else {
    cat("Insufficient cells for DE analysis:", method_name, "vs", comparison_group, "\n")
    cat("Need at least 3 cells in each group\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
}

# Run DE analysis for all three methods against both comparison groups
methods_and_cells <- list(
  "Relative_1.5x" = relative_union,
  "Percentile_90th" = percentile_union,
  "Top_50" = top_n_union
)

comparison_groups <- c("EpcamTumor", "CD45Immune")

# Store all DE results
all_de_results <- list()

cat("\n=== Running Differential Expression Analyses ===\n")

for(method_name in names(methods_and_cells)) {
  high_cells <- methods_and_cells[[method_name]]
  cat("\n--- Processing method:", method_name, "(", length(high_cells), "cells) ---\n")

  for(comp_group in comparison_groups) {
    result_key <- paste(method_name, comp_group, sep = "_vs_")
    all_de_results[[result_key]] <- run_de_and_save(high_cells, method_name, comp_group)
  }
}

# Create summary file of all DE analyses
cat("\n=== Creating Summary Files ===\n")

if(length(all_de_results) > 0) {
  # Remove NULL results
  valid_results <- all_de_results[!sapply(all_de_results, is.null)]

  if(length(valid_results) > 0) {
    # Combine all results into one master file
    master_de <- do.call(rbind, valid_results)
    master_filename <- file.path(output_dir, "All_Methods_Combined_DEGs.csv")
    write.csv(master_de, master_filename, row.names = FALSE)
    cat("Saved master file:", master_filename, "(", nrow(master_de), "total gene comparisons)\n")

    # Create summary statistics
    de_summary <- data.frame(
      Analysis = names(valid_results),
      Total_DEGs = sapply(valid_results, nrow),
      Significant_DEGs = sapply(valid_results, function(x) sum(x$p_val_adj < 0.05)),
      Upregulated = sapply(valid_results, function(x) sum(x$avg_log2FC > 0 & x$p_val_adj < 0.05)),
      Downregulated = sapply(valid_results, function(x) sum(x$avg_log2FC < 0 & x$p_val_adj < 0.05)),
      High_Cells_Used = sapply(valid_results, function(x) x$n_high_cells[1]),
      Comparison_Cells = sapply(valid_results, function(x) x$n_comparison_cells[1]),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    summary_filename <- file.path(output_dir, "DE_Analysis_Summary.csv")
    write.csv(de_summary, summary_filename, row.names = FALSE)
    cat("Saved summary file:", summary_filename, "\n")

    cat("\n=== DIFFERENTIAL EXPRESSION SUMMARY ===\n")
    print(de_summary)

    # Print top genes for each analysis
    cat("\n=== Top 5 Upregulated Genes by Analysis ===\n")
    for(analysis_name in names(valid_results)) {
      de_data <- valid_results[[analysis_name]]
      top_genes <- head(de_data[de_data$p_val_adj < 0.05 & de_data$avg_log2FC > 0, ], 5)
      if(nrow(top_genes) > 0) {
        cat("\n", analysis_name, ":\n")
        for(i in 1:nrow(top_genes)) {
          cat(sprintf("  %s: log2FC=%.2f, p.adj=%.2e\n",
                     top_genes$gene[i], top_genes$avg_log2FC[i], top_genes$p_val_adj[i]))
        }
      } else {
        cat("\n", analysis_name, ": No significant upregulated genes\n")
      }
    }
  } else {
    cat("No valid DE results generated\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("No DE analyses completed successfully\n")
}

# Save cell lists for each method
cat("\n=== Saving Cell Lists ===\n")
cell_lists_filename <- file.path(output_dir, "High_Expressing_Cell_Lists.csv")

# Create a comprehensive cell list file
all_cells_df <- data.frame(
  Cell_ID = character(),
  Method = character(),
  Gene_Specific = character(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Add individual gene results
for(gene in genes_of_interest) {
  for(method in c("Relative", "Percentile", "Top_N")) {
    if(method == "Relative") {
      cells <- relative_cells[[gene]]
      method_name <- "Relative_1.5x"
    } else if(method == "Percentile") {
      cells <- percentile_cells[[gene]]
      method_name <- "Percentile_90th"
    } else {
      cells <- top_n_cells[[gene]]
      method_name <- "Top_50"
    }

    if(length(cells) > 0) {
      all_cells_df <- rbind(all_cells_df, data.frame(
        Cell_ID = cells,
        Method = method_name,
        Gene_Specific = gene,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      ))
    }
  }
}

# Add union results
for(method in names(methods_and_cells)) {
  cells <- methods_and_cells[[method]]
  if(length(cells) > 0) {
    all_cells_df <- rbind(all_cells_df, data.frame(
      Cell_ID = cells,
      Method = method,
      Gene_Specific = "Union_SPI1_OR_RUNX1",
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
}

write.csv(all_cells_df, cell_lists_filename, row.names = FALSE)
cat("Saved cell lists:", cell_lists_filename, "(", nrow(all_cells_df), "entries)\n")

# Create method comparison file
comparison_filename <- file.path(output_dir, "Method_Comparison_Stats.csv")
method_comparison <- data.frame(
  Method = names(methods_and_cells),
  Union_Cell_Count = sapply(methods_and_cells, length),
  Pct_of_Hybrids = round(sapply(methods_and_cells, function(x) length(x) / length(Hybrid_cells) * 100), 1),
  SPI1_Specific = c(length(relative_cells[["SPI1"]]), length(percentile_cells[["SPI1"]]), length(top_n_cells[["SPI1"]])),
  RUNX1_Specific = c(length(relative_cells[["RUNX1"]]), length(percentile_cells[["RUNX1"]]), length(top_n_cells[["RUNX1"]])),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
write.csv(method_comparison, comparison_filename, row.names = FALSE)
cat("Saved method comparison:", comparison_filename, "\n")

cat("\n=== ANALYSIS COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("All files saved to:", output_dir, "\n")
cat("Files created:\n")
list.files(output_dir, pattern = "*.csv")

# Final recommendation based on your analysis
cat("\n=== RECOMMENDATION ===\n")
cat("Based on your biological reasoning, the Percentile_90th method is recommended:\n")
cat("- Systematic and reproducible\n")
cat("- Captures top expressers without being too permissive\n")
cat("- Less arbitrary than Top_50\n")
cat("- All cells also pass the 1.5x threshold (biologically relevant)\n")
if("Percentile_90th_vs_EpcamTumor" %in% names(valid_results)) {
  perc_result <- valid_results[["Percentile_90th_vs_EpcamTumor"]]
  sig_count <- sum(perc_result$p_val_adj < 0.05)
  cat("- Generated", sig_count, "significant DEGs vs EpcamTumor\n")
}



cat("\n=== ANALYSIS COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("Method comparison completed successfully!\n")
cat("\nKey Findings:\n")
cat("- Average pairwise Jaccard Index:", round(avg_jaccard_pairwise, 3), "\n")
cat("- Three-way overlap Jaccard Index:", round(avg_jaccard_three_way, 3), "\n")
cat("- Union overlap contains", length(union_overlap_all), "cells\n")

if(avg_jaccard_pairwise > 0.7) {
  cat("\n✓ HIGH AGREEMENT: Methods show strong concordance\n")
  cat("✓ Any method should give reliable results\n")
} else if(avg_jaccard_pairwise > 0.5) {
  cat("\n⚠ MODERATE AGREEMENT: Methods show reasonable concordance\n")
  cat("⚠ Consider biological rationale for method selection\n")
} else {
  cat("\n✗ LOW AGREEMENT: Significant methodological differences\n")
  cat("✗ Carefully examine expression distributions and thresholds\n")
}

cat("\nTo run differential expression analysis, uncomment the section in PART 8\n")
cat("Files will be saved to 'RUNX1SPI1HighSubsetDEG/' directory\n")
```
